此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。研究生申請資訊請另詳見注意事項。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
具葡萄牙語能力證明，須具葡萄牙文 CEFR B1（含）以上檢定證書，該校部分系所可能有更高語檢要求，選填志願前請務必主動確認。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期2名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人，美洲區第二學期甄選皆為交換一學期)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
First Semester: February - June
Second Semester: August - December

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換學生資訊請參考此連結、Fact Sheet請參考此連結（僅供參考）
課程資訊請參考此連結、語言課程請參考此連結
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程。
Most courses at USP are taught exclusively in Portuguese. We strongly recommend that students have a good command of Portuguese to fully participate in classes (at least B1 level according to the CEFR). 
Master students willing to take courses only should apply preferably to the undergraduate level and for graduate courses upon arrival. Master and PhD students applying for a research placement should be nominated and apply by email.
Special Requirements and Course Restrictions:
The School of Engineering (Escola Politécnica) requires exchange students to enroll in a number of subjects that correspond to at least 12 credits.
Ribeirão Preto School of Economics, Administration, and Accounting (Faculdade de Economia e Administração de Ribeirão Preto – FEARP) requires applicants to enroll in a number of subjects that correspond to at least 16 credits.
The School of Architecture and Urbanism (Faculdade de Arquitetura e Urbanismo – FAU) and the School of Economics, Business and Accountancy (Faculdade de Economia, Administração e Contabilidade – FEA) receive each semester a large number of applications and have limited capacity to admit exchange students. We highly recommend that students intending to apply for such schools consider the possibility of alternatively applying for other schools as well.
Minimum academic workload for exchange students depends on each School, but usually 12 credits per semester.
Insurance: The student will also have to provide evidence of medical insurance or an appropriate and valid travel medical insurance policy for registration upon arrival. Students must purchase their Health/Travel Insurance in their countries of origin before travelling to Brazil (this must cover the entirety of the stay in Brazil). International students will have access to the Brazilian Public Health System only in emergency cases.
USP has 8 campuses spread across the state of São Paulo. More information on each of USP’s campuses is available here.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結

USP does not provide housing facilities for exchange students within the campuses. The students themselves must carry out the search for accommodation according to their economic conditions and personal interests.

name_zh: 里約熱內盧天主教大學
name_zh_detail: 里約熱內盧天主教大學
name_en: Pontifícia Universidade Católica do Rio de Janeiro (PUC-Rio)

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一以上(僅限大學部)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
TOEFL iBT 79 (不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.0，僅具備前述英文能力者，需主動確認是否具備足夠英文授課課程，減少遭到拒收之風險。
或
具葡萄牙語能力證明，B1以上檢定證書或本校修讀葡萄牙語4個學期以上成績及格證明。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期1名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人，美洲區第二學期甄選皆為交換一學期)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
First Semester: February - July
Second Semester: August - December

✔ 該校行事曆請見此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生資訊請見此連結、Information Sheet請見此連結（僅供參考）
課程資訊請見此連結、此連結及此連結
Courses Available in English: Disciplines in English are not necessarily offered every semester. These courses are subject to academic planning. 
Exchange students must take a minimum of 2 classes/8 credits and a maximum of 5 classes/24 credits including the mandatory Portuguese as a second language course for those who are not proficient in Portuguese.
Although students are not required a specific level of proficiency in Portuguese language, on the first day of classes all exchange students must take an oral placement test in order to confirm his/her knowledge of Portuguese. It is mandatory for all students not fully proficient in Portuguese to take a Portuguese as a Second Language course during the regular academic term according to his/her level. Students have the opportunity to take the Intensive Portuguese as a Second Language course before the regular semester begins, although this course is not mandatory.
An administrative cost is charged to all exchange students. It is MANDATORY to all incoming students and CAN NOT BE WAIVED under any circunstance. More details about the payment, please access here.
Students also have the opportunity to take an Intensive Portuguese as a Second Language course before the regular semester begins, although this course is not mandatory.
Application Procedure 
Cost of living information
Visa application information
Insurance information: Students will have to send us by e-mail (scanned) the proof of your International Health Insurance Coverage for the entire duration of your stay in Brazil. Please include the insurance company’s name, policy number, dates of coverage and company contact information.
Proof of Vaccination: COVID-19 Certificate of vaccination, Yellow fever immunization (recommended)
International students are allowed to attend courses at PUC-Rio up to two regular terms plus the Pre-Term Portuguese as a second language Intensive Course.

links.text: Intensive Portuguese as a Second Language course

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
可申請校外住宿（Home-stay Program），住宿資訊請參考此連結

 PUC-Rio does not provide dormitory facilities on campus but offers an enriched opportunity for students to experience the Brazilian way of life by placing them in a home-stay program. 
International students are placed in home-stays located in the south zone of the city, the same as the university. Most families live near the university, within 30- 40 minutes distance from campus by city bus.

一般組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。
具葡萄牙語能力證明，B1以上檢定證書或本校修讀葡萄牙語4個學期以上成績及格證明。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期2名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人，美洲區第二學期甄選皆為交換一學期)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
First semester: February - July

Second semester: August - December

  
✔ 該校行事曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換計畫資訊請參考此連結
課程資訊請參考此連結及此連結 (If the appropriate semester’s schedule is not yet available, students should pick their classes based on the same semester from the year before.)
Please note, Master's/PhD students need to make two applications.
Classes are offered at four different Campuses, in three different cities. We strongly recommend that students take classes in one city. FCA and FT are in Limeira and FOP is in Piracicaba.
All undergraduate classes and most graduate classes are offered in Portuguese.
Areas with restrictions:
Medicine: Only theory courses (up to two courses, one month each, upon Coordinator approval)
Music: Only for Music major applicants, especially instrument classes.
Art Courses: Only for Art major applicants.
Sports Courses: Only for Sports major applicants.
Thesis and final projects: most units do not accept students for thesis and final projects, even if no exam is required.
Language Courses: Only Portuguese for foreigners or Portuguese for Spanish speakers, and ONLY if the student takes the placement test prior to the beginning of classes.
Course Load: Up to 32 credits for non-degree students from Partner Universities. 
Portuguese for foreigners and Portuguese for Spanish speakers: semester-long and are free of charge. However, availability is limited and enrollment is not guaranteed. In addition, only students who arrive in time for the placement interview (offered the week prior to the beginning of classes) are able to enroll. Classes are offered ONLY in Campinas.
Estimated cost of living: Students usually spend around US$400 - 600 per month. This amount includes housing and food costs.
UNICAMP requires that all foreign students have international health insurance. It is advisable for students to take out medical insurance with an insurance company in their home country that provides coverage abroad.
Cost of living: around US$400-600 a month

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考下方說明：

UNICAMP does not have a student residence and does not offer housing for students. Therefore, it is the responsibility of each foreign student to arrange accommodation during the exchange period. Students usually choose between three types of accommodation: republics, kitnets, pensionatos.

name_zh_detail: 魁北克大學蒙特婁分校

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
法語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。欲選填該校為志願的同學，請務必先行詳閱系所限制。
GPA 達3.20分以上，部分院系有更高 GPA 要求，選填志願前請詳見注意事項，以免遭到拒收。
具法語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上，TFI 或 TCF 或 DELF 或 DALF 。
不接受管理學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期1名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人，美洲區第二學期甄選皆為交換一學期)

⚠️ 重要公告.label: ⚠️ 重要公告
⚠️ 重要公告.text: 根據加拿大政府公告，自2024/2025年度起將限縮學生簽證（Study Permit）數，將影響期長為一學年之交換學生計畫，交換期長為一學期者因無需辦理學生簽證，暫不受到影響，敬請留意

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Fall semester: September - December
Winter semester: January - April/May 

✔ 該校年曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生資訊請見此連結、Fact Sheet 請見此連結
課程資訊請見此連結、French as a Second Language課程列表請見此連結
The Université du Québec à Montréal (UQAM) is a French-language university. Most courses are taught in French.
A definitive admission to an exchange program does not guarantee access to the courses chosen by the student. Some courses may require the successful completion of prerequisite courses, may not be offered during your stay or may be full. You may have to choose other courses before or upon your arrival at UQAM.
All courses identified as ateliers (workshop), stages (interships), Jeu (Acting) concentration, or séminaires d’intégration (integration seminar) are not available for exchange students.
The majority of courses offered at UQAM are worth 3 credits. A 3-credit course corresponds to 45 class hours over 15 weeks at a rate of 3 hours per week. Double the hours for study and personal work.
All exchange students must be enrolled in a full-time course load. The number of credits (per semester) required to be considered a full-time student:
Undergraduate (Bachelor’s degree or Certificate): 12 to 15 credits (4 or 5 three-credit courses)
Graduate levels (Master’s degree, DESS, PhD):  6 to 9 credits (2 or 3 three-credit courses)
UQAM'S School of Management is not open to university-wide exchange students.
Students are NOT allowed to take-cross faculty courses, and must stick to their home university major(s). 
For Faculty of Political Science and Law
Baccalauréat en droit
Minimum cumulative average required for the entire university curriculum: 3.4/4.3.
Be enrolled in a law study program (law-economics-management courses are not eligible, unless transcripts show that the equivalent of 24 to 30 credits of law courses (48 - 60 ECTS) have bee successfully completed.
Baccalauréat en relations internationales et droit international (BRIDI)
Minimum cumulative average required for the entire university curriculum: 3.3/4.3.
Be enrolled in a law or political science study program.
For Faculty of Communication:
Baccalauréat en communication (création médias - cinéma)
The candidate must demonstrate a good knowledge of the theory and practice related to filmmaking in both documentary and fiction, as well as experience on set on at least two different film projects.
First-year courses are not open to exchange students. In the second year, it is only possible to register for the winter term. Exchanges for a full year are only possible in the third year
Maîtrise en communication
At the graduate level, students can register for a maximum of 3 courses. No exceptions will be granted in the programs of the Faculty of Communication.
For Faculty of Arts:
Baccalauréat en art dramatique
Concentration scénographie (7603)
Concentration enseignement (7605)
Concentration études théâtrales (6507)
The Jeu (Acting) concentration is not open to exchange students.
The number of places is limited.
Some courses are not accessible to exchange students.
Applicants must be enrolled in a similar program at the home institution.
Depending on concentration, an interview process and/or submission of portfolio may be required.
Estimated cost of living: Living expenses for students, depending on their lodging and lifestyle, is about $1,500 CAD monthly.
Health Insurance: Exchange students at UQAM are obliged to be covered by a health insurance plan ($356 CAD per semester).

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: 不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結

Graduate levels (Master’s degree, DESS, PhD):  6 to 9 credits (2 or 3 three-credit courses)
UQAM'S School of Management is not open to university-wide exchange students.
Students are NOT allowed to take-cross faculty courses, and must stick to their home university major(s). 
For Faculty of Political Science and Law
Baccalauréat en droit
Minimum cumulative average required for the entire university curriculum: 3.4/4.3.
Be enrolled in a law study program (law-economics-management courses are not eligible, unless transcripts show that the equivalent of 24 to 30 credits of law courses (48 - 60 ECTS) have bee successfully completed.
Baccalauréat en relations internationales et droit international (BRIDI)
Minimum cumulative average required for the entire university curriculum: 3.3/4.3.
Be enrolled in a law or political science study program.
For Faculty of Communication:
Baccalauréat en communication (création médias - cinéma)
The candidate must demonstrate a good knowledge of the theory and practice related to filmmaking in both documentary and fiction, as well as experience on set on at least two different film projects.
First-year courses are not open to exchange students. In the second year, it is only possible to register for the winter term. Exchanges for a full year are only possible in the third year
Maîtrise en communication
At the graduate level, students can register for a maximum of 3 courses. No exceptions will be granted in the programs of the Faculty of Communication.
For Faculty of Arts:
Baccalauréat en art dramatique
Concentration scénographie (7603)
Concentration enseignement (7605)
Concentration études théâtrales (6507)
The Jeu (Acting) concentration is not open to exchange students.
The number of places is limited.
Some courses are not accessible to exchange students.
Applicants must be enrolled in a similar program at the home institution.
Depending on concentration, an interview process and/or submission of portfolio may be required.
Estimated cost of living: Living expenses for students, depending on their lodging and lifestyle, is about $1,500 CAD monthly.
Health Insurance: Exchange students at UQAM are obliged to be covered by a health insurance plan ($356 CAD per semester).
housing_text: 不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一/大二/大三學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。
GPA 達3.00分以上，且各科成績均須達 B。
TOEFL iBT 80 (讀 20 聽 20 說 20 寫 20 不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.5 (聽 6.0 讀 6.0 寫 6.5 說 6.0)。
不接受醫學院護理學系、醫學院學士後護理學系、工學院、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學系、共同教育中心國際體育運動事務學士學位學程、醫學院物理治療學系、醫學院職能治療學系、工學院醫學工程學系之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text: 一學期0名。因交換學生往來不平衡，本次甄選不開放申請。

⚠️重要公告.label: ⚠️重要公告
⚠️重要公告.text: 根據加拿大政府公告，自2024/2025年度起將限縮學生簽證（Study Permit）數，將影響期長為一學年之交換學生計畫，交換期長為一學期者因無需辦理學生簽證，暫不受到影響，敬請留意

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Semester 1: September - December
Semester 2: January - March/April

✔ 該校年曆請見此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生資訊請參考此連結及Fact Sheet（僅供參考）
課程資訊請參考此連結
Courses in Nursing, Veterinary Medicine, eMBA, Kinesiology, and Engineering are NOT open to exchange students.
Mandatory Course Load: Students must take a minimum of 3 courses per semester and a maximum of 5 courses per semester.
Cost of living: Approximately $1500 per month
English Academic Preparation (EAP) is taken at a cost for exchange students. We do provide modern language classes (included in exchange).
Medical Insurance: Each exchange student must purchase mandatory emergency medical coverage through Guard Me International Insurance using the UPEI access code of 2456 to secure the UPEI preferred rate and must provide proof of this to the UPEI exchange coordinator prior to arrival. More information can be found here.
We do not offer scholarship for exchange.

欲選填該校為志願的同學，請務必先行詳閱系所限制，自行評估是否符合該校規定 
Université de Montréal is a French taught institution and almost all courses are held in French. No beginner's courses in French are offered at the Université de Montréal.
Programs in engineering, management, and business administration are offered by two UdeM-affiliated schools that manage their student-exchange partnerships and programs independently. You cannot take courses at these schools while participating in the UdeM student exchange program.
Polytechnique Montréal (engineering)
HEC Montréal (management and business administration)


French language courses: 3-credit courses are free; students who take 6-credit intensive courses will be billed CAD$530. Students can take a full term of French language courses, one French language course, and regular courses. Students who wish to take French language courses will be asked to take an online placement test. Course registration will depend on availability and placement test results (beginner-level courses unavailable).   

Workload: At the undergraduate level (bachelor’s), you must be enrolled in a minimum of 12 credits (4 courses) per semester and a maximum of 15 credits (5 courses) per semester. At the graduate level (master's, doctorate), you must be enrolled in a minimum of 6 credits (2 courses) per semester and a maximum of 9 credits (3 courses).
Estimated cost of living
Insurance
Information for students with disabilities

English Studies Program（僅持英文檢定成績者適用）.label: English Studies Program（僅持英文檢定成績者適用）
English Studies Program（僅持英文檢定成績者適用）.text:
The Université de Montréal is a French-language educational institution - the majority of our programs are exclusively taught in French. However, we do have a program that offers a wide variety of courses taught in English, known as the English Studies Program. Here are the links to the course websites:

English Studies Program - Undergraduate
English Studies Program - Graduate

Allophone students can also participate in an exchange at the Université de Montréal and take an intensive French language course at the École de Français. However, we must inform you that beginner-level courses are often canceled due to insufficient participants. Therefore, it is crucial for students considering this option to already have a foundation in French and the flexibility to choose courses from other programs, such as English language courses or courses from the English Studies Program, in case there are not enough French courses available to be considered full-time.

Additionally, there are additional fees for French courses, which will be added to the student's invoice after registration. These fees are not tuition fees; they are specific additional fees for the École de Français that are required from all participants, whether they are part of the exchange program or not:

3-credit course: $75 CAD will be charged for school materials.
6-credit course: $530 CAD will be charged for language workshops.

交換生資訊請參考此連結、Fact Sheet請參考此連結
課程資訊請參考此連結、語言課程請參考此連結
欲選填該校為志願的同學，請務必先行詳閱系所限制，自行評估是否符合該校規定 
Université de Montréal is a French taught institution and almost all courses are held in French. No beginner's courses in French are offered at the Université de Montréal.
Programs in engineering, management, and business administration are offered by two UdeM-affiliated schools that manage their student-exchange partnerships and programs independently. You cannot take courses at these schools while participating in the UdeM student exchange program.
Polytechnique Montréal (engineering)
HEC Montréal (management and business administration)


French language courses: 3-credit courses are free; students who take 6-credit intensive courses will be billed CAD$530. Students can take a full term of French language courses, one French language course, and regular courses. Students who wish to take French language courses will be asked to take an online placement test. Course registration will depend on availability and placement test results (beginner-level courses unavailable).   

Workload: At the undergraduate level (bachelor’s), you must be enrolled in a minimum of 12 credits (4 courses) per semester and a maximum of 15 credits (5 courses) per semester. At the graduate level (master's, doctorate), you must be enrolled in a minimum of 6 credits (2 courses) per semester and a maximum of 9 credits (3 courses).
Estimated cost of living
Insurance
Information for students with disabilities

一般組
本校大一/大二/大三學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.00分以上，請注意，該校僅提供臺大學生交換至Faculty of Arts and Science，並請務必主動確認不開放及／或限制選課領域。
TOEFL iBT 88 (讀 20 聽 20 說 20 寫 20 不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.5 (聽 6.0 讀 6.0 寫 6.0 說 6.0)。
不接受法律學院、工學院醫學工程學系、醫學院物理治療學系、醫學院職能治療學系、社會科學院社會學系之學生申請。

一學期1名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人，美洲區第二學期甄選皆為交換一學期)

註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
該校僅提供臺大學生交換至Faculty of Arts and Science，請欲選填該校為志願的同學，先至該校網頁查詢自己的系所是否隸屬於該學院下，才得以申請至該校交換
交換生資訊請參考此連結及Fact Sheet、課程資訊請參考此連結
Arts and Science courses are open to exchange students provided that they have the appropriate prerequisite courses. Please note that availability may be limited in some departments. Students may have the option to take courses from another Faculty; however, the majority of courses must be in the Faculty of Arts and Science.
As of 2026/2027AY, the following subjects are not available to incoming exchange students. The restrictions may apply to the entire subject or bot available for incoming exchange students (may apply to the entire subject or only the specific course):
History (at the 300-level and above)
Kinesiology and Health Studies (all levels)
Political Studies (at the 300-level and above)
Sociology (all levels)
These subjects are highly demanded at Queen’s, therefore courses have limited spaces:
Biology
Computing and Information Science
Economics
English and Creative Writing
Film and Media
Life Sciences (Microbiology, Neuroscience, Physiology)
Psychology
Students are not permitted to enroll in courses offered by the Faculty of Law. It is also challenging to secure courses in politics, computing science, drama and music, economics, and life science. Students may receive some courses but should not expect to take the bulk of courses in these disciplines.
Minimum academic workload per semester: 3 courses or 9 units of study
Adjusting to Canadian academics
All incoming exchange students are required to purchase the University Health Insurance Plan (UHIP) prior to course registration.
Estimated cost of living

GPA 達2.70分以上，請注意該校每個系所限制皆不同，欲選填該校作為交換志願者，務必「主動確認」是否符合該校系所的申請資格。

註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換學生資訊請見此連結、Fact Sheet及文宣
學士生及研究生有不同的申請資格及期限，欲選填該校交換的同學，請先確認自己是否符合該校規定，以及不開放選修科目：
Undergraduate students: Applications | Course Selection | Language Requirements | Course Restrictions
Postgraduate students: Applications | Course Selection | Language Requirements
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修至多1門大學部課程
The full-time course load is 5 courses per term (equivalent to 2.5 units) with a minimum of 3 courses per term (equivalent to 1.5 units). Most of our courses are assessed as a unit of 0.5 and are approximately 39 teaching hours per term. One undergraduate course at 0.5 units is equivalent to 6 European Credit Transfer and Accumulation System (ECTS). Details of specific unit weights and teaching hours per course are available via our undergraduate schedule of classes.
The majority of students' courses should be in Arts, Engineering, Environment, and Math.
Posrgraduate students can only take one (1) undergraduate course.
Effective Fall 2023, due to limited course capacity and high demand for computer science (CS) courses, exchange students will be restricted to enrolling in a maximum of two (2) computer science courses per term. This includes courses cross-listed with computer science.
Estimated cost of living: $5,300 - $9,700 per term in Canadian dollars.
Health Insurance

住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結

Housing is extremely limited (especially for fall) and is first come first served. We encourage students to start their search early and use the Off-Campus Housing Guide as a reference to support their search for a safe, comfortable place to call home.

GPA 達2.70分以上，請注意該校每個系所限制皆不同，欲選填該校作為交換志願者，務必「主動確認」是否符合該校系所的申請資格。
TOEFL iBT 90 (說 25 寫 25 不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.5 (聽 6.0 讀 6.0 寫 6.5 說 6.5)。
quota_text:
一學期2名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人，美洲區第二學期甄選皆為交換一學期)
calendar_text:
Fall Term: September - December
Winter Term: January - April
Spring Term: May - August （不開放交換學生申請）


✔ 該校年曆請參考此連結
✔ 註：交換一學年者為 Fall and Winter Term，上學期交換者為 Fall Term，下學期交換者為 Winter Term
notes_text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換學生資訊請見此連結、Fact Sheet及文宣
學士生及研究生有不同的申請資格及期限，欲選填該校交換的同學，請先確認自己是否符合該校規定，以及不開放選修科目：
Undergraduate students: Applications | Course Selection | Language Requirements | Course Restrictions
Postgraduate students: Applications | Course Selection | Language Requirements
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修至多1門大學部課程
The full-time course load is 5 courses per term (equivalent to 2.5 units) with a minimum of 3 courses per term (equivalent to 1.5 units). Most of our courses are assessed as a unit of 0.5 and are approximately 39 teaching hours per term. One undergraduate course at 0.5 units is equivalent to 6 European Credit Transfer and Accumulation System (ECTS). Details of specific unit weights and teaching hours per course are available via our undergraduate schedule of classes.
The majority of students' courses should be in Arts, Engineering, Environment, and Math.
Posrgraduate students can only take one (1) undergraduate course.
Effective Fall 2023, due to limited course capacity and high demand for computer science (CS) courses, exchange students will be restricted to enrolling in a maximum of two (2) computer science courses per term. This includes courses cross-listed with computer science.
Estimated cost of living: $5,300 - $9,700 per term in Canadian dollars.
Health Insurance
housing_text:
不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結

Housing is extremely limited (especially for fall) and is first come first served. We encourage students to start their search early and use the Off-Campus Housing Guide as a reference to support their search for a safe, comfortable place to call home.

Two academic references (a letter of support from your program supervisor is preferred, and one letter of support from a recent instructor)

Research proposal (only for those students planning to pursue research while at SFU)

Exchange to SFU Info Session.label: Exchange to SFU Info Session
Exchange to SFU Info Session.text:
Are you curious about studying abroad in Canada? We invite you to join an online info session to explore SFU as an exciting exchange/study abroad destination. By joining the session, you will learn what it's like to be an incoming exchange student at SFU, hear about academic and campus life, and ask any questions you may have. The session will be offered twice to accommodate different time zones. Both sessions will deliver the same presentation and students are welcome to register for whichever suits their schedule best.

We truly appreciate your support in advance for promoting the session to your students!

Location: Online via Zoom (link available upon registration)

Location: Online via Zoom (link available upon registration)

一般組
本校大一以上(僅限大學部)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
TOEFL iBT 86 (寫 22 不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.5 (寫 6.5)。
不接受醫學院、管理學院之學生申請。
法律學院，需符合下列成績標準：
TOEFL iBT 100 (寫 24 不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 7.0 (寫 6.5)。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生資訊請參考此連結及Fact Sheet（僅供參考）、課程資訊請參考此連結
Graduate students have additional documents to supply as well as different language requirements. They can consult the page here.
All uOttawa Faculties and Departments are open to exchange students except the Faculty of Medicine, the Faculty of Education and the Telfer School of Management (course codes ADM, MGT or MBA). Mandatory courses in some programs may be reserved for University of Ottawa students, and visiting international students are not eligible to take them.
Minimum academic workload per semester: 12 units (4 courses) for undergraduate, 6 units (2 courses) for graduate 
Graduate course limit: Students accepted in a grad-level exchange program may take at most three (3) courses (5000 - 6000 level) per term. However, they may register for three (3) grad-level courses and one (1) undergrad-level course. Therefore, a maximum of four (4) courses per term, with a minimum of three (3) grad-level courses.
Law Exchange: Please note that the Juris Doctor program is part of the University of Ottawa’s undergraduate-level programs (course codes CML 1000 -4000). Graduate students interested in studying at the same level must select courses from our Master of Law programs (course codes DCL 5000 – 6000).
Faculty of Law, Common Law applicants must have:
an overall score of 100 and a written score of 24 on the TOEFL test; or
an overall score of 7 and a written score of 6.5 on the IELTS test
Exchange students can register in English as a Second Language (ESL) and French as a Second Language (FLS) courses at no extra cost. It is possible to take both an ESL and an FLS course. Registration in selected ESL or FLS courses is determined by an online language placement test.
Insurance: UHIP health insurance is mandatory for all exchange students; no exception will be considered.
Estimated cost of living

Exchange students can register in English as a Second Language (ESL) and French as a Second Language (FLS) courses at no extra cost. It is possible to take both an ESL and an FLS course. Registration in selected ESL or FLS courses is determined by an online language placement test.
Insurance: UHIP health insurance is mandatory for all exchange students; no exception will be considered.
Estimated cost of living

Graduate students have additional documents to supply as well as different language requirements. They can consult the page here.
All uOttawa Faculties and Departments are open to exchange students except the Faculty of Medicine, the Faculty of Education and the Telfer School of Management (course codes ADM, MGT or MBA). Mandatory courses in some programs may be reserved for University of Ottawa students, and visiting international students are not eligible to take them.
Minimum academic workload per semester: 12 units (4 courses) for undergraduate, 6 units (2 courses) for graduate 
Graduate course limit: Students accepted in a grad-level exchange program may take at most three (3) courses (5000 - 6000 level) per term. However, they may register for three (3) grad-level courses and one (1) undergrad-level course. Therefore, a maximum of four (4) courses per term, with a minimum of three (3) grad-level courses.
Law Exchange: Please note that the Juris Doctor program is part of the University of Ottawa’s undergraduate-level programs (course codes CML 1000 -4000). Graduate students interested in studying at the same level must select courses from our Master of Law programs (course codes DCL 5000 – 6000).
Faculty of Law, Common Law applicants must have:
an overall score of 100 and a written score of 24 on the TOEFL test; or
an overall score of 7 and a written score of 6.5 on the IELTS test
Exchange students can register in English as a Second Language (ESL) and French as a Second Language (FLS) courses at no extra cost. It is possible to take both an ESL and an FLS course. Registration in selected ESL or FLS courses is determined by an online language placement test.
Insurance: UHIP health insurance is mandatory for all exchange students; no exception will be considered.
Estimated cost of living

At UVic, the International Centre for Students (ICS) operates an exchange program for the Faculties of Humanities, Science and Social Sciences, while the School of Business and Faculty of Law operate separate exchange programs.
Inbound ICS exchange students are restricted from enrolling in any courses in the following departments:
Civil Engineering (CIVE)
Law (LAW) 
Limited courses are available to inbound ICS exchange students in the following departments: 
Business 
Education 
Human and Social Development 
Fine Arts 
Engineering (Software, Mechanical, Computer, Biomedical, Electrical)
Minimum Course Registration Requirement: Exchange students living in on-campus housing must be registered in a minimum of 4.5 UVic units per term.
Cost of living: varies each year (approx. $1200/month for housing and food)
Insurance: All UVic students are required to have comprehensive coverage for the entire duration of their studies.
Why UVic is the place to go on exchange

links.text: Why UVic is the place to go on exchange

Supports for Students with Disabilities.label: Supports for Students with Disabilities at UVic
Supports for Students with Disabilities.text: At UVic, we have a Centre for Accessible Learning (CAL), which supports students with disabilities and chronic health conditions to reduce educational barriers through accessibility and programming. CAL provides resources for instructors to create an inclusive and accessible learning environment. Students can complete their pre-intake form once they are admitted to study at UVic. To consult about supports and accommodations prior to admission, students can contact our Exchange team at goglobal@uvic.ca.

name_zh: 加拿大英屬哥倫比亞大學（卑詩大學）
name_zh_detail: 加拿大英屬哥倫比亞大學（卑詩大學）

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。
GPA 達3.30分以上，請注意該校每個系所限制皆不同，欲選填該校作為交換志願者，務必「主動確認」是否符合該校系所的申請資格。
TOEFL iBT 90 (讀 22 聽 22 說 21 寫 21 不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.5 (聽 6.0 讀 6.0 寫 6.0 說 6.0)。
不接受社會科學院新聞研究所、醫學院、法律學院、工學院、管理學院會計學研究所、管理學院財務金融學研究所、管理學院國際企業學研究所、管理學院資訊管理學研究所、管理學院商學研究所、管理學院管理學院企業管理碩士專班、理學院心理學研究所、社會科學院政治學研究所、文學院人類學研究所、社會科學院經濟學研究所之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期2名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人，美洲區第二學期甄選皆為交換一學期)

⚠️重要公告.label: ⚠️重要公告
⚠️重要公告.text: 根據加拿大政府公告，自2024/2025年度起將限縮學生簽證（Study Permit）數，將影響期長為一學年之交換學生計畫，交換期長為一學期者因無需辦理學生簽證，暫不受到影響，敬請留意

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Vancouver 校區：UBC Vancouver Academic Calendar

Okanagan 校區：UBC Okanagan Academic Calendar


Term 1: September - December
Term 2: January - April

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收 
交換生資訊請參考此連結及Fact Sheet、課程資訊：選課資訊、課程內容
本交換計畫開放申請該校多個校區，校內甄選無須選擇校區
請注意該校每個系所限制皆不同，欲選填該校交換的同學，務必確認自己是否符合該校系所的申請資格：請參考此連結
選課時，請務必遵照該校信件及網站中的指示進行選課
Many graduate programs at UBC require higher Test of English as a Foreign Language (TOEFL) scores. If you are applying for graduate studies, please ensure that you meet the TOEFL scores listed.
Minimum course load requirements: 9 credits per term (usually 3 courses)
Taking graduate-level courses: If you want to take graduate-level courses, you must get permission from instructors and are required to complete the Enrolment of Undergraduate Exchange Students in Graduate Courses form after arrival. For details, please see the Graduate Studies restrictions page.
Faculties or Schools Not Open to Exchange Students:
School of Audiology and Speech Sciences
School of Journalism
Faculty of Medicine
School of Nursing
Faculty of Pharmaceutical Sciences
School of Rehabilitation Sciences
UBC Vantage College
Peter A. Allard School of Law (only open to exchange students coming to UBC through Law-specific exchange agreements) 
At UBC, any course numbered 500 or above is considered a graduate-level course. While there are many programs that are available, some have limited enrolment are and restricted. Graduate programs NOT open to Go Global exchange and visiting students include:
Commerce and Business Administration (e.g. MBA)
Data Science
Political Science
Economics
Counseling Psychology
Anthropology
Psychology
Community and Regional Planning
Faculty-Specific Restrictions: Some faculties and departments have course restrictions for exchange and visiting students. See here for details on course restrictions by faculty.
University-wide e​​​​xchange students not admitted to the Sauder School of Business (e.g., admitted to Faculty of Arts or Faculty of Science) may request to take commerce courses, but enrolment is limited and not guaranteed. For more information, please see our page on studying commerce at UBC on exchange.
Courses at the graduate level (500 and 600) are not available (e.g., Business Administration, EMBA courses)
BUSI and COEC courses are not available
COMM 101, 202, 271, 311, 466, 483, and dual degree courses (COMM 120, 126, 220, 320, 321, 420, and 421) are not available
Limited enrolment in some 200-level (second year) courses
The following are COMR courses for non-commerce majors: COMR 100, 280, 329, 398, 457, 458, 465, 473, and 493
Engineering: Priority access to Faculty of Applied Science (Engineering) courses will be given to students coming to UBC under Coordinated International Experience (CIE) or engineering-specific agreements. Only students pursuing a degree in engineering at their home university should be nominated to the Faculty of Applied Science at UBC. Engineering course registration often takes place at a later date than other registrations. 
UBC's Centre for Accessibility facilitates disability-related accommodations (such as alternate format materials, assistive technology, extra time allowance on an exam, etc.) designed to remove barriers for students with disabilities and ongoing medical conditions. To request an accommodation, students must register with the Centre for Accessibility first.
Costs Associated:
UPass: $170 per term
Medical Insurance:
Please note that students will be automatically enrolled in the mandatory UBC iMED health insurance and will NOT be able to opt out even if they have coverage from their home country. For more information, please refer to here.
Single-term exchange: The cost is $315 CAD per term plus a $9.94 direct billing fee for iMED.  If you are a single-term exchange student, iMED will cover you for the duration of your stay (approximately four months and one week).
Full-year exchange: The cost is $225 CAD plus a $9.94 direct billing fee for iMED. The cost covers the three-month waiting period for the British Columbia Medical Services Plan (MSP). Students on exchange for six months or longer are required to apply for MSP. The MSP plan costs $75 CAD per month. The total cost of health insurance for Full-year exchange students is $609.94 CAD.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，Vancouver校區住宿資訊請參閱此連結、Okanagan校區請參閱此連結

Go Global exchange students have priority access to on-campus housing through UBC Vancouver Student Housing. For details about on-campus housing including residences and fees, please visit the UBC Vancouver Student Housing website.

Please read this carefully before submitting your housing application.  

Although exchange students have priority access through dedicated spots for Go Global students, on-campus housing is NOT guaranteed due to high demand and limited space. Only 50-60% of students will receive an on-campus housing offer.
Only students who submit the online housing application by the deadline will be considered for a spot, determined by random lottery.
Students with mobility-related disabilities and chronic medical conditions who have special housing needs should check the UBC Centre for Accessibility website to see whether they meet criteria for priority housing and apply by the stated deadlines. 
We strongly advise students to prepare a back-up plan for housing due to limited space. For other housing resources, including off-campus options, check the UBC Vancouver Housing Information Packet 2024/25 (PDF).

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。

欲選填該校為志願的同學，請務必先行詳閱系所限制，自行評估是否符合該校規定：Restricted programs of Study（Áreas de estudio restringidas部分）
Medicine, Health sciences, and Nursing students may come, but those faculties are closed for exchange students. They may take elective courses only.
Credits of a curricular activity
All exchange students need to purchase full coverage international health insurance in their countries of origin before coming to Chile. 
International students must have a good command of the Spanish language. Those who are not native Spanish speakers must meet the accredited B2 level language requirement (according to CEFR) (present a DELE, SIELE certificate or a letter from the Spanish department of the university of origin accrediting the B2 level).
Summer schools, internship are also available and open for exchange programs.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿。



The University does not have any type of student dormitories or residencies nor coordinates housing for international students.

簽證資訊.label: 簽證資訊
簽證資訊.text:
Please be aware of our disposition at UC Chile regarding the migratory procedures which must be carried out by students in mobility to Chile, in accordance with the new Chilean migratory law (Ley No. 21,325). 
 

Those students coming to Chile for a period of less than 180 days may enter the country under a permit called 'Permiso de Permanencia Transitoria', which is granted automatically* when you enter the country. It is applicable to short stays including tourism and study purposes, among others. It has a duration of 90 days and it is renewable for an additional 90-day period by lodging a visa extension (prórroga de Permanencia Transitoria).
Important: Citizens from some countries are required to apply beforehand for the ´Permiso de Permanencia Transitoria: Check first the column 'REQ. VISTUR' at this link and if you are subject to apply for this permit you can lodge your application following the instructions contained at the Official Website from The Chilean Ministry of Foreign Affairs, 'Servicios Consulares' (in Spanish).
Those students coming to Chile for a period longer than 180 days must apply for a Temporary Visa (Residencia Temporal, under subclass 'student') through the Official Website of the Chilean National Migration Service.

Pre-requirements: Students are responsible for choosing the courses according to the necessary requirements. If the student does not meet the criteria needed, he/she should not ask to be enrolled in the class.
School of Medicine is not open to exchange students.
Most of our classes are taught in Spanish. Therefore, a B2 Spanish level is required. 
Recommended workload:
Undergraduate: Students should register a minimum of 9 credits and a maximum of 20 credits. Students should follow the minimum requirements of their home University. 
Master's: Students should register minimum 8 credits and maximum 18 credits. Students should follow the requirements of their home University. 1 credit equals 48 hours of course work (in and out of class).
It is important to remember that the ratio of class room work vs individual work is 1 to 3 for master students and 1 to 2 for undergraduate students.
Cost of Living Information (5-month stay in Bogotá, currency: COP)
Room: $ 6,500,000 - $ 13,500,000
Board: $ 3,500,000 - $ 4,700,000
Installation budget: $ 1,500,000
Transportation: $ 3,100,000
Others: $ 2,500,000
Total: $ 17,100,000 - $ 25,300,000
Students must have an international travel and health insurance with a wide health and dental coverage. This is mandatory for all exchange students.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，更多資訊請參考此連結

Universidad de los Andes does not offer on-campus housing services. However, the Uniandes housing team provides housing services in our allied residences, ensuring a safe and comfortable environment. These furnished apartments include internet service, cable TV, a kitchen, and common areas.

交換生資訊、課程資訊請參考Fact Sheet、Find Your Campus Across Mexico Guide及此連結
語言課程資訊請參考此連結
本交換計畫開放申請該校多個校區，校內甄選無須選擇校區
甄選錄取報到後，填寫該校交換計畫申請表時，需填選志願校區，學生不得要求更換校區分發結果。請注意，志願選填僅供校方參考，並不保障一定錄取第一志願。若錄取校區不符預期，NTU Study Abroad無法向該校提出協調，請留意
請注意，部分系所不接受交換生申請，同學需自行至欲申請校區之網站查詢，NTU Study Abroad 不負責協助系所審查。Not all 47 disciplines are available at all campuses. 
Starting in 2026, Campus Puebla will join as an international campus, and Campus Santa Fe will expand its exchange programs to all academic areas, offering you more options than ever before.
Master's or PhD students are NOT allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units.
Minimum academic workload per semester: 16 Tec units  (8 ITESM units = 3 USA credits = 5 ECTS)
Students must also have flexibility about the campus of preference since we have a limited number of admissions per campus. There is little variety of courses in English per discipline.
Tecnológico de Monterrey requires all international students to have an international health insurance with specific coverages and amounts during their stay. SURA created a policy that covers and exceeds all our minimum requirements.

links.text: Find Your Campus Across Mexico Guide

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結


Each campus has different accommodation options. Please note that not all the options are available at all campuses and the cost for each varies from city to city.
 

Host Family Program: Live with a Mexican family and learn about our culture and traditions while experiencing the Mexican hospitality Each family will provide a unique experience.
Off-Campus: accommodation List of independent options around campus, ranging from rooms to complete houses. All arrangements must be handled by the students.
On-Campus Residence: Halls Residences managed by Tecnológico de Monterrey providing a suitable environment for national & international students.

sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收

語言課程資訊請參考此連結
本交換計畫開放申請該校多個校區，校內甄選無須選擇校區
甄選錄取報到後，填寫該校交換計畫申請表時，需填選志願校區，學生不得要求更換校區分發結果。請注意，志願選填僅供校方參考，並不保障一定錄取第一志願。若錄取校區不符預期，NTU Study Abroad無法向該校提出協調，請留意
請注意，部分系所不接受交換生申請，同學需自行至欲申請校區之網站查詢，NTU Study Abroad 不負責協助系所審查。Not all 47 disciplines are available at all campuses. 
Starting in 2026, Campus Puebla will join as an international campus, and Campus Santa Fe will expand its exchange programs to all academic areas, offering you more options than ever before.
Master's or PhD students are NOT allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units.
Minimum academic workload per semester: 16 Tec units  (8 ITESM units = 3 USA credits = 5 ECTS)
Students must also have flexibility about the campus of preference since we have a limited number of admissions per campus. There is little variety of courses in English per discipline.
Tecnológico de Monterrey requires all international students to have an international health insurance with specific coverages and amounts during their stay. SURA created a policy that covers and exceeds all our minimum requirements.

Each campus has different accommodation options. Please note that not all the options are available at all campuses and the cost for each varies from city to city.
 

Host Family Program: Live with a Mexican family and learn about our culture and traditions while experiencing the Mexican hospitality Each family will provide a unique experience.
Off-Campus: accommodation List of independent options around campus, ranging from rooms to complete houses. All arrangements must be handled by the students.
On-Campus Residence: Halls Residences managed by Tecnológico de Monterrey providing a suitable environment for national & international students.

西語組
本校大一以上(僅限大學部)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。
GPA 達3.70分以上，該校各系所之交換入學申請，尚有許多附加條件，請欲選擇至該校交換的同學，於選填志願前務必至該校網站查詢。
具西班牙語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上，SIELE (Global or S5) 或 DELE B2（含）以上。
不接受醫學院、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學系之學生申請。

交換生資訊請參考此連結及Fact Sheet、課程資訊請參考此連結、語言課程資訊請參考此連結
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程。
Students must have completed the credits and completed at least two years of studies at the time of their application.
Area of study OPEN for exchange students: 
Physics, Mathematics and Engineering 
Biological Sciences and Health 
Social Sciences 
Humanities and Arts
Area of study NOT available for exchange students: Some areas in Medicine and in Veterinary Medicine.
該校各系所之交換入學申請，尚有許多附加條件，請欲選擇至該校交換的同學，於選填志願前，務必先至Requisitos Especiales de Escuelas y Facultades (Procedure and Schools specific requirements) 查詢各系所限制。
Spanish is the primary language of instruction. However, there are some courses offered in English.
No changes of campus or faculties are permitted once that acceptance letter has been issued.
Medical and Travel Insurance Policy is mandatory for each student and must be contracted before travelling to Mexico.
Approximate living costs per month (USD):
Accommodation: $175 to $500
Food: $300 to $450
Public transportation: $40 to $60
Study material: Varies depending on study area
Leisure and other expenses: $80 to $160 depending on the student

交換學生資訊請參考此連結、課程資訊請參考此連結、語言課程資訊請參考此連結
As long as prerequisites are met, and courses are open, exchange students have full access to undergraduate courses in the Weinberg College of Arts and Sciences and McCormick School of Engineering and Applied Science. Courses from other undergraduate schools may be available on a case-by-case basis. 
Courses in the following departments and schools are not open to exchange students:
Integrated Marketing Communications (Medill)
Kellogg School of Management
Pritzker School of Law
Feinberg School of Medicine
Bienen School of Music
The Graduate School: Although exchange students are admitted to Northwestern as undergraduates, they may have limited access to graduate courses in special circumstances, assuming prerequisites are met. In general, you should avoid choosing courses at the 400-level (i.e., course numbers of 4XX), since these are graduate courses.
Undergraduate students at Northwestern typically take 3 or 4 courses per quarter in a variety of subjects. Most courses at Northwestern are worth 1 unit of credit and meet for three hours per week over the 10-week quarter. Some classes have additional laboratory or discussion sections.
International exchange students must maintain full-time enrollment, which is defined as three or more credits per quarter. It is not recommended that exchange students take five classes, what is considered at Northwestern to be an overload, given various demands and priorities on and off campus.
As an exchange student, you do not pay tuition to Northwestern. However, you will be billed for on-campus room and board (if you live on campus) and mandatory NU-SHIP health insurance. You will also need to budget for textbooks, visa fees, and personal expenses. For details on costs, billing, and payments, visit the exchange student Money Matters section.

links.text: Weinberg College of Arts and Sciences
McCormick School of Engineering and Applied Science

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，更多資訊請見此連結

On-Campus Housing
If there is space available, undergraduate exchange students have the option to live in residence halls, residential colleges, residential communities, or special-interest housing. Consult the Residential Services site for information about on-campus undergraduate housing options. Moving forward to 2026/2027AY and beyond, Northwestern will no longer be able to guarantee on-campus housing for full-year students.
Off-Campus Housing
Students also have the option of living in an apartment or shared house in the Evanston or Chicago area. Consult off-campus life resources.

sections_ordered.label: 註冊繳費
sections_ordered.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

sections_ordered.label: 注意事項
sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收 
交換學生資訊請參考此連結、課程資訊請參考此連結、語言課程資訊請參考此連結
As long as prerequisites are met, and courses are open, exchange students have full access to undergraduate courses in the Weinberg College of Arts and Sciences and McCormick School of Engineering and Applied Science. Courses from other undergraduate schools may be available on a case-by-case basis. 
Courses in the following departments and schools are not open to exchange students:
Integrated Marketing Communications (Medill)
Kellogg School of Management
Pritzker School of Law
Feinberg School of Medicine
Bienen School of Music
The Graduate School: Although exchange students are admitted to Northwestern as undergraduates, they may have limited access to graduate courses in special circumstances, assuming prerequisites are met. In general, you should avoid choosing courses at the 400-level (i.e., course numbers of 4XX), since these are graduate courses.
Undergraduate students at Northwestern typically take 3 or 4 courses per quarter in a variety of subjects. Most courses at Northwestern are worth 1 unit of credit and meet for three hours per week over the 10-week quarter. Some classes have additional laboratory or discussion sections.
International exchange students must maintain full-time enrollment, which is defined as three or more credits per quarter. It is not recommended that exchange students take five classes, what is considered at Northwestern to be an overload, given various demands and priorities on and off campus.
As an exchange student, you do not pay tuition to Northwestern. However, you will be billed for on-campus room and board (if you live on campus) and mandatory NU-SHIP health insurance. You will also need to budget for textbooks, visa fees, and personal expenses. For details on costs, billing, and payments, visit the exchange student Money Matters section.

links.text: Weinberg College of Arts and Sciences
McCormick School of Engineering and Applied Science

sections_ordered.label: 住宿資訊
sections_ordered.text:
不保證住宿，更多資訊請見此連結

On-Campus Housing
If there is space available, undergraduate exchange students have the option to live in residence halls, residential colleges, residential communities, or special-interest housing. Consult the Residential Services site for information about on-campus undergraduate housing options. Moving forward to 2026/2027AY and beyond, Northwestern will no longer be able to guarantee on-campus housing for full-year students.
Off-Campus Housing
Students also have the option of living in an apartment or shared house in the Evanston or Chicago area. Consult off-campus life resources.

歷年不得有不及格／不通過科目。
GPA 達3.30分以上，該校Computer Science為不保證錄取科目，另外該校每個系所限制皆不同，欲選填該校作為交換志願者，務必「主動確認」是否符合該校系所的申請資格。
TOEFL iBT 90 (不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 7.0。
不接受醫學院、管理學院、法律學院之學生申請。

交換學生資訊請參考此連結、此連結及Fact Sheet、課程資訊請參考此連結
申請前請先閱讀Understanding Fees for Exchange Students
Students who participate in the general exchange may select a major and take courses in the following UT Colleges and Schools:
Cockrell School of Engineering
Jackson School of Geosciences
College of Education
Moody College of Communication
College of Fine Arts
Steve Hicks School of Social Work
College of Liberal Arts
School of Undergraduate Studies
College of Natural Sciences
Academic Restrictions:
Students admitted to the general or engineering exchange program may not enroll in business (see exception below) or law courses. To take courses in business or law, you must be admitted to the McCombs School of Business (M.B.A. or B.B.A.) or Law School exchange programs.
The Computer Science program can only accommodate a limited number of exchange students. Students are welcome to apply to the program, but admission is not guaranteed and is subject to departmental review. Students accepted as Computer Science majors will be able to take no more than two Computer Science courses per semester. Students who are not admitted to the Computer Science major will not be allowed to enroll in Computer Science courses.
The following programs are NOT open to exchange students:
Dell Medical School
Option III Programs
School of Information (iSchool)
Students who wish to attend the general exchange program in one of the following restricted majors will be initially admitted as an “undeclared” major. Once you have submitted all required admission materials, an Academic Advisor in the respective department will review your application, contact you directly if addition application materials are needed, and determine if admission to the major is possible.
Computer Science (College of Natural Sciences)
All Architecture Majors (School of Architecture)
All Communication Majors (College of Communication)
All Fine Arts Majors, except Art History (College of Fine Arts)
All Music Majors (Butler School of Music)
There are a limited number of courses for non-business majors that are open to students participating in the general exchange program.
Undergraduate students must enroll in a minimum of 12 credits per semester during the academic year.
Living expenses can vary from $1,600 to $2,000 per month depending on individual lifestyle.
Health Insurance: All reciprocal exchange students and any accompanying dependents (spouse/children) are required to have health insurance that meets both the U.S. Department of State and The University of Texas at Austin requirements. Enrollment in the UT Austin insurance plan is mandatory. Cost is approximately $1,500 USD per semester (subject to change).

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，更多資訊請參考此連結。

Exchange students attending UT Austin usually choose from three types of housing: co-operative houses (co-ops), private dormitories, and apart-ments. Space in UT-owned dorms is available, but limited.

Spring Semester: January - May

註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收 
交換學生資訊請參考此連結、此連結及Fact Sheet；課程資訊請參考此連結
Academic Restrictions:
Graduate programs, and Cornell University degree/certificate programs outside Ithaca, NY are not open to university-wide exchanges.
Exchange students are unable to take courses in Computer Science (CS) and Information Science. Related subjects may be found in other departments (Electrical and Computer Engineering; Information Science, Systems, and Technology; or Operations Research and Information Engineering).
While business classes are available, they are restricted and can be difficult to get into.
Studio classes (architecture, art, design, and fashion) are typically not available to students through general exchange agreements. 
Courses associated with professional graduate degree programs (MBA, MEng, MPS, MPH, etc.) are not available to non-degree students; in general, students should not expect to take graduate (MA, MS, PhD) courses.
Senior capstone courses as well as first year writing seminars are not available to exchange students.
Graduate degree programs and professional colleges and schools (Law, Veterinary Medicine, SC Johnson College of Business, Cornell Tech, Weill Cornell Medical School) are not included in university-wide or undergraduate college-specific exchange agreements.
Students must enroll in a minimum of 12 credits per semester during the academic year. Most exchange students enroll in 14-16 credits per semester. Exceeding 16 credits is not recommended.
Students entering Cornell for a full academic or calendar year are expected to maintain good academic standing. Good academic standing for incoming exchange and visiting students is defined as:
Earn a term GPA of 2.0 or higher in their first term at Cornell.
Successfully completing a minimum of 12 academic credits. To complete course credits, students must receive a letter grade of “D-” or higher, OR an “S” in a class taken S/U.
Failure to maintain good academic standing for your first term at Cornell will result in dismissal from the program.
All students are enrolled in Cornell's Student Health Insurance. This is mandatory and cannot be waived by international students unless they are covered by an acceptable U.S. employer-based health insurance plan.
生活費資訊請參考此連結

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，詳情請參閱以下資訊：

Students are welcome to apply for on-campus housing regardless of the term they are attending Cornell; however, be aware that on-campus housing is limited and not guaranteed.



Fall semester: Finding housing can be very challenging. On-campus housing is not available, and single-semester leases within commuting distance are difficult to secure.
Spring semester: Housing may be available on-campus and is generally easy to find off-campus.
Academic year: Off-campus only

Note: Upon nomination to Cornell we encourage students to begin searching for housing. However, students should not commit to housing (financially or otherwise) until they have received admission notification from Cornell and have secured a visa appointment.

歷年不得有不及格／不通過科目。
GPA 達3.30分以上。
TOEFL iBT 100 (不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 7.5。
不接受管理學院、電機資訊學院、醫學院、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學系、法律學院之學生申請。

sections_ordered.label: 注意事項
sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收 
交換學生資訊請參考此連結、此連結及Fact Sheet；課程資訊請參考此連結
Academic Restrictions:
Graduate programs, and Cornell University degree/certificate programs outside Ithaca, NY are not open to university-wide exchanges.
Exchange students are unable to take courses in Computer Science (CS) and Information Science. Related subjects may be found in other departments (Electrical and Computer Engineering; Information Science, Systems, and Technology; or Operations Research and Information Engineering).
While business classes are available, they are restricted and can be difficult to get into.
Studio classes (architecture, art, design, and fashion) are typically not available to students through general exchange agreements. 
Courses associated with professional graduate degree programs (MBA, MEng, MPS, MPH, etc.) are not available to non-degree students; in general, students should not expect to take graduate (MA, MS, PhD) courses.
Senior capstone courses as well as first year writing seminars are not available to exchange students.
Graduate degree programs and professional colleges and schools (Law, Veterinary Medicine, SC Johnson College of Business, Cornell Tech, Weill Cornell Medical School) are not included in university-wide or undergraduate college-specific exchange agreements.
Students must enroll in a minimum of 12 credits per semester during the academic year. Most exchange students enroll in 14-16 credits per semester. Exceeding 16 credits is not recommended.
Students entering Cornell for a full academic or calendar year are expected to maintain good academic standing. Good academic standing for incoming exchange and visiting students is defined as:
Earn a term GPA of 2.0 or higher in their first term at Cornell.
Successfully completing a minimum of 12 academic credits. To complete course credits, students must receive a letter grade of “D-” or higher, OR an “S” in a class taken S/U.
Failure to maintain good academic standing for your first term at Cornell will result in dismissal from the program.
All students are enrolled in Cornell's Student Health Insurance. This is mandatory and cannot be waived by international students unless they are covered by an acceptable U.S. employer-based health insurance plan.
生活費資訊請參考此連結

交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生資訊請參考此連結
課程資訊請參考此連結
Exchanges are available for any of Scranton’s 66 undergraduate disciplines except the Nursing, Physical Therapy and Occupational Therapy programs.
Minimum academic workload per semester: 12 credit hours per semester (approx. 4 courses)
Health Insurance (mandatory): All exchange students are required to purchase a University of Scranton health insurance policy (Geoblue) for the duration of their stay at the University. The cost of insurance is approximately $125 per month which will be automatically charged to your University account.
Meningitis Immunization (mandatory): ALL students attending The University of Scranton must show proof of meningitis immunization. If you do not have the necessary documentation, or have not been immunized against meningitis, you must go to the Student Health Center upon arrival for this immunization. The health insurance which we will be purchasing, will not cover immunization, therefore, we recommend that you get your immunization at your home country.
Estimated Costs Per Semester (Subject to change): $11,000 
Room: $5,203
Board (meals): $2,686-$3,180
Books: $900
Health Insurance: $500.00
Miscellaneous/Personal Expenses: $1,000

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結
 

On-Campus Housing: ALL students participating in The University of Scranton Student Exchange Program must reside on campus as assigned/selected. Exchange students are not allowed to live off campus. The Residence Life office will arrange your University of Scranton housing.
Meal Plans: ALL students are required to purchase a meal plan if assigned to a dorm or apartment without a full kitchen.

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一以上/碩二(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。選填志願前，請務必至該校網站確認開放及不開放交換學生選修之系所。
GPA 達2.75分以上。
TOEFL iBT 80 (不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.5。
不接受電機資訊學院電機工程學研究所、理學院心理學研究所、醫學院護理學系之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期1名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人，美洲區第二學期甄選皆為交換一學期)

學校年曆.text:
Fall Semester: August - December
Spring Semester: January - May

 

✔ 該校年曆請參考此連結

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換學生資訊請參考此連結、Fact Sheet請參考此連結（僅供參考）、課程資訊請參考此連結
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程。
Departments not available to exchange students: Anthropology, Communication Sciences and Disorders, Math, Nursing, Liberal Studies, Counseling and Educational Development, Elementary Education, Middle Grades Education, Speech Pathology & Audiology, graduate level courses in Accounting, graduate level courses in the English Department, graduate level courses in Psychology, graduate level Consumer, Apparel, and Retail Studies, Graduate Level courses in Political Science, Graduate level courses in Computer Science, graduate level courses in Accounting
For students wishing for some graduate level accounting classes, we take them on a case-by-case basis and recommend students to be nominated for MBA track.
Master's students are required to provide 2 letters of recommendation and a personal statement with their application.
Minimum academic workload per semester:
Undergraduate: 12 cerdits
Graduates: 9 credits
Master's students are allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units
Health Care and Mandatory Insurance: You are required to have medical insurance in effect for the duration of your program. Your acceptance packet will contain detailed information about waiving and enrolling. 
Estimated Cost of living: 8,000 USD per semester

eligibility_text:
一般組
本校大一以上/碩二(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。選填志願前，請務必至該校網站確認開放及不開放交換學生選修之系所。
GPA 達2.75分以上。
TOEFL iBT 80 (不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.5。
不接受電機資訊學院電機工程學研究所、理學院心理學研究所、醫學院護理學系之學生申請。
quota_text:
一學期1名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人，美洲區第二學期甄選皆為交換一學期)
calendar_text:
Fall Semester: August - December
Spring Semester: January - May

 

✔ 該校年曆請參考此連結
notes_text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換學生資訊請參考此連結、Fact Sheet請參考此連結（僅供參考）、課程資訊請參考此連結
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程。
Departments not available to exchange students: Anthropology, Communication Sciences and Disorders, Math, Nursing, Liberal Studies, Counseling and Educational Development, Elementary Education, Middle Grades Education, Speech Pathology & Audiology, graduate level courses in Accounting, graduate level courses in the English Department, graduate level courses in Psychology, graduate level Consumer, Apparel, and Retail Studies, Graduate Level courses in Political Science, Graduate level courses in Computer Science, graduate level courses in Accounting
For students wishing for some graduate level accounting classes, we take them on a case-by-case basis and recommend students to be nominated for MBA track.
Master's students are required to provide 2 letters of recommendation and a personal statement with their application.
Minimum academic workload per semester:
Undergraduate: 12 cerdits
Graduates: 9 credits
Master's students are allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units
Health Care and Mandatory Insurance: You are required to have medical insurance in effect for the duration of your program. Your acceptance packet will contain detailed information about waiving and enrolling. 
Estimated Cost of living: 8,000 USD per semester
housing_text: 保證校內住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一以上(僅限大學部)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。
研究生 GPA 達2.75分以上。
學士生 TOEFL iBT 80 (讀 16 聽 16 說 16 寫 16 不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.5；
研究生 TOEFL iBT 80 (讀 18 聽 18 說 18 寫 18 不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.5；。
不接受管理學院管理學院企業管理碩士專班之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期1名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人，美洲區第二學期甄選皆為交換一學期)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Fall Term: September - December
Winter Term: January - March
Spring Term: March - June

✔ 該校年曆請參考此連結

✔ 交換一學年者為Fall Term, Winter Term及Spring Term，第1學期交換者為Fall Term only，第2學期交換者為Spring Term only

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換學生資訊請參考此連結
課程資訊：Look up courses by term in the OSU Schedule of Classes or review the archived schedules from past years. Find more detailed course information in the General Catalog.
Master and PhD students: Students have to have received their bachelor's degree (or equivalent) before the OSU Graduate School will allow them to register for classes. They can be accepted while waiting for the official degree document, but they cannot register unless it is submitted first. 
Minimum academic workload per term: 
Undergraduate: 12 credits
Graduate: 9 credits 
For Master's or PhD students, they are allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units
Some departments are more competitive than others so classes can fill up fast. Students should have adequate back up class options in many academic subjects if possible. MBA program is not available to exchange students. Students cannot take any course that awards a degree or certificate at completion.
There are several academic subjects across campus that are popular or limited in size and are therefore difficult to place into classes. Students should have many alternative class options just in case their preferred classes are not available.
Certificate programs are not open to exchange students. Our design program in the College of Business is also not open to exchange students because it is so small. Some classes might be unavailable if graduating degree seeking students are prioritized because they can fill quickly.
Students can take language classes at OSU, but not as a way to strengthen their academic English (there is a program with academic English classes, but it its classes are not covered by the tuition waiver).
Insurance Information
Estimated Costs

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: 不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結

交換生資訊請參考此連結及Fact Sheet
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課。
As an exchange student you will be able to enroll in courses at the Storrs campus of the following areas of study:
Schools and Colleges of Agriculture & Natural Resources- Engineering
Liberal Arts & Sciences
Business (courses are restricted to Business majors only)
Limited course availability: Fine Arts, Statistics and Psychology
Areas of Study Not Available: School of Education (EDCI, EGEN, EPSY, EDLR, EKIN), School of Nursing (NURS), School of Pharmacy (PHRX, PHAR, PHRM), School of Law (LAW) and Military Science (MISI)
課程資訊請參考此連結
Course Load:
Minimum: 12 credits (undergraduate) 9 credits (graduate)
Maximum: 17 credits (no more than 5 courses)
 Course Registration:
Students are required to submit their course preferences as part of the online application process.
Upper-division courses (3000 level and above) require evidence of pre-requisites.
Online course registration is not available for exchange students.
Medical Insurance: It is mandatory for all exchange students to have personal medical Insurance that meets all J-1 visa requirements.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結


On-campus housing is guaranteed for all exchange students that complete the online housing application by the due date.
 

We recommend that all exchange students live on campus in residence halls. On-campus living is an important part of American university life, and by living on campus, you become an active member of the UConn community and have access to all the social, recreational, and cultural events that take place.
 

All dorm rooms are equipped with a bed, a mattress, a desk and chair, and a closet. In small units, doubles are 154 sq. ft. (11×14). Elsewhere, double rooms range in size up to 180 sq. ft. Most undergraduate dormitory rooms share bathroom facilities with other residents on the floor. Refrigerators, microwaves and televisions are not provided in dorm rooms.
 

Traditional Housing – Shared bedrooms with convenient access to dining halls and campus facilities. A campus meal plan is required.
Suites – Shared bedrooms, often with shared living spaces, with convenient access to dining halls and campus facilities. A campus meal plan is required.
Apartments – Independent-style housing that has shared bedrooms and living spaces (including full kitchens). You are NOT required to have a campus meal plan.

Areas of Study Not Available: School of Education (EDCI, EGEN, EPSY, EDLR, EKIN), School of Nursing (NURS), School of Pharmacy (PHRX, PHAR, PHRM), School of Law (LAW) and Military Science (MISI)
課程資訊請參考此連結
Course Load:
Minimum: 12 credits (undergraduate) 9 credits (graduate)
Maximum: 17 credits (no more than 5 courses)
 Course Registration:
Students are required to submit their course preferences as part of the online application process.
Upper-division courses (3000 level and above) require evidence of pre-requisites.
Online course registration is not available for exchange students.
Medical Insurance: It is mandatory for all exchange students to have personal medical Insurance that meets all J-1 visa requirements.
housing_text:
保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結


On-campus housing is guaranteed for all exchange students that complete the online housing application by the due date.
 

We recommend that all exchange students live on campus in residence halls. On-campus living is an important part of American university life, and by living on campus, you become an active member of the UConn community and have access to all the social, recreational, and cultural events that take place.
 

All dorm rooms are equipped with a bed, a mattress, a desk and chair, and a closet. In small units, doubles are 154 sq. ft. (11×14). Elsewhere, double rooms range in size up to 180 sq. ft. Most undergraduate dormitory rooms share bathroom facilities with other residents on the floor. Refrigerators, microwaves and televisions are not provided in dorm rooms.
 

Traditional Housing – Shared bedrooms with convenient access to dining halls and campus facilities. A campus meal plan is required.
Suites – Shared bedrooms, often with shared living spaces, with convenient access to dining halls and campus facilities. A campus meal plan is required.
Apartments – Independent-style housing that has shared bedrooms and living spaces (including full kitchens). You are NOT required to have a campus meal plan.

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。
學士生 GPA 達2.50分以上；
研究生 GPA 達3.00分以上。
學士生 TOEFL iBT 80 (讀 18 聽 18 說 18 寫 18 不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.5 (聽 6.0 讀 6.0 寫 6.0 說 6.0)；
研究生 TOEFL iBT 88 (讀 20 聽 20 說 20 寫 20 不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 7.0 (聽 6.5 讀 6.5 寫 6.5 說 6.5)；。
不接受醫學院護理學系、法律學院、管理學院管理學院企業管理碩士專班之學生申請。

Fall Semester: August - December

Spring Semester: January - May
