註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
該校之交換入學審查相當地嚴格，歷屆交換生有被該校拒絕入學申請之紀錄，請欲選擇交換至該校的同學務必查看確認該校有相對應的主修課程可供選讀。
Students can take regular courses that match their major field at their home institution only. (For example, science major students cannot take courses offered by Faculty of Business Management.)
交換生資訊請參考網站、Fact Sheet及此連結
課程資訊請參考此連結、Program A以及Program B 
Please note these courses are not necessarily available in the year of your participation.
Exchange program is available only on Higashi-Osaka campus. 
Please be aware that Faculty of Agriculture, Faculty of Pharmacy, Faculty of Biology-Oriented Science and Technology, Faculty of Engineering, Faculty of Humanity-Oriente Science and Engineering are not open for exchange students.
FACULTIES OFFERING COURSES TO EXCHANGE STUDENTS
A= For Program A, courses in English
B= For Program B, courses in Japanese-Faculty of Law（B）
-Faculty of Economics（B）
-Faculty of Business Administration（A/B）
-Faculty of Science and Engineering（B）
-Faculty of Architecture（B）
-Faculty of Literature, Arts and Cultural Studies（A/B）
-Faculty of Applied Sociology（B）
-Faculty of International Studies（A/B）
-Faculty of Informatics（B）
-Global Education Center（A/B）
Please note that graduate students can participate in our program but can register only for undergraduate level courses.
Minimum academic workload for exchange students: 315 hours (45 hours/course x 7 courses
Students have to be the ones who need credit transfer from at least 7 of our courses per semester while on exchange. The number of credits earned from our exchange program has to be counted as a part of the total number of credits that students need for graduation.
In order to apply for our programs, please note all the following requirements need to be met:
Those who have never studied in Japan before.
Those who do not have Japanese nationality.
Those who will not graduate or complete their degree program at their home institution before the end of the Kindai University exchange program.
Students who do not currently take a leave of absent from their home institution
Exchange students are not allowed to participate in club activities at Kindai University. Because the club activities insurance which is mandatory for club members to purchase is not available for exchange students, and the club members also require serious commitment throughout the year, aiming for winning national/world championship, whereas exchange students' priority is study.

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

住宿及其他資訊.text:

保險資訊：Program participants need to purchase both overseas travel insurance and Japanese National Health Insurance.

本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達2.70分以上。
具日語檢定成績 2 級以上。
不接受醫學院之學生申請。
quota_text: 兩學期0名。因交換學生往來不平衡，該校本次甄選不開放申請。
calendar_text:
Fall Semester: October - February
Spring Semester: April - August 

✔️ 該校年曆請參考此連結
notes_text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生請參考此連結、課程資訊請參考此連結
該校開放申請以下計畫：
Akita University Academic Japanese Program (AUAJ)
*AUAJ program participants are required to attend for two semesters.
Akita University General Program (AUGP)
不開放醫學院學生申請
Estimated cost of living: Average: ¥70,000 - ¥80,000/month (Housing, utilities, food, etc.)
Minimum academic workload per semester: 8 class periods per week
National Health Insurance: All international students whose residence status is three months or longer must enroll in Japan’s National Health Insurance.

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
日語組
本校大一/大二學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），該校School of Human Science and Environment, Food Science and Nutrition不開放交換，亦不開放跨領域選課。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
具日語檢定成績 1 級以上。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期2名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
First semester: April to September 
Second semester: October to March 

✔ 該校年曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生資訊請參考此連結、Brochure及Fact Sheet（僅供參考），院系一覽請參考此連結。
School of Human Science and Environment, Food Science and Nutrition are NOT open to exchange students.
Students are NOT allowed to take cross-faculty courses and must stick to their home university major(s).
另外，各系所有不同要求，且每學期可能會異動，請欲選填該校的同學留意，並保持彈性。更多資訊請參考此連結。

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: 保證住宿，但不保證校內住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結。

日語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
具日語檢定成績 2 級以上。
不接受管理學院管理學院企業管理碩士專班、法律學院之學生申請。
一般組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
TOEFL iBT 79 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0。
不接受管理學院管理學院企業管理碩士專班、法律學院之學生申請。

Spring Quarter: April - May
Summer Quarter: June - August
Autumn - Winter Semester:
Autumn Quarter: September - October
Winter Quarter: November - December

✔ 該校年曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text:
須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。
 

Important change: Starting from the Fall 2026 intake (September), a processing fee of 12,000 yen (+ tax) per student will be required for the issuance of the Certificate of Eligibility (COE), which is necessary to obtain a student visa for entry into Japan. Applicants will be asked to make this payment directly to the issuing agency using a credit card. Please note that students with Japanese nationality or special permanent resident status will not be charged this fee since they are not required to apply for the COE.

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換學生資訊請見此連結、懶人包及Fact Sheet
課程資訊：
選課系統請見此連結及此連結
HGP（Hitotsubashi University Global Programme，英文授課）課程資訊請見此連結
Both undergraduate and postgraduate courses in English are available; however, most courses conducted in English are undergraduate-level courses, and only a limited number of postgraduate-level courses are available in English.
交換生語言課程資訊，請參考此連結
School of International Corporate Strategy (ICS) and MBA Programme courses are NOT open to exchange students.
Business Law courses conducted in Japanese and School of Law courses are NOT open to exchange students.
在客觀具備相關領域之背景知識及選課條件下，該校開放交換學生跨領域選修課程，並開放研究所學生選修大學部課程
Every term, a student must register for courses with a total of at least 6 slots of class time per week in order to fulfill the requirement of the immigration law.
保險資訊，請參考此連結、生活費資訊，請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生資訊及課程資訊請參考此連結、交換生語言課程資訊，請參考此連結。
In the field of medicine, practicum for pedagogy, and laboratory training for science and engineering courses, etc., there are courses that are NOT open for exchange students.
Students are able to take course offered in schools other than they belong to with obtaining permission from the lecturers.
Hiroshima University Syllabus: Please be notified, in the field of medicine, law, practicum for pedagogy, and laboratory training for science and engineering courses, there are courses that HUSA students are NOT eligible to take.
Master's/PhD students require a specific application procedure, they need to get an approval of accepting from prospect supervisor beforehand.
Insurance: Students have to enroll "Comprehensive Insurance for Students Lives Coupled with 'Gakkensai'" after arriving at HU.
Living Expenses

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

住宿及其他資訊.text:
住宿資訊請參考此連結。

Majority of HUSA students are housed in the Ikenoue Student Dormitory, located at ten minutes walking distance from the campus.

交換生資訊及課程資訊，請參考此連結以及下方連結：
Study Abroad Program at NUFS Undergraduate and Graduate Schools （日語組）
Student Exchange Program - Global Japan Program （一般組）
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程。
If the student will apply for the Study Abroad at NUFS Undergraduate and Graduate Schools, they will need higher Japanese proficiency, N2 or above on the JLPT is required for undergraduate classes and N1 for postgraduate classes.
Students who have not yet reached these levels can take Japanese language courses in the Global Japan Program, which also includes optional courses in Japanese culture and other subjects taught in English.
Minimum academic workload per semester: 7 courses (10.5 hours per week)
Exchange students are required by law to be covered by the National Health Insurance throughout their study period in Japan (monthly premiums are usually within the ¥1,000- ¥1,300 range).

Exchange students are required by law to be covered by the National Health Insurance throughout their study period in Japan (monthly premiums are usually within the ¥1,000- ¥1,300 range).
生活費資訊，請參考此連結。
保險資訊，請參考此連結。
NUFS Scholarship for Exchange Students 獎學金資訊，請參考此連結。

links.text: Study Abroad Program at NUFS Undergraduate and Graduate Schools

sections_ordered.label: 日本區重要提醒
sections_ordered.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

Students who have not yet reached these levels can take Japanese language courses in the Global Japan Program, which also includes optional courses in Japanese culture and other subjects taught in English.

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
日語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
具日語檢定成績 1 級以上。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text: 一學期0名。（因交換學生往來不平衡，本次甄選不開放申請）

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Spring Semester: April - September
Fall Semester: September - March

✔️ 該校年曆請見此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生資訊請參考此連結及Fact Sheet（僅供參考）、課程資訊請參考此連結、語言課程資訊請參考此連結。
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程。
OSE: Students are required to take an online placement test prior to orientation to determine their Japanese language proficiency and class placement. Class placement is final and may NOT be changed.
Online syllabus: The search is case-sensitive, so it is best to copy the course titles from the online pamphlet and paste in the search field.
Please note that guidance on research is not provided to SKP graduate students.
SKP students can select courses only from the course lists for each track/campus distributed to them at the start of the course registration period. Students will not be able to choose from among all of the courses for regular students offered in English.
Minimum academic workload per semester: It is required by Japanese law that international students attend a minimum of 10 hours of classes per week, which means at least 7 sessions of RU classes per week (1 session = 90 minutes).
Estimated cost of living: 100,000 yen per month.
Living expenses will vary depending on each student's individual lifestyle, but a list of estimated expenses can be found on the following page at Estimated Living Expenses.
Health Insurance: Students are required to join the National Health Insurance system while on the Study in Kansai Program. This insurance covers 70% of incurred medical fees. The annual premium is approximately 18,000 yen. To provide assistance with this payment, the Kyoto City International Foundation reimburses a portion of the National Health Insurance cost to international students living in Kyoto. More details regarding the National Health Insurance system and applicable rebates will be provided during orientation.
It is required by Japanese law (Emigration and Immigration Management and Refugee Recognition Law) that international students attend a minimum of 10 hours of classes per week. Since one class session lasts for an hour and a half at Ritsumeikan University, you must take at least 7 sessions of classes per week* in order to satisfy this requirement. At Ritsumeikan University, credits are calculated on the basis that one semester is 15 weeks long. For Japanese language courses, each weekly class session is accorded 1 credit each per semester. Courses other than Japanese courses are generally 2 credits each per semester.
獎學金資訊，請參考此連結。

若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

Master's students are NOT allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units.
Workload: Exchange students are required to take more than 7 KGU credits per semester
Estimated cost of Living
Insurance: Every Japanese citizen and foreign national residing over three months in Japan is required to enroll in the National Health Insurance system, and voluntary withdrawal is not permitted.
KGU-Sponsored Scholarships: Exchange students can apply for a scholarship through KGU along with their application to KGU. Applicants will be informed if they will receive the scholarship roughly a week before arriving in Japan. However, there are circumstances in which students may not be informed until after their arrival in Japan. Note: Please be informed that the number of available scholarships has decreased over the last several years, and that applicants should not expect to receive a scholarship. All students must plan for financing their exchange without the help of this scholarship.

日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結。

Beginning with the Spring Semester 2024 intake, all nominated students will be eligible to apply for KGU-arranged accommodation. While KGU cannot at this time guarantee that all nominated students who apply for KGU-arranged accommodation will receive a housing placement, the KGU Residence Center will make every effort to accommodate as many students as possible.

sections_ordered.label: 注意事項
sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此網頁、KGU Exchange Program Fact Sheet（僅供參考）及Brochure
課程資訊請參考此網頁
Master's students are NOT allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units.
Workload: Exchange students are required to take more than 7 KGU credits per semester
Estimated cost of Living
Insurance: Every Japanese citizen and foreign national residing over three months in Japan is required to enroll in the National Health Insurance system, and voluntary withdrawal is not permitted.
KGU-Sponsored Scholarships: Exchange students can apply for a scholarship through KGU along with their application to KGU. Applicants will be informed if they will receive the scholarship roughly a week before arriving in Japan. However, there are circumstances in which students may not be informed until after their arrival in Japan. Note: Please be informed that the number of available scholarships has decreased over the last several years, and that applicants should not expect to receive a scholarship. All students must plan for financing their exchange without the help of this scholarship.

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
日語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.30分以上。
具日語檢定成績 2 級以上。
不接受醫學院、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學系、法律學院、社會科學院政治學研究所、社會科學院經濟學研究所、文學院人類學研究所、社會科學院社會學研究所、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學研究所、公共衛生學院、國際政經學院、共同教育中心國際體育運動事務學士學位學程、共同教育中心運動設施與健康管理碩士學位學程 之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期1名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人)

Fall semester: September - February
Spring semester: April - July

交換生資訊請參考此連結、課程資訊請參考此連結、Brochure請參考此連結
Departments/programs/faculties/schools NOT open to exchange students:
School of Medicine
School of Dentistry
School of Dentistry at Matsudo
School of Pharmacy
Department of Veterinary Medicine
Graduate School of Social and Cultural studies
International Political Science and Economics (Master’s Program Only)
Culture and Communication Studies (Master’s Program Only)
Human Science (Master’s Program Only)
Social and Cultural Studies (Doctor’s Program Only)
Law School
College of Sports Sciences
Not only master and Ph.D but also Bachelor program, please specify what you would like to study or reseach in the field of department or major you applied, apart from learning Japanese or Japanese culture. Otherwise we cannot appoint supervisor properly and sometimes it will lead to rejection of your applciation.
Estimated cost of living: ¥35,000 per month plus utilities fee (approx. ¥10,000 per month)

住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿。

Housing information is provided by Student Affairs Section of the college or graduate school at which you have been accepted. Since Nihon University has campuses in various locations, dormitories are not provided. But there are various types of private houses near every campus. International students may select a house that suits their budget and lifestyle.

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
日語組，Academic Cooperation Agreement Programs (ACAP)
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
具日語檢定成績 2 級以上。

本校大三/大四/大五/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
TOEFL iBT 79 (接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0。

最新資訊.text: 東京工業大學自113年10月1日起，與東京醫科齒科大學合併為東京科學大學（Institute of Science Tokyo）。

學校年曆.text: 該校年曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
該校為科學／工業大學，請欲選填該校的學生，先行查詢該校是否有相對應系所。如欲跨系所選填者，請務必具備相關領域之背景知識及選課條件符合之證明，以避免交換入學申請被拒絕
該校交換入學申請文件中，有一項為Acceptance Letter from your Intended Academic Advisor at Tokyo Tech，須由您欲申請之東京工業大學指導教授簽署同意，因此請先確認該校是否有相符之系所和指導教授，以確保錄取交換推薦資格後可以順利向姊妹校提交交換入學申請文件
交換生計畫網頁，請參考此連結及Information Sheet、課程相關網頁，請參考此連結、交換生語言課程資訊，請參考此連結
不開放申請之科系，請參考此連結
Master's or PhD students are NOT allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units.
Students need to fulfill the requirements mentioned in the "Program Outline" on the website of each program. YSEP / ACAP
YSEP and ACAP are eligible for the former Tokyo Tech partner universities’ students and they are not permitted to take courses offered by the faculties/graduate schools of Medicine,Dentistry and Health Care Sciences. Indeed, they cannot be accepted by the faculty members of the faculties/graduate schools of Medicine, Dentistry and Health Care Sciences.
一般組：Young Scientist Exchange Program(YSEP)
Those with student status at their home university, enrolled in the following programs at the time they start research at Science Tokyo:
Doctoral program
Master's program
Bachelor's program (at least two and a half years of study)
This program is limited to about 40‐50 students per year (25 students per semester). Participants will be competitively selected by Tokyo Tech if the number of applications exceeds the number of slots available.
Before beginning the online application process, applicants are required to contact a desired academic supervisor at Tokyo Tech directly, and obtain approval from him/her. On the online application form, applicants need to submit evidence such as an email message or a letter indicating that the Tokyo Tech professor agrees to be the applicant’s academic supervisor.
The applicant can choose three faculty members. However, if all of them refuse to accept the student, the student will be asked to give up participation in the program.
The program is open to students at Tokyo Tech partner universities who, at the time of YSEP participation, are enrolled in and have completed at least two and a half years of undergraduate studies. 
日語組：Academic Cooperation Agreement Program (ACAP)
Take course(s) offered at Science Tokyo (required): Mandated to take 6 classes (600 minutes) or more per week to maintain student visa status.
Within the "Contact Period with the ACAP Specialized faculty member", applicants are required to contact an ACAP Specialized faculty member by directly referring to the list of the ACAP Specialized faculty members which will be provided by Tokyo Tech, and obtain their approval. Please do NOT contact outside of the set time of period. On the online application form, applicants need to submit evidence such as an email message or a letter indicating that the ACAP Specialized faculty member agrees to accept them. Note that there are some Departments with many applicants which may exceed their limit and not accept any. If more than two students are recommended for the same Department, there is a possibility that we may not be able to accept them.
保險資訊，請參考此連結。
生活費資訊：It depends on where you live, but you will need at least JPY 120,000 per month as of 2023. References:
Tokyo Tech Dormitory fees: JPY 27,500-65,000 (plus a separate move-in fee)
Bottle of water: JPY 100-150
Lunch at cafeteria at Tokyo Tech: JPY 400-600
Lunch at café or restaurant in Tokyo: JPY 1,000-1,500

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，住宿資訊，請參考此連結。

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

sections_ordered.text: 須須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

sections_ordered.label: 注意事項
sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生計畫介紹請參考此網頁及Fact Sheet（僅供參考）
Japanese Language and Culture Program (JLCP) 
一般交換留學項目

Academic Workload: International students must register for 10 hours of coursework per week during the mobility period.

Insurance: In order to join, you must register at the National Health Insurance section of Nagasaki City Hall. You need to bring your passport for application.

Students are NOT allowed to take cross-disciplinary courses.

欲選擇該校為交換志願的同學，請務必詳閱Guidelines for Application for Short-term Exchange Programs at Kanazawa University ，確定自己符合該計畫要求之領域、年級、語言能力等各項條件。該校開放交換生選讀之計畫部分有人數限制，請欲選填該校的學生注意！
Please note that some students cannot be accepted when we have more applicants than the maximum number of students to be admitted in a program, and enrollment in the program does not guarantee that the student could receive the scholarship.
The subjects you can take may change depending on your language ability.
Kanazawa University Exchange Program (KUEP) Human and Social Sciences: Graduate students must get an agreement of acceptance from their desired supervisor before applying; Science and Engineering Sciences/Medical, Pharmaceutical and Health Sciences: Applicants must get an agreement of acceptance from their desired professor before applying.
Insurance: All international students at Kanazawa University are required to join the National Health Insurance program. It costs about 1,500 yen per month. This insurance covers around 70% of costs for medical care and hospitalization.
Health Care
Cost of Living: The monthly rent for an apartment (one bedroom with kitchenette, toilet and bath, unfurnished) in Kanazawa is from ¥40,000 to ¥60,000 and the deposit and (non-refundable) “key money” will be approximately ¥150,000 to ¥300,000.

links.text: Short-term Exchange Programs at Kanazawa University (2024-2025) (KUEP)-Programs
Guidelines for Application for Short-term Exchange Programs at Kanazawa University

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

申請資格.text:
日語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
具日語檢定成績 2 級以上。
一般組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達2.44分以上。
TOEFL iBT 79 (接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 或 全民英檢中高級。

日語組
一學期0名。因交換學生往來不平衡，該校2025/2026年度不開放申請。

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此連結、系所一覽表、課程資訊、語言課程、修課限制
Undergraduate exchange students need to take at least six classes per week for one semester to satisfy the requirements of their visa.
Graduate exchange students need to take at least one class.
Belonging to a graduate school, choose one of the two paths mentioned below:
Subject Study Path (for exchange students who wish to take Japanese language subjects, subjects related to Japan and a wide range of specialist subjects, rather than conducting research in their major field):
While the student will belong to a graduate school, they are permitted to take subjects at undergraduate and graduate level without restriction. However, they are required to take at least 6 subjects per semester including at least 1 subject in the graduate school to which they belong.
No research supervisor will be allocated to such students.
In the case that the graduate school a student wishes to enroll in does not accept “Subject Study Path” exchange students, then the student must either choose another graduate school or belong to an undergraduate faculty instead.
Research Focus Path (for exchange students who wish to focus on conducting research activities intheir major field):
A student will be accepted if allocation of a research supervisor, based on the contents of the submitted Research Plan, is deemed possible.
At the conclusion of their exchange, the student must submit a report outlining the results of their research.
The student must enroll in at least 1 subject in the graduate school to which they belong.
Undergraduate Exchange Students along with graduate exchange students who select the Subject Study Path must take at least 6 classes/semester (1 subject = 100 minutes/week, 600 minutes per week in total) to maintain eligibility for their student visa.
Graduate exchange students who select research focus path will need to spend more time on research activities and therefore do not have to follow the above rule. However, we request they register for at least 1 class in the graduate school to which they belong. 
生活費資訊，請參考此連結 (>Tuition and Other Fees > Life Expenses)
保險資訊，請參考此連結

經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

notes_text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此連結、系所一覽表、課程資訊、語言課程、修課限制
Undergraduate exchange students need to take at least six classes per week for one semester to satisfy the requirements of their visa.
Graduate exchange students need to take at least one class.
Belonging to a graduate school, choose one of the two paths mentioned below:
Subject Study Path (for exchange students who wish to take Japanese language subjects, subjects related to Japan and a wide range of specialist subjects, rather than conducting research in their major field):
While the student will belong to a graduate school, they are permitted to take subjects at undergraduate and graduate level without restriction. However, they are required to take at least 6 subjects per semester including at least 1 subject in the graduate school to which they belong.
No research supervisor will be allocated to such students.
In the case that the graduate school a student wishes to enroll in does not accept “Subject Study Path” exchange students, then the student must either choose another graduate school or belong to an undergraduate faculty instead.
Research Focus Path (for exchange students who wish to focus on conducting research activities intheir major field):
A student will be accepted if allocation of a research supervisor, based on the contents of the submitted Research Plan, is deemed possible.
At the conclusion of their exchange, the student must submit a report outlining the results of their research.
The student must enroll in at least 1 subject in the graduate school to which they belong.
Undergraduate Exchange Students along with graduate exchange students who select the Subject Study Path must take at least 6 classes/semester (1 subject = 100 minutes/week, 600 minutes per week in total) to maintain eligibility for their student visa.
Graduate exchange students who select research focus path will need to spend more time on research activities and therefore do not have to follow the above rule. However, we request they register for at least 1 class in the graduate school to which they belong.

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
交換生計畫相關網頁，請參考此連結。
日語組：Immersion Exchnage Program Osaka （iExPO）、Maple (September intake, Full-year only)
一般組： OUSSEP  （不開放研究所學生申請） 
FrontierLab@OsakaU: FrontierLab is an academic internship in science and technology and very unique as a long-term exchange study program. Postgraduate students are welcome in FrontierLab if they wish to do full-time research.
Enrolment restrictions may apply to some medicine/dentistry-related schools.
Estimated cost of living: Flight to and from Japan, food, public transport, text books, winter clothing (if necessary) etc. Students are strongly advised to have at least 100,000 JPY per month at their disposal.
生活費資訊：Global Village Tsukumodai (FrontierLab, iExPO, OUSSEP): 56,630-59,730 JPY/month Global Village Minoh Semba (Maple): 46,490 JPY/month (utility fees not included). For private accommodation, average rent will be 35,000 - 60,000JPY/month．　
保險資訊：College insurance (c.10,000JPY/semester, c.15,000JPY/year),  National Health Insurance (2,000-3,000JPY/month)．
交換生語言課程資訊請參考此連結。

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結。

Due to the capacity limit for exchange students, some students may not be assigned to one of university accommodation. In the event that university accommodation is not available, we will assist in finding a private accommodation.
Rates of residence hall/apartment c. 20,000 - 40,000JPY/month
For private accommodation, average rent will be 35,000 - 60,000JPY/month
iExPO, OUSSEP and FrontierLab program participants are allocated to Global Village Tsukumodai. Maple program students are allocated to Global Village Minoh Semba.

International Program for Japan Studies
Departments/programs/faculties/schools NOT open to exchange students: Physical Education classes, Teacher’s Certificate courses, Foreign Language courses for Japanese students, some courses offered by the Department of Education, and courses that are not open to the exchange students.
Graduate students may be accepted on a limited basis subject to approval from the academic staff based on academic objectives. Most courses are taught in Japanese. Some Graduate Schools require a high level of Japanese language proficiency (JLPT N1 level). 
Minimum number of credits: 14 credits (10.5 hours) per semester.
Health Insurance: All students are required to enter National Health Insurance (NHI).

sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此網頁、Brochure及Fact Sheet、課程資訊請參考此連結
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程。
International Program for Japan Studies
Departments/programs/faculties/schools NOT open to exchange students: Physical Education classes, Teacher’s Certificate courses, Foreign Language courses for Japanese students, some courses offered by the Department of Education, and courses that are not open to the exchange students.
Graduate students may be accepted on a limited basis subject to approval from the academic staff based on academic objectives. Most courses are taught in Japanese. Some Graduate Schools require a high level of Japanese language proficiency (JLPT N1 level). 
Minimum number of credits: 14 credits (10.5 hours) per semester.
Health Insurance: All students are required to enter National Health Insurance (NHI).

sections_ordered.label: 日本區重要提醒
sections_ordered.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

sections_ordered.label: 住宿資訊
sections_ordered.text: 不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結。

註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此連結及Information Sheet
日語組：Japanese Language and Culture Module (Nichibun)
List of Courses and Syllabuses
Courses are conducted in Japanese. Students are placed in classes based on the result of our Japanese language placement test regardless of Bachelor, Master or PhD.
For Nichibun students who are placed in Japanese level 5 or higher are allowed to take courses in Japanese offered by faculties. However, Law School, Business School and Faculty of Engineering don't open any courses to Nichibun exchange students.
Students in CJLC program: Law School, Business School and Institute for the Liberal Arts (ILA) don’t open any courses
一般組：Global Education Module (GEM，舊名CGE)
List of Courses and Syllabuses
The Global Education Module (GEM) offers inter-disciplinary courses all conducted in English, designed for international and Japanese students to foster a better understanding of Japan in a global context. GEM provides in-depth learning opportunities in different fields ranging from the humanities and social sciences to the natural and human sciences.
Exchange students who intend to principally take courses on Japanese Culture, Society, and Nature in English offered by GEM are accepted as ‘GEM students’. [In contrast, exchange students who intend to study mainly Japanese language are accepted as "Nichibun students".)
Courses offered by CGE are undergraduate level, if Master and PhD students understand it, we can accept students regardless of Bachelor, Master or PhD.
GEM students are not allowed take courses offered by any Graduate Schools other than ILA (undergraduate level).
Students in CGE program: Law School and Business School don’t open any courses 
Courses that are available vary depending on each student’s Japanese level. Also note that there are the courses that cannot be taken. Such include seminar courses, subjects offered by Faculty of Science and Engineering and Faculty of Life and Medical Sciences, and subjects not open to other faculty students.
該校僅開放大學部的課程供所有學生選讀，請研究生及博士生自行考量修課限制。
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程。
最低修課限制：Students should take more than 7 classes (1 class = 90 minutes) at least per week. It is prescribed by law.
Estimated cost of living: The average monthly living cost in Kyoto is around ¥120,000 including rent (at the very least 100,000JPY). Please keep this in mind when making plans to study in Japan.  
All exchange students need to pay ¥2,500/semester as Educational Support Fee to the Center for Global Education at the beginning of each semester. (The amount of fee is subject to change.)
Insurance information: All International students residing in Japan for more than 3 months are required to enroll in the insurance.
獎學金資訊，請參考此連結

若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

✔️ 該校年曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生計畫各項資訊請參考此連結、Fact Sheet（僅供參考）、Brochure及電視專訪
該校兩種課程說明（一般組及日語組）請參考此連結
選課資訊請見此連結
The following courses are NOT open to Exchange Students.
FLA core programs
FST laboratory classes
GPGS compulsory courses
the foreign language courses (except Japanese language)
Seminars
Compulsory courses in General Studies, “Studies in Christian Humanism: For Others, with Others”, “Liberal Arts of the Body”, “Critical Thinking & Writing”, “Overview of Data Science”, “Thinking about Issues, Perspectives and Positionality”.
Academic English courses under University-wide General Studies (Courses with registration codes that start from GSP and the numberings with ENG)
In principle, all applicants of Japanese-taught programs are required to submit Japanese-Language Proficiency Test N1 certificate; in addition:
Applicants who wish to enroll in the Graduate Program in Linguistics (言語学専攻) must submit proof of a JLPT N1 obtained within two years from the time of application.
Applicants who wish to take the Japanese Language Education Course (日本語教育学コース) subjects in the Graduate Program in Linguistics (言語学専攻) must submit proof of a JLPT N1 score of 150 or higher. For those who are applying to other Japanese-taught graduate program, a higher level may be required for the breakdown score in addition to passing the N1 level.
Applicants who apply for the Graduate Program in Global Studies are expected to have a higher English ability. Applicants who cannot fulfill the following minimum language requirement will be denied the entrance into the program: 100 on TOEFL iBT or 7.0 on IELTS (Academic)
Exchange students should choose most courses from the departments/graduate program that he/she enrolled in.
Master/PhD students: If they decided to take only undergraduate level courses when the application, please apply for undergraduate department.
Exchange Students must register for more than 10 hours of class work per week (600 minutes, 1 hour being 60 minutes). This is namely 6 periods as 100 minutes constitute one period. 
Visa, Scholarship, Video
Estimated Cost of Living
Meals: ¥30,000 - ¥60,000 per month
Public Transportation: ¥5,000 - ¥10,000 per month
Books: ¥30,000 - ¥50,000 per semester
Personal Expenses: ¥30,000up per month
Insurance: In principle, all exchange students have to join Japanese National Health Insurance after you arrive in Japan.

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

住宿及其他資訊.label: 住宿及其他資訊
住宿及其他資訊.text: 不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結

申請資格.text:
日語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.50分以上，主修為化學或物理的學生，請務必留意注意事項。
具日語檢定成績 1 級以上。
不接受法律學院之學生申請。

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此連結、Fact Sheet及Brochure
課程資訊：請參閱此連結、此連結及此連結，語言課程資訊請見此連結
NUPACE is competitive. Please be advised that meeting the requirements does NOT guarantee admission to the programme.
Due to the limited duration of their exchange and subsequent safety concerns, NUPACE Special Undergraduate Students and Special Graduate Students are generally not permitted to enrol in G30 courses with laboratory content. This applies, in particular, to the disciplines of Chemistry and Physics, as taught both by the School of Science and School of Engineering.
Students wishing to apply for clerkships at the School of Medicine should follow application instructions on the NUPACE website carefully.
Master (non-credit seeking students) and PhD students's student status at Nagoya University will be 'Special Research Students'. They will be required to write a research plan, but could include the undergraduate courses intersted in into the research plan.
Minimum workload is 15 credits per semester (30 credits for one year). Special Research Students do not have this minimum workload as their main purpose would be to engage in research.
保險資訊: Insurance subscription is mandatory for exchange students: Health (¥1,700 per month) and personal liability insurance (¥1,800 per annum)
Students who have special health (mental/physical) or learning needs are encouraged share the relevant information with this Office prior to their arrival in Japan.

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

住宿資訊.text:
保證住宿，但不保證校內住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結。

Dormitories: Exchange students may be allocated to off-campus dormitory as well (5,400 JPY per month in commuting expenses.)

若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

sections_ordered.text:
保證住宿，但不保證校內住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結。

Dormitories: Exchange students may be allocated to off-campus dormitory as well (5,400 JPY per month in commuting expenses.)

本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.50分以上，主修為化學或物理的學生，請務必留意注意事項。
具日語檢定成績 1 級以上。
不接受法律學院之學生申請。
quota_text:
一學期1名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人)
calendar_text:
Fall Semester: October - February
Spring Semester: April - August

notes_text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此連結、Fact Sheet及Brochure
課程資訊：請參閱此連結、此連結及此連結，語言課程資訊請見此連結
NUPACE is competitive. Please be advised that meeting the requirements does NOT guarantee admission to the programme.
Due to the limited duration of their exchange and subsequent safety concerns, NUPACE Special Undergraduate Students and Special Graduate Students are generally not permitted to enrol in G30 courses with laboratory content. This applies, in particular, to the disciplines of Chemistry and Physics, as taught both by the School of Science and School of Engineering.
Students wishing to apply for clerkships at the School of Medicine should follow application instructions on the NUPACE website carefully.
Master (non-credit seeking students) and PhD students's student status at Nagoya University will be 'Special Research Students'. They will be required to write a research plan, but could include the undergraduate courses intersted in into the research plan.
Minimum workload is 15 credits per semester (30 credits for one year). Special Research Students do not have this minimum workload as their main purpose would be to engage in research.
保險資訊: Insurance subscription is mandatory for exchange students: Health (¥1,700 per month) and personal liability insurance (¥1,800 per annum)
Students who have special health (mental/physical) or learning needs are encouraged share the relevant information with this Office prior to their arrival in Japan.

註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此連結及Fact Sheet（僅供參考）、課程資訊請參考此連結、語言課程資訊請參考此連結
The following types of courses offered by the Faculty of Oceanology, the Faculty of Maritime Sciences and the Graduate School of Maritime Sciences are NOT open to exchange students:
Experiment
Practicum
Tutorial
All classes for 1st year undergraduate students
The following Faculties/Schools do NOT accept undergraduate exchange students:
Faculty of Intercultural Studies: The Faculty of Intercultural Studies and Faculty of Human Development were integrated into the Faculty of Global Human Sciences in 2017.
Faculty of Human Development: The Faculty of Intercultural Studies and Faculty of Human Development were integrated into the Faculty of Global Human Sciences in 2017.
Faculty of Maritime Sciences: The Faculty of Oceanology was established as the successor to the Faculty of Maritime Sciences in 2021 and now accepts undergraduate exchange students.
School of Medicine
Courses NOT open to exchange students:
Courses offered by the College of Liberal Arts and Sciences
Courses for Teaching Credentials
Courses offered by the Faculty of Intercultural Studies
Courses offered by the Faculty of Human Development
Students must possess sufficient Japanese-language ability to understand classes and engage in academic research in Japanese (the equivalent of JLPT N1 is recommended). 
All international students including exchange students must take at least 10 lesson hours (equivalent to 6-7 courses/classes) per week in accordance with immigration law.
Students who apply for the Graduate School of Maritime Science are required to obtain approval from a professor in your chosen academic field before the application.
Master's or PhD students are NOT allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units. Master/PhD students should search for an academic supervisor, research group or specific field of study prior to application and mention them in the application form.
All students belong to one of the faculties or graduate schools at Kobe University. Students should choose their preferred faculty/graduate school which is close to their major.
Kobe University has implemented the Measles and Rubella Registration Policy. Learn more here.
Students don't need to submit English proficiency test except School/Graduate School of Business Administration.

sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此連結及Brochure (Exchange Program Okayama, EPOK)、課程資訊請見此連結及此連結、語言課程資訊請參考此連結
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課
EPOK students are supposed to belong to Institute of Global Human Resource Development and NOT allowed to belong to other faculties or schools. While we may accept students from any department or faculty at your university, the courses available to them are primarily limited to those listed in the EPOK Course Catalog. *EPOK Course Catalog (2026 April – 2027 February) will be posted on the above website around February 2026
Minimum Workload: 10 hours per week (5 OU credits per semester)
Candidates from non-English speaking countries must provide a copy of a document that demonstrates a good command of the English language.

sections_ordered.label: 日本區重要提醒
sections_ordered.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生資訊請參考此連結、Fact Sheet（僅供參考）及Application Guide
課程資訊請參考此連結
To maintain student visa status as an “Exchange Student” at the University of Tsukuba, it is required for you to take at least 8 periods (600 min.) of classes per week.
Master's or PhD student are NOT allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units.
Exchange student is unable to choose Degree Program in Business Sciences / Law School Program / MBA Program in International Business. Also, the courses offered by these degree programs are unable to be taken. DDP student is unable to choose Master's program in Mathematics and Master's Program in Physics.
Language Requirements:
繳交語檢成績時，檢附之日檢JLPT證書需為兩年以內之效期。
If applicant would like to join college of Japanese language and Japanese culture, JLPT N2 level is required
If applicant would like to join Master’s Program in Service Engineering, JLPT N1 level in required.
Japanese Language Courses
生活費資訊：Around ¥80,000-¥100,000 per month, including cost of accommodation.
保險資訊：All students need to join Japanese National Health insurance (costs around ¥23,000 per year) and in-campus accident insurance (Costs around ¥1,000 per year).

註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此網頁及Fact Sheet（僅供參考）
Exchange students can choose between the Type U (for undergraduate students) and Type G (for graduate students) programs.
Type U: The Type U program is designed for undergraduate students to take various courses across Faculties and College in which you are interested.
Type G: The Type G program is designed for graduate students. Type G participants will belong to one of the Graduate Schools. Type G students will be able to take various courses or conduct research under the guidance of faculty members. 
語言能力及成績要求：Students who demonstrate excellent academic performance are eligible to apply. Please also note that Type U and Type G may have different requirements. For Type G, please refer to each graduate school prerequisites.
課程資訊：
Type U 課程資訊請參考此連結 
Type G 課程資訊請參考此連結
USTEP Type U students can take only classes that are open for USTEP students. In general they cannot take graduate level classes, but they can take graduate level classes that are listed on Type U course catalogue.
For Type G, it depend on the graduate schools.
USTEP students must register for a minimum of 10 hours worth of classes per week which is equivalent to 12 credits per semester
Students interested in taking seminars offered in “Japanese” and “Japanese and English” at the Faculty of Law are allowed to apply for only one seminar course per semester. 
USTEP Type U students are allowed to take up to two credit-bearing Japanese language classes per week (apply to students enrolling from the spring of 2025 onwards).
Students who request to take three credit-bearing Japanese language courses per week must get special permission by including a document filled out by their home university in the online application process. This application will be reviewed by UTokyo before permission can be granted.
Please note that a course offered twice a week counts as two classes. There are no restrictions on non-credit-bearing Japanese language programs offered by the Japanese Language Education Division. Some non-credit- bearing courses are offered by Faculty of Engineering.
Please note that UTokyo is unable to provide scholarships to USTEP students. Please be well prepared to secure at least monthly funds of ¥120,000 when you apply. Shortly after the announcement of the result, you will be asked to submit the bank balance showing that you have ¥120,000 per month for each month of enrollment at the University of Tokyo. For those students who may encounter financial difficulties, we strongly recommend that students apply for scholarship in their home university or their home country. When participating in an exchange program, it is common to receive scholarships from your home university or country of residence.

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，住宿資訊，請參考此連結。

Exchange studnets may apply for university housing. However, because of limited number of facilities, assignments to university housing is not guaranteed. The International Exchange Group at UTokyo will contact students with details of the procedure after their admission is granted. For further information, please visit Housing Office website.

sections_ordered.label: 申請資格
sections_ordered.text:
日語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
歷年不得有不及格／不通過科目。
GPA 達3.30分以上。
具日語檢定成績 1 級以上。
一般組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
歷年不得有不及格／不通過科目。
GPA 達3.30分以上。
TOEFL iBT 90 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5。

sections_ordered.text:

一學期1名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人)
一般組
一學期0名。本次甄選不開放該校一般組申請

Spring Semester: April to August/September

sections_ordered.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

sections_ordered.label: 注意事項
sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此網頁及Fact Sheet（僅供參考）
Exchange students can choose between the Type U (for undergraduate students) and Type G (for graduate students) programs.
Type U: The Type U program is designed for undergraduate students to take various courses across Faculties and College in which you are interested.
Type G: The Type G program is designed for graduate students. Type G participants will belong to one of the Graduate Schools. Type G students will be able to take various courses or conduct research under the guidance of faculty members. 
語言能力及成績要求：Students who demonstrate excellent academic performance are eligible to apply. Please also note that Type U and Type G may have different requirements. For Type G, please refer to each graduate school prerequisites.
課程資訊：
Type U 課程資訊請參考此連結 
Type G 課程資訊請參考此連結
USTEP Type U students can take only classes that are open for USTEP students. In general they cannot take graduate level classes, but they can take graduate level classes that are listed on Type U course catalogue.
For Type G, it depend on the graduate schools.
USTEP students must register for a minimum of 10 hours worth of classes per week which is equivalent to 12 credits per semester
Students interested in taking seminars offered in “Japanese” and “Japanese and English” at the Faculty of Law are allowed to apply for only one seminar course per semester. 
USTEP Type U students are allowed to take up to two credit-bearing Japanese language classes per week (apply to students enrolling from the spring of 2025 onwards).
Students who request to take three credit-bearing Japanese language courses per week must get special permission by including a document filled out by their home university in the online application process. This application will be reviewed by UTokyo before permission can be granted.
Please note that a course offered twice a week counts as two classes. There are no restrictions on non-credit-bearing Japanese language programs offered by the Japanese Language Education Division. Some non-credit- bearing courses are offered by Faculty of Engineering.
Please note that UTokyo is unable to provide scholarships to USTEP students. Please be well prepared to secure at least monthly funds of ¥120,000 when you apply. Shortly after the announcement of the result, you will be asked to submit the bank balance showing that you have ¥120,000 per month for each month of enrollment at the University of Tokyo. For those students who may encounter financial difficulties, we strongly recommend that students apply for scholarship in their home university or their home country. When participating in an exchange program, it is common to receive scholarships from your home university or country of residence.

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換學生資訊請參考此連結、Fact Sheet（僅供參考）及Brochure
課程資訊請參考此連結、課程大綱請參考此連結、語言課程資訊請見此連結
Since all courses are taught in English, international students are welcome to take any subject matter course in our curriculum. Short-term international students are welcome to take any subject matter course in our curriculum except some courses such as English for Academic Purposes, Study Abroad preparation courses, Teacher's License Program, etc. that are restricted to degree-seeking students. If the course capacity reaches the limit, some students may not be able to register for their requested courses.
Minimum/maximum credits per semester: 12 credits (minimum)/18 credits (maximum)
Estimated cost of living
Insurance: In accordance with immigration law, AIU requires ALL international students to purchase Japanese National Health Insurance (NHI) without any exceptions.
Dining Information: In consideration of students’ busy schedules, AIU requires ALL new students to purchase the 2-week Meal Plan (three meals a day, every day) for the first two weeks after arrival. After this two-week period, students have several meal options.

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

課程資訊
Kyoto University General Exchange (GE) Program guidelines （日語授課）
Kyoto University International Education Program (KUINEP)（英語授課）
語言課程資訊請參考此連結
Faculty/Graduate School of Medicine do not accept exchange students.
Master's or PhD students are not allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units.
Graduate students can take courses offered by Graduate Schools only. They cannot take those offered by Undergraduate Faculties.
Graduate students can concentrate on their research without coursework if they prefer. Graduate students cannot mix coursework and research. They have to choose either coursework style or research.
Minimum academic workload: 7 courses for undergraduates, 4 courses for graduate students.
Levels of KUINEP courses:
Although KUINEP students in principle can choose from every KUINEP courses regardless their year in Home University, we would like to remind you that, for proper choice of your students’ exchange destination, our KUINEP courses are mainly designed for 1st and 2nd year of the undergraduate students of the Japanese educational standards.
Approximately 65% of the courses are targeted at 1st and 2nd year students and the rest are targeted at every student (1st to 4th). For the details, please refer to the "Target year" column in our Course Catalogue.
Departmental Quota Limits
Due to capacity issues, Graduate School of Management will not be able to host more than two students per semester from each partner university from Spring 2024.
Insurance: Students have to buy Japanese National Health Insurance and Liability Insurance, totally around 30 US Dollars.
獎學金資訊請參考此連結、生活費資訊請參考此連結

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結。
 

One on-campus and six off-campus International Houses of Kyoto University, and other dormitories are offered for international students.
Application period starts around three months before their arrival. Students should apply by themselves with their own preferences through online system. Monthly rent is around 100-400 US Dollars.
There are one on-campus and five off-campus International Houses of Kyoto University and other dormitories offered for exchange students. However, they are not guaranteed and are subject to availability due to limited housing capacity. As of Fall 2023, 70% of the exchange students were allocated a dorm room on a lottery-basis. We would appreciate your kind understanding on this matter.

經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

sections_ordered.label: 住宿資訊
sections_ordered.text:
不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結。
 

One on-campus and six off-campus International Houses of Kyoto University, and other dormitories are offered for international students.
Application period starts around three months before their arrival. Students should apply by themselves with their own preferences through online system. Monthly rent is around 100-400 US Dollars.
There are one on-campus and five off-campus International Houses of Kyoto University and other dormitories offered for exchange students. However, they are not guaranteed and are subject to availability due to limited housing capacity. As of Fall 2023, 70% of the exchange students were allocated a dorm room on a lottery-basis. We would appreciate your kind understanding on this matter.

交換生資訊請參考此連結及Fact Sheet（僅供參考）
課程資訊
Kyoto University General Exchange (GE) Program guidelines （日語授課）
Kyoto University International Education Program (KUINEP)（英語授課）
語言課程資訊請參考此連結
Faculty/Graduate School of Medicine do not accept exchange students.
Master's or PhD students are not allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units.
Graduate students can take courses offered by Graduate Schools only. They cannot take those offered by Undergraduate Faculties.
Graduate students can concentrate on their research without coursework if they prefer. Graduate students cannot mix coursework and research. They have to choose either coursework style or research.
Minimum academic workload: 7 courses for undergraduates, 4 courses for graduate students.
Levels of KUINEP courses:
Although KUINEP students in principle can choose from every KUINEP courses regardless their year in Home University, we would like to remind you that, for proper choice of your students’ exchange destination, our KUINEP courses are mainly designed for 1st and 2nd year of the undergraduate students of the Japanese educational standards.
Approximately 65% of the courses are targeted at 1st and 2nd year students and the rest are targeted at every student (1st to 4th). For the details, please refer to the "Target year" column in our Course Catalogue.
Departmental Quota Limits
Due to capacity issues, Graduate School of Management will not be able to host more than two students per semester from each partner university from Spring 2024.
Insurance: Students have to buy Japanese National Health Insurance and Liability Insurance, totally around 30 US Dollars.
獎學金資訊請參考此連結、生活費資訊請參考此連結

註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此連結及Fact Sheet、課程資訊請參考此連結、交換生語言課程資訊請參考此連結（第18頁）
申請前請主動確認是否有足夠課程可選讀：Exchange students at Kansai University follow the "KUGF (Kansai University Global Frontier) Curriculum".
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程。
Students can learn a wide variety of subjects from general cultural subjects to specialist ones through these courses, held in the 13 faculties of Kansai University. These are studied in Japanese and students can expect an improvement in their level of Japanese proficiency as well as learning at a higher level of specialty.
Exchange students whose Japanese language ability is sufficiently high as proven on the Japanese language placement tests can enroll in undergraduate courses offered by each faculty.
Undergraduate exchange students must take at least the number of 7 classes per week. Graduate exchange student does not apply to this regulation.
For Master / PhD students: During the exchange period, students who wish to take practicums at a Graduate School of Kansai University will be accepted as a graduate exchange student only if the graduate school of their choice approves. Students who wish to take practicums at a graduate school must search for a professor suitable for their research theme using “the KANSAI UNIVERSITY System for Academic Information“ and submit a research plan (in either Japanese or English) at the time of application. Regarding acceptance at the graduate level, acceptance may be refused at the discretion of the professors due to inconsistency in research content. In that case, please note that students will be accepted as an undergraduate exchange student. *Graduate courses will not be opened if there are no regular students to take a course of a relevant graduate school.
Special supervisors are assigned to students who wish to perform graduate level research at Kansai University. These supervisors provide support for research activities.  Students who wish to undertake overseas study at the graduate school level must submit a research plan (in either Japanese or English), so please prepare this before submitting your application. In addition, please use the KANSAI UNIVERSITY system for academic information beforehand to search for a special supervisor suitable for your research theme. Graduate courses will not be opened if there are no regular students to take course of a relevant graduate school.
Estimated cost of living: The living expenses necessary to live a normal life in Osaka are around ¥100,000 per month, including dormitory fees. When coming to Japan, please establish a sufficient funding plan.
獎學金、生活費及保險資訊，請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生資訊請參考此連結及此連結、課程資訊請見課程網、院系與課程一覽
The Japanese Language Teacher Training Course is a one-year program. The certificate of completion cannot be issued to students whose exchange period is 6 months. One-semester study abroad students who wish to enroll in this course should consult with the Global Education Section (inbound@acs.u-ryukyu.ac.jp) before applying.
Faculty of Medicine hardly accepts exchange students because their field of study requires highly specialized knowledge. Students may apply to the Faculty of Medicine, but we are unable to guarantee if they accept the students.
Students who wish to apply for the "Major Studies Course", please prepare your research plan before applying. We need to find an academic adviser who can accept your student in his/ her lab. In case there is no suitable academic adviser, we would recommend your student choose another course.
Japan-Okinawa Studies Course: No requirement for Japanese and English. * A daily basis communication in Japanese or English is desirable.
Glocal Leadership Course: A daily basis communication in Japanese or English (CEFR A2 equivalent or above) is necessary.
Japanese Language Teacher Training Course: JLPT N2 (equivalent or above)
Major Studies Course: JLPT N2 (equivalent or above) is required basically. However if your student can find an academic advisor who can give the guidance in a foreign language he/she wishes to use, he/she can conduct his/her research in the foreign language (English, Thai, etc.).*Please confirm the requirement before applying for the program as it may vary depending on the faculties, graduate schools, and programs.
As for the 1. Japan-Okinawa Studies Course, 2. Glocal Leadership Course, 3. Japanese Language Teacher Training Course, even if the students are master/PhD, they will take undergraduate level classes.
Students who apply for the "Major Studies Course" are allowed to take undergraduate Japanese courses only if the academic advisor allows, but they can not get credits.
Minimum academic workload per semester: Students must obtain a total of 14 or more credits.
Living Expenses(p.28), Scholarship(p.24)
Insurance(p.28): All exchange students are required to join the National Health Insurance program immediately after arriving in Japan.

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

住宿及其他資訊.label: 住宿及其他資訊

交換及課程資訊請參考此連結、此連結及Fact Sheet
課程大綱：Undergraduate and Graduate Courses (Japanese Only)
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程
We would accept undergraduate and master level students. Undergraduate students cannot take Master course classes, but master level students can take undergraduate classes.
Minimum academic workload: 6 classes per semester (equal to 10 hours per week)
Insurance: National Health Insurance is compulsory. (This is not a travel insurance) The insurance fee is approximately ¥10,000 for a whole year. 
Estimated cost of living is around ¥572,000 per semester.
Language Courses
Scholarship

課程大綱：Undergraduate and Graduate Courses (Japanese Only)
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程
We would accept undergraduate and master level students. Undergraduate students cannot take Master course classes, but master level students can take undergraduate classes.
Minimum academic workload: 6 classes per semester (equal to 10 hours per week)
Insurance: National Health Insurance is compulsory. (This is not a travel insurance) The insurance fee is approximately ¥10,000 for a whole year. 
Estimated cost of living is around ¥572,000 per semester.

Courses NOT Open to Exchange Students: Practical courses such as Medicine, Pharmacy, Dental Sciences are not open to exchange students. Courses offered by Kyushu University Business School (QBS) are open only to exchange students who are enrolled in QBS.
Master's or PhD students are NOT allowed to take undergraduate courses/subjects/units.
Exchange students must select courses to meet 14 credits or more each semester under Japanese Immigration Law. (More than 20 credits are not recommended.)
生活費資訊請參考此連結、保險資訊請參考此連結
獎學金資訊：
JASSO Scholarship (Japan Student Services Organization) 
MEXT Scholarship (Japanese Government Scholarship)
Only JLCC applicants are eligible to apply.
National Health Insurance: All foreign nationals with a residence permit for a period exceeding 3 months who are students or who are not covered by an employer's social security plan (mutual aid, health insurance) are required to join National Health Insurance. 
Emergency Security Plan (ESP): Emergency Security Plan, which international students enrolled at Kyushu University are required to join, will provide assistance with various medical services. Please note, however, that ESP is not a health insurance, and does not substitute for or replace the National Health Insurance which international students enrolled with a residence card are also required to join.
Cost of Living (monthly average):
Housing and utilities: ¥15,000 - ¥50,000
Food: ¥30,000 (lunch at the school cafeteria runs about ¥400, and students typically prepare their own breakfast and dinner at dormitories)
Local transportation: ¥10,000 (individual spending habits may vary)
Books and supplies: ¥5,000 (instructors typically provide reading materials in class)
Health insurance: ¥2,000
Personal expenses: ¥20,000 (individual spending habits may vary)

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

交換生資訊請參考此連結
Keio International Programme (KIP): A comprehensive programme designed for undergraduate and master's graduate students who want to study about Japan and East/Southeast Asia in English and take Japanese language courses as well. Students with advanced Japanese proficiency may also take undergraduate courses in Japanese offered by faculties.
Japanese Language Programme (JLP): An Intensive programme for students (Japanese Language learners) who wish to focus on Japanese language learning.
Graduate Studies Program(GSP): This program is intended to be open to master's graduate students who wish to take graduate-level courses through affiliation with a Graduate School of Keio University.

Note:
- Research Program students must register for a minimum of 7 courses per semester.
- There will be no academic advisors for each student.
- Students who choose this program are not allowed to change programs.

(If PhD students wish to apply, please contact us in advance since it may be difficult to accommodate a Ph.D. student.)
課程資訊請參考此連結、語言課程資訊請參考此連結
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程
Departments/programs/faculties/schools NOT open to exchange students: 
Physical education courses
Teacher training courses
Courses in the School of Medicine
Foreign language courses
Japanese language is excluded.
Keio Business School (KBS) courses 
該校確認雖一般組之KIP計畫無申請系所之限制，但仍不開放交換學生修習該校商學院及醫學院課程，學生需自行確認可滿足修課標準，且不保證選課。
Academic Workload: KIP/JLP students must register for a minimum of 7 courses.
Health Insurance
Transfer students who wish to apply for the JLP must have completed at least one semester at a home university (nominating institution) at the time of application. The student must be able to submit a transcript and a recommendation letter from the home university.
生活費資訊，請參考此連結

日本區重要提醒.label: 日本區重要提醒
日本區重要提醒.text:
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，須依照所錄取之語言要求（JLPT、IELTS或TOEFL iBT），來遞交交換學校之交換入學申請文件。例如：以JLPT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之一般交換學生計畫（意即以日語授課之課程）；以IELTS或TOEFL iBT語言條件取得交換資格者，須申請該校之英語課程交換學生計畫（通常是國際學部專門開設給國際學生的英語授課課程）。
經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請（包括但不限於：原先錄取日文授課計畫，改為英文授課計畫）。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格，並受罰金及罰則約束。
若該校提供兩種或以上不同語言的交換學生計畫，交換生名額是分開計算，不同語言條件之交換入學申請，亦由該校不同的委員會審查。

住宿及其他資訊.label: 住宿及其他資訊
住宿及其他資訊.text: 不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結。

sections_ordered.label: 申請資格
sections_ordered.text:
日語組， Japanese Language Programme (JLP), Research Programme (RP)
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.70分以上，該校確認日語組計畫無申請系所之限制，但仍不開放交換學生修習該校商學院及醫學院課程，學生需自行確認可滿足修課標準，且不保證選課。
具日語檢定成績 1 級以上。
一般組， Keio International Program (KIP)
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.70分以上，該校確認雖KIP計畫無申請系所之限制，但仍不開放交換學生修習該校商學院及醫學院課程，學生需自行確認可滿足修課標準，且不保證選課。
TOEFL iBT 79 (接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0。

(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人)

Spring Semester: March - July

sections_ordered.label: 註冊繳費
sections_ordered.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

sections_ordered.label: 注意事項
sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換生資訊請參考此連結
Keio International Programme (KIP): A comprehensive programme designed for undergraduate and master's graduate students who want to study about Japan and East/Southeast Asia in English and take Japanese language courses as well. Students with advanced Japanese proficiency may also take undergraduate courses in Japanese offered by faculties.
Japanese Language Programme (JLP): An Intensive programme for students (Japanese Language learners) who wish to focus on Japanese language learning.
Graduate Studies Program(GSP): This program is intended to be open to master's graduate students who wish to take graduate-level courses through affiliation with a Graduate School of Keio University.

Note:
- Research Program students must register for a minimum of 7 courses per semester.
- There will be no academic advisors for each student.
- Students who choose this program are not allowed to change programs.

(If PhD students wish to apply, please contact us in advance since it may be difficult to accommodate a Ph.D. student.)
課程資訊請參考此連結、語言課程資訊請參考此連結
在具備相關領域之背景知識及選課標準的前提下，交換學生可跨領域選課，研究所學生可選修大學部課程
Departments/programs/faculties/schools NOT open to exchange students: 
Physical education courses
Teacher training courses
Courses in the School of Medicine
Foreign language courses
Japanese language is excluded.
Keio Business School (KBS) courses 
該校確認雖一般組之KIP計畫無申請系所之限制，但仍不開放交換學生修習該校商學院及醫學院課程，學生需自行確認可滿足修課標準，且不保證選課。
Academic Workload: KIP/JLP students must register for a minimum of 7 courses.
Health Insurance
Transfer students who wish to apply for the JLP must have completed at least one semester at a home university (nominating institution) at the time of application. The student must be able to submit a transcript and a recommendation letter from the home university.
生活費資訊，請參考此連結
