一般組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
TOEFL iBT 80 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5。
不接受文學院人類學系、文學院人類學研究所、社會科學院社會學系、社會科學院社會學研究所、理學院、醫學院、公共衛生學院之學生申請。
quota_text:
一學期10名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 10 人)
calendar_text:
1st semester: August - December 
2nd semester: January - May
notes_text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
交換資訊請參考此連結
Faculties NOT open to exchange students: 
Faculty of Sociology and Anthropology
Faculty of Science and Technology
Faculty of Fine and Applied Arts
Faculty of Medicine
Faculty of Allied Health Sciences
Faculty of Dentistry
Faculty of Nursing
Faculty of Public Health
Faculty of Pharmacy
Faculty of Learning Sciences and Education
Puey Ungphakorn School of Development Studies
Chulabhorn International College of Medicine
Thammasat Institute of Area Studies
Language Institute
Please note as certain programs offer limited spaces and are competitive, an exchange student must be flexible in enrolling in alternative courses.
Some programs at TU will only send the soft copy of transcript due to the paperless policy
There are two campuses available for the exchange program. Some programs are located at Tha Prachan Campus, someare at Rangsit Campus. 
The Southeast Asian Studies Program is available in the Fall semester only. The other programs are available for bothsemesters.
Courses from Faculty of Journalism and Mass Communication are available at both campuses. Please carefully read thedetails in the course sheet.
If students wish to enroll in Thai Language Program at Faculty of Liberal Arts, it is required to have either majored orminored in Thai language or have successfully passed an interview conducted by the Thai Language Division.
Workload: Exchange students must enroll at least 3 courses (equivalent to 9 credits) in one discipline at Thammasat university in order to be recognized as the major and must remain in these three courses throughout their study period at Thammasat university. The maximum credits exchange students are allowed to enroll are 18 credits (counting from credits gained through the major and crossing disciplines)
保險資訊：Students must submit a proof of medical or health insurance which cover the whole period of stay in Thailand. The insurance can be arranged upon their preference.
It is strongly recommended an international student must hold by themselves an insurance to cover all medical and accident cost.
Cost estimates per month: 16,000 THB appro

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一/大二/大三/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
TOEFL iBT 79 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 (聽 5.5 讀 5.5 寫 5.5 說 5.5)。
不接受電機資訊學院電機工程學系、電機資訊學院電機工程學研究所之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期4名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 4 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text: 該校年曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
各項交換資訊請參考此網頁 
Maximum load per semester: Undergraduates 22 credits (7-8 courses); Postgraduates 6 credits (2 course)
Departments/programs/faculties/schools NOT open to exchange students: Education and Electrical Engineering
The Politics and Global Studies (PGS) program has limited capacity.
BBA program at Chulalongkorn Business School has limited capacity for Fall Semester.
Exchange students majoring in Thai who wish to attend the Department of Thai in the Faculty of Arts are required to submit the results of a Thai language proficiency test. They must demonstrate strong fluency in all four language skills — listening, speaking, reading, and writing. Therefore, students applying to the Department of Thai are typically expected to provide a letter, document, or test result from their Thai Language Center or Thai Department certifying their proficiency in all four skills. We also recommend that the student write a Statement of Purpose (SOP) in Thai. This will allow the department to better understand student's proficiency in the language and assess their suitability for the program. Submitting the English Language test is optional.
Please note that each program/faculty has its own requirements which all students have to abide to and they have to carefully go through these requirements. Some programs strictly require a language certificate but for some programs, language requirements are flexible. Thus, the OIA decided to recommend that all students have an IELTS or TOEFL score record as mentioned
Study in arts, humanities & social sciences subject area, usually require a minimum score of 6.5 in overall band (Depends) with a minimum of 6.0 in each band. Study in physical science, life sciences, sciences & technology subject area, usually require a minimum score of 6.0 in overall band (Depends) with a minimum of 5.5 in each band.
Exchange students are required to arrange their own insurance against illnesses and accidents covering the period of their stay in Chulalongkorn University.
生活花費：Total (USD) : 5,510；Accommodation : 2,100 (+ water & electricity fees)、Food : 1,500、Transportation : 500、Textbooks : 150、Insurance : 60、Miscellaneous : 1.200 (traveling, shopping, etc.)
簽證資訊請參考此連結

住宿及其他資訊.label: 住宿及其他資訊
住宿及其他資訊.text: 不保證住宿，住宿資訊請參考此連結。

TOEFL iBT 80 (寫 23 不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 (寫 6.0)。
只限管理學院、社會科學院經濟學研究所之學生申請。

學校年曆.text:
Fall Semester: July - December
Spring Semester: January - May

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
交換生資訊請參考此連結
Only for School of Management
Medium of instruction: English
Our institution does not offer undergraduate program, only Master programs.
Student has to carefully check the syllabus of each course when it comes to registration as pre-requisites might be needed.
Minimum academic workload per semester: minimum 3 credits to 15 credits per semester
Exchange students are not eligible to work.
Medical Insurance: AIT has a standard insurance plan that covers certain costs of hospitalization, outpatient treatment, dental and personal accident but not major medical expenses. An initial premium for 6 months or equivalent to one semester costs THB 1,250 (approximately USD 40).  Students who have existing medical plans can submit a waiver request at the AIT Admission Office.
Living cost: The estimated living expense is THB 15,000 (approximately USD 480) per month for meals, accommodation, books, excluding tuition fee.

一般組
本校大一/大二/大三/碩一(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達2.50分以上。
TOEFL iBT 80 (接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 或 全民英檢中高級。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期2名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
該校年曆請參考此連結
Fall Semester: September - January
Spring Semester: February - May

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力等規定為該校之最低門檻，同學需自行確認最新資訊，如語言能力及成績是否符合該校要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識等，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。本表所提供之資訊如有與交換學校／國家／地區最新公告不符之處，申請學生應以交換學校／國家／地區之最新公告為準。經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格。
交換生資訊請參考此連結
課程資訊請參考此連結
Minimum workload: 15 ECTS per semester
The average monthly expenses are estimated as 450 750 euro per month including room, board and other general expenditures.
All exchange students should possess current and up to date medical insurance before arrival. International students with a private medical insurance need to confirm that their insurance covers the contingency of contagion in the event of a pandemic and th e expenses that may occur during their stay in Turkey.

Fall Semester: September - January
Spring Semester: February - May

sections_ordered.label: 註冊繳費
sections_ordered.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

sections_ordered.label: 注意事項
sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力等規定為該校之最低門檻，同學需自行確認最新資訊，如語言能力及成績是否符合該校要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識等，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。本表所提供之資訊如有與交換學校／國家／地區最新公告不符之處，申請學生應以交換學校／國家／地區之最新公告為準。經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格。

課程資訊請參考此連結
Minimum workload: 15 ECTS per semester
The average monthly expenses are estimated as 450 750 euro per month including room, board and other general expenditures.
All exchange students should possess current and up to date medical insurance before arrival. International students with a private medical insurance need to confirm that their insurance covers the contingency of contagion in the event of a pandemic and th e expenses that may occur during their stay in Turkey.

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一/大一/大二/大三/大四/大五/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
學士生 GPA 達2.70分以上；
研究生 GPA 達3.30分以上。
學士生 TOEFL iBT 79 (寫 22 不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5；
研究生 TOEFL iBT 79 (寫 22 不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5；。
不接受理學院心理學研究所、社會科學院經濟學研究所、社會科學院社會學研究所、管理學院財務金融學研究所、管理學院資訊管理學研究所之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text: 一學期0名。（因交換學生往來不平衡，本次甄選不開放申請。）

該校年曆請參考此連結
Fall semester: September to January 
Spring semester: February to June

交換生資訊請參考此連結
課程資訊請參考此連結
Offered Programs
The MA/MS programs below are closed for Exchange students' applications: Psychology (MA), Sociology (MA), Automotive Engineering* (MS), Asian Studies* (MA), Construction Engineering and Management* (M.S.), Engineering and Technology Management* (M.S.), Financial Engineering* (M.S.), Fuel and Energy Technologies MS Program* (MA), Mechatronics Engineering* (M.S.), Medical Systems and Informatics* (M.S.), Software Engineering Program* (M.S.)  Sustainable Turism Management (M.A.), Business Information Systems* (M.A.), Economics and Finance* (M.A.), Executive M.B.A*
Some graduate programs are not available to non-degree students (Erasmus, Exchange, and Visitor) as they have additional tuition and fees. The codes for these courses are as follows: ASIA, ASIL, EF, ADEX, MIR, INCT, BIS, FE
交換生修課限制：minimum 2 courses
All exchange students are expected to select at least two courses from the academic unit with which they are registered.
Cost of living: Approximately 1000 Euro per month.
There are Turkish language courses designed specifically for international students on several levels offered by Turkish Language and Literature department with TKF 111, 112, 221, 222, 217, 315, 317

住宿資訊.text: Students must arrange for housing on their own without Housing Office support.

交換資訊請參考此連結、Fact Sheet
課程資訊請參考此連結
Graduate students need to submit an approval letter jointly signed by their thesis advisors and Graduate School Director for their participation to the program. We can consult their requirements with our Faculties during your student's application at Bilkent University.
The language of instructions at Bilkent is English except few courses at the Faculty of Law. International students can take few courses in the Law Faculty that are in English. We can consult this during your student's application at Bilkent University.
The normal course load is 5 courses with 15 Bilkent credits for Bilkent Students. Your student can register up to 6 courses. ECTS credits of the courses are available at course offering lists.
交換生語言課程資訊，請參考此連結。
保險資訊，請參考此連結。Incoming exchange students must be subscribed to a health insurance package valid in Turkey before their departure. This is a also a prerequisite for residency permit application.

notes_text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力等規定為該校之最低門檻，同學需自行確認最新資訊，如語言能力及成績是否符合該校要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識等，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。本表所提供之資訊如有與交換學校／國家／地區最新公告不符之處，申請學生應以交換學校／國家／地區之最新公告為準。經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格。
交換資訊請參考此連結、Fact Sheet
課程資訊請參考此連結
Graduate students need to submit an approval letter jointly signed by their thesis advisors and Graduate School Director for their participation to the program. We can consult their requirements with our Faculties during your student's application at Bilkent University.
The language of instructions at Bilkent is English except few courses at the Faculty of Law. International students can take few courses in the Law Faculty that are in English. We can consult this during your student's application at Bilkent University.
The normal course load is 5 courses with 15 Bilkent credits for Bilkent Students. Your student can register up to 6 courses. ECTS credits of the courses are available at course offering lists.
交換生語言課程資訊，請參考此連結。
保險資訊，請參考此連結。Incoming exchange students must be subscribed to a health insurance package valid in Turkey before their departure. This is a also a prerequisite for residency permit application.

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力等規定為該校之最低門檻，同學需自行確認最新資訊，如語言能力及成績是否符合該校要求、查詢是否有足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識等，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。本表所提供之資訊如有與交換學校／國家／地區最新公告不符之處，申請學生應以交換學校／國家／地區之最新公告為準。經甄選錄取獲得本校推薦資格之交換生，不得於取得該校入學許可後，要求變更已取得的入學許可條件；或者是交換申請被該校拒絕後，要求以另一種條件重新提出申請。如有以上情事者，將直接取消其錄取資格。

課程資訊請參考此連結
不開放交換生選填之課程：Music and Fine Arts, Turkish Language and History, Media Studies
Academic Catalog
METU will accept graduate students for exchange ONLY if:a) They agree to take courses at our institution. Or,b) They find a Research Supervisor at METU (by themselves) who is ready to accept to study with the student. In this case, the student should submit an acceptance letter (which can be downloaded from the ICO website) signed by the agreed supervisor, department exchange coordinator, and department chair during the application period. Without this document, the student will not be able to conduct research at METU. Please note that it is not possible for ICO to assign academic supervisors to research students. Please also bear in mind that graduate students can study a part of their thesis, but they cannot submit the final version of the thesis and graduate from METU; those students are expected to present their thesis after their departure and graduate from their home institutions.
International Joint-Degree Programs are not open to exchange students.
We kindly expect exchange students to take around 4-5 courses, since one semester at METU corresponds to that amount of workload in general.
Estimated cost of living
Health Insurance: Students must have their own health insurance valid in Turkey.
交換生語言課程資訊，請參考此連結。Exchange students can take elective language courses including Turkish.

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
德語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
TOEFL iBT 85 (接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 或 全民英檢中高級，僅具備英語能力者請務必詳閱注意事項說明。
或
具德語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期2名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Winter Semester: 1st week of October-January 31st (Start of the compulsory orientation programme: 2nd or 3rd week of September)
Summer Semester: 1st week of March-June 30th (Start of the compulsory orientation programme: 2nd week of February)
行事曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
該校社會科學及法律領域英語授課課程極有限，僅具英語能力者選填前請務必確認是否有足夠課程可供選讀
電機及醫學領域為全德文授課
Information of incoming exchange student information
Course information (⚠️please pay attention to the study field and language of instruction)
Exchange students are expected to take a minimum workload of 20 ECTS credits per semester.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
JKU offers a pre-semester programme including an Intensive German Language Course (3 ECTS credits), Cultural Sensitivity Training (2 ECTS credits), Campus tour, excursions etc. in order to provide the students with all necessary information and assist them with the required procedures.
Living costs are currently estimated between € 800 and € 1250, including € 300 to € 750 for accommodation, € 350 for food, and € 150 for other expenses.
Information about visa regulations can be found on our website.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: The International Welcome Center arranges accommodation at the various student dormitories within walking distance from campus. For detailed information please visit the homepage.

申請資格.text:
法語組
本校大一/大二/碩一/碩二(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
TOEFL iBT 80 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0，僅具備英語能力者，務必自行確認是否有足夠英語授課課程可供選讀。
或
具法語檢定成績 B1(中級) 級以上，B2 recommended。
不接受醫學院、公共衛生學院、法律學院之學生申請。

名額.text: 兩學期0名。

Lectures: mid-September to December
Examinations: January

2nd term (Spring term - February to June)
Lectures: February to May
Examinations: June
Examination resit period: end of August to early September

Academic Calendar
Fall semester typically starts the third week of September and ends around the end of January.
Spring semester typically starts the second or third week of February and ends 30 June.

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
法語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
具法語檢定成績 B1(中級) 級以上，B2 recommended.。
不接受管理學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期2名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Academic Calendar
Semester 1: September to January
Semester 2: February to June
Full academic year: September to June

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
該校以法文授課為主，英文授課數量極少，請特別留意。
Website of incoming exchange student information
Link to course catalogue index
Fields of Study: Philosophy and Social Sciences / Letters, Translation Interpreting and Communication (including the Translation and Interpreting School) / Law and Criminology / Economics and Management / Engineering / Psychological and Educational Sciences / Architecture / Sciences / Medicine and Public Health / Pharmacy / Motor Sciences
Solvay, Medicine, ISTI, these faculties sign their own convention directely with their partners. Solvay Brussels school of Economics and Management 與本校管理學院簽有院級交換合約，因此本志願不接受管院學生申請。

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
The University offers a wide range of French courses available for international students (free of charge), prior to and during the academic year, to help its international students improve their language skills
NON-EU students are required to apply for an International Student Health Insurance Plan prior to their arrival in the host country. The health insurance plan must cover them for the entire duration of their stay. Students hosted at ULB will not be granted a visa if they cannot provide proof of coverage by a suitable health insurance.
Non-European citizens studying in an European country need a visa for their mobility in Belgium. Once you have received your acceptance letter from ULB, please contact the Belgium Embassy.
Cost of Living:
Student private accommodation (off campus): from 500 € to 800 € per month
Food: 250 €/month
Public transport
Practical Information for Incoming Students
International Student guide

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: ULB offers a wide choice of accommodation in its own halls of residence and private halls of residence, either on one of its three campuses (Solbosch, La Plaine, Erasme) or off-campus (with over 2,400 rooms or flats). The Housing Office will help you to find a suitable accommodation and advise you on many aspects of student housing.

Campus Location.label: Campus Location
Campus Location.text:
ULB has 4 campuses and 4 sites in Brussels and the Charleroi region.
> Maps and directions

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
The average cost of living per month
Depends on many factors, but Czech Republic is one of the most affordable country. Prague, as a capital, could be pricy but still it is more affordable than basically every country in western Europe.
Information about VISA
Czech language courses

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Please note that exchange students need to have an accommodation agreement to apply for the visa.

Not guaranteed, but students can apply for housing. Accommodation of exchange students in student dormitories is arranged by the receiving faculties. Most exchange students are accommodated at the Větrník, Hvězda or Kajetánka dormitories. A catalogue of dormitories are available at the website.

Other Information.label: Other Information
Other Information.text:
More information can be found on:
Study Charles
Online CU news
Study in Prague

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Living in Copenhagen
Health and safety in Denmark
VISA application information
These are rough estimates of what it costs a single person to live in Copenhagen:
Housing, including utilities: typically 4,000- 10,000 DKK/month
Food and daily expenses: 2,000 - 3,000 DKK/month
Books and other study materials: 1,500-2,000 DKK/semester
Local public transportation: 380-1,000 DKK/month if you travel every day*
Leisure activities: 2,000 DKK/month
*To save money, we recommend that you consider buying a used bicycle, which you can get for around 800-1,500 DKK.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: Not guaranteed, but students can apply for housing. For housing information, please check this website.

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student information
Course catalogue
Faculties and Units
Fields NOT offered at the University of Helsinki: Business, Engineering, Nursing, Architecture and Fine Arts. 
Dentistry is NOT open to exchange students.
Restrictions in attending courses
University level bilateral exchange students are required to choose the majority of their courses from one faculty, closest to their educational background. Exchange students need to have sufficient prior academic background in the disciplines taught at the receiving Faculty. Within one faculty, they can choose courses from several study programmes. One of the study programmes will be chosen as the host study programme for the student. Students are welcome to choose some courses from other faculties, as well, if they meet the requirements for the courses.
The following have a more extensive requirement:
The prerequisite for Medicine is two full years of pre-clinical and one full year of clinical studies. In Psychology (Faculty of Medicine), the prerequisite is two full years of university-level studies in Psychology. Medicine and Psychology are also highly restricted and access to them cannot be guaranteed to exchange students admitted via university-wide agreements.
For Life Sciences (the faculties of Agriculture and Forestry, Biological and Environmental Sciences, and Pharmacy), the prerequisite for studies in Helsinki is two years of completed university studies in the field in question.
Please note that some faculties/study programmes offer courses in English mainly on Master's level (suitable for advanced Bachelor students as well): Agriculture and Forestry, Biological and Environmental Sciences, Geography, Law, Pharmacy, and Translational Medicine.
Minimum academic workload per semester: 20 ECTS. One ECTS credit equals 27 hours of work, including both lectures and homework.

申請資格.text:
法語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
TOEFL iBT 90 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5 或 全民英檢中高級，僅具備英語能力者，請詳閱注意事項。
或
具法語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期3名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 3 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Fall Semester
Humanities: September 15th to December 20th
Sciences: September 15th to January 24th
Spring Semester
Humanities: January 20th to May 10th
Sciences: January 20th to June 20th
Orientation / Recommended Arrival Day
Fall Semester: From August 30th to September 14th
Spring Semester: From January 16th to January 19th

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Prepare your stay at ENS-PSL (Everthing you need to know before your exchange to ENS-PSL)
The course catalogues are updated in September. Students may prepare their choice of courses based on the current year's catalogue, published on the website.
The number of humanities courses taught in English is very limited.
The École normale supérieure - PSL is a selective and demanding institution. A very high standard is required of students. They must feel at ease with the teachers, other students, and their discipline.
Exchange students who are not eligible for the European Health Card (EIHC) and who are not covered by national health plans must have private health insurance.

法語課程.label: 法語課程
法語課程.text:
ECLA (ENS-PSL Languages Center) offers an intensive French course to international students during the first two weeks of September. The course is free of charge, for all levels (A1 to C2) and includes cultural outings.

A similar course in a shorter format (3 days) is offered in mid-January for students studying abroad during the Spring Semester.

Exchange students may also attend French courses throughout the semester/year and validate ECTS credits.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: Students must arrange for housing on their own. The ENS-PSL International Office will provide a list of useful links for students looking for accommodation in Paris. (2025.11.05更新)

該校絕大多數課程為法語授課，僅有少數英語授課的碩士班課程。僅持英檢成績申請者仍須具備A1法語能力（正式語檢成績或老師推薦信）。

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
法語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達2.70分以上。
TOEFL iBT 79 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 或 全民英檢中高級，僅具備英語能力者，請自行確認是否具備足夠英語授課課程。
或
具法語檢定成績 B1(中級) 級以上，For health and human sciences, education, economics, management: B2。
不接受醫學院、公共衛生學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期4名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 4 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Fall Semester: September – December/January
Spring Semester: January/February – June/July
(depends on the programme)

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student information
Course catalogue:
Law and political science
Economics and management
Please note, certain restrictions exist for the following subjects: Law and political science, Economics and management and Science and Technologies
Dental science, Medicine and Odontology are NOT open to exchange students

links.text: Law and political science, Economics and management

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
VISA application information
Medical insurance: visitors from outside Europe need to subscribe to the French Social Security before the enrollment procedure (directly to the CPAM) unless they can provide private insurance with no limit of reimbursement for the entire mobility period.
該校有3個校區，詳細資訊如下，Campus Carreire為法語授課，Campus Pessac跟Campus Talence有較多英語課程，該校不建議跨校區選課，同學須自行確認欲申請的校區是否符合修課要求！
Campus Carreire & Victoire: 
Life and Health Sciences (Dentistry, Medicine, Pharmacy, Public health)
Social Sciences (Anthropology, Education, Psychology, Sociology)
STAPS (Sciences and Techniques of Physical and Sport Activities
Graduate School of Teaching and Education (INSPE)
Campus Pessac/Montesquieu:
Law, Political Science, Economics, Management
University School of Management (IAE)
University Technology Institute (IUT)
Campus Talence/Peixotto:
Sciences and Technology (Biology, Chemistry, Informatics, Mathematics, Physics, Earth Science, Engineering)
University Technology Institute (IUT)
Institute of Vine and Wine Sciences (ISVV)

申請資格.text:
法語組
本校大三/大四/大五/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
TOEFL iBT 80 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0，僅具備英語能力者，務必自行確認是否有足夠英語授課課程可供選讀。
或
具法語檢定成績 B1(中級) 級以上，B2 level is highly recommended to follow courses and take exams comfortably。
只限理學院、工學院、電機資訊學院、生物資源暨農學院、重點科技研究學院之學生申請。

(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人)

1st semester: Start of September – Start of February
2nd semester: Start of February – June
Welcome Day is organized the week before the start of 1st semester.

Website for incoming exchange student information
Course catalogue. Please be aware that you must choose one programme and cannot mix courses from different programmes
Language courses for exchange students: Available for free as part of the curriculum (if extra lessons are needed, fees would then apply and be paid by the student)
Only the following programs are open to exchange students:
Engineering Program – Year 2
Engineering Program – Year 3
Master's Degrees
For M2-level students (3rd year of the Engineering curriculum), exchanges can only be carried out during the Fall semester or the full academic year.

Website of incoming exchange student information
Course catalogue
A French language certificate of B2 is required for Law-Economics and Management Faculty
The following information is intended for students coming to study in one of the constituent faculty of Université Paris-Saclay（僅具備英語能力者，請務必留意授課語言）
Faculty of Law, Economics, Management (Jean Monnet Faculty)
Faculty of Sciences
Faculty of Medicine
Faculty of Pharmacy
Faculty of Sport Sciences
Polytech Paris-Saclay School of Engineering
IUT Cachan (Cachan Technical Institute of Electronics, Mechanical Engineering, and Computing for Industry)
IUT Orsay (Orsay Technical Institute of Computer Science, Chemistry, and Measures and Instrumentation)
IUT Sceaux (Sceaux Technical Institute of Business, Administration, and International Commerce)
Medicine and sport sciences are NOT open to exchange students

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Université Paris-Saclay offers French language courses, called "FLE" (French as a foreign language) for incoming international students. An intensive one-week course is offered at the beginning of the autumn semester in addition to weekly courses held throughout the academic year.
Health insurance is mandatory in order to study in France. Non-EU citizens can obtain information and assistance on this web
Université Paris-Saclay has many cultural and sports-orientated activities to complement student life on campus.
The Buddy Programme is a student-operated association sponsored by the Head Office of International Relations that enables incoming international students to meet French residents and other international students.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Accommodation is not guaranteed.
Paris-Saclay University suggests resources to help in your housing search. Students generally choose to live with roommates in a shared apartment or in a university residence. Housing in university residencies is limited. See here for more information.

sections_ordered.text:
法語組
本校大四/大五/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），建議具理工背景同學選填。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
TOEFL iBT 90 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5 或 全民英檢中高級，該校絕大多數為法語授課，僅具備英語能力者需同時具A2法語能力。
或
具法語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上。
不接受醫學院、公共衛生學院之學生申請。

(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人)

Course catalogue

The following information is intended for students coming to study in one of the constituent faculty of Université Paris-Saclay（僅具備英語能力者，請務必留意授課語言）
Faculty of Law, Economics, Management (Jean Monnet Faculty)
Faculty of Sciences
Faculty of Medicine
Faculty of Pharmacy
Faculty of Sport Sciences
Polytech Paris-Saclay School of Engineering
IUT Cachan (Cachan Technical Institute of Electronics, Mechanical Engineering, and Computing for Industry)
IUT Orsay (Orsay Technical Institute of Computer Science, Chemistry, and Measures and Instrumentation)
IUT Sceaux (Sceaux Technical Institute of Business, Administration, and International Commerce)
Medicine and sport sciences are NOT open to exchange students

sections_ordered.label: 實用資訊
sections_ordered.text:
Université Paris-Saclay offers French language courses, called "FLE" (French as a foreign language) for incoming international students. An intensive one-week course is offered at the beginning of the autumn semester in addition to weekly courses held throughout the academic year.
Health insurance is mandatory in order to study in France. Non-EU citizens can obtain information and assistance on this web
Université Paris-Saclay has many cultural and sports-orientated activities to complement student life on campus.
The Buddy Programme is a student-operated association sponsored by the Head Office of International Relations that enables incoming international students to meet French residents and other international students.

法語組
本校碩一/碩二(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
TOEFL iBT 90 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5，僅具備英語能力者，請詳閱注意事項。
或
具法語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上。
只限理學院、工學院、電機資訊學院、重點科技研究學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期3名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 3 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Fall semester: Early September to end of January/mid-February (depending on program)
Spring semester: mid-February to May

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Most of the courses are taught in French. It is thus a requirement that all degree students and visiting students are proficient in French.
Website of incoming exchange student information
Course catalogue: Students are NOT allowed to mix courses from different programmes, tracks (for example in Master sgm) or years.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Once you are admitted, the PSL Welcome Desk team is here to direct you and give you advice to ensure a quick and peaceful setup in Paris.
Monthly budget in Paris: 800 € / month
Housing: around 350-550 € / month + two months deposit
Meals: 250 € / month
Health insurance (depending on student status): 215 € / year
Health insurance is compulsory. All students must show proof of health insurance coverage for the duration of their stay at Mines ParisTech (i.e. a European health insurance card, etc.). Student health insurance in France is free but every student should register on this website. International students should also be covered with a civil liability insurance for physical injury or material damages caused by the students. This insurance is provided by Mines Paris.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: Non-degree exchange students and visitors can apply for a room at the "Cité internationale" or Crous residency through PSL housing service, but we cannot guarantee a spot.

Health and prevention
Exchange students will have to be insured (accident, disease, civil responsibility). Students under 28 have to subscribe to the student social security (free of charge).

法語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
學士生 GPA 達3.30分以上；
研究生 GPA 達3.30分以上。
學士生 具法語檢定成績 B1(中級) 級以上；
研究生 具法語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上。
不接受醫學院、公共衛生學院之學生申請。

sections_ordered.label: 名額
sections_ordered.text:
一學期4名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 4 人)

sections_ordered.label: 註冊繳費
sections_ordered.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

sections_ordered.label: 注意事項
sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
該校交換計畫綜合資訊請參考此網頁
Consult the training offer of the Sorbonne Paris Nord university as well as the website of the department in which you wish to study.
Exchange students are expected to take at least 2 courses per semester

sections_ordered.label: 實用資訊
sections_ordered.text:
Language courses for exchange students
Living Cost
Health and prevention
Exchange students will have to be insured (accident, disease, civil responsibility). Students under 28 have to subscribe to the student social security (free of charge).

sections_ordered.label: 住宿資訊
sections_ordered.text: To be able to benefit from accomodation, the student must indicate on the Application Form their wish to have a Crous room. Crous Créteil allocates rooms according to their available spaces. Between 350 and 550 €.

sections_ordered.label: Welcome Desk
sections_ordered.text: You will find all the useful information to best prepare your visit and your arrival in France and in USPN.

name_zh_detail: 巴黎薩克雷高等師範學校

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
法語組
本校大三/大四/大五/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.70分以上。
TOEFL iBT 95 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5，僅具備英語能力者，請詳閱注意事項。
或
具法語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上，Bachelor in Economics/ Humanities require C1 because courses are taught only in French except the Master of Economics in English。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text: 一學期0名。（因交換學生往來不平衡，本次甄選不開放申請）

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
It really depends on the training chosen but usually,
Fall semester: Start of september - End of december/End of January.
Spring semester: Start of February - End of June

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
該校主要為法語授課，同學務必自行留意該校英文授課數量。
Website of incoming exchange student information
Training offer (特別留意授課領域及語言)
Master's programmes
Research Laboratories
Language of instruction: 
Coursework: A strong knowledge of French is generally required for candidates interested in pursuing the coursework. Courses in the English language, when available, are indicated on the departments' websites.
Research training: A basic knowledge of French may be sufficient for candidates proposing scientific research projects. A good understanding of English is required.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Language Centre
ENS Paris-Saclay's welcome booklet
To come to France, a minimum of 615€ per month is required by the French administration when applying for a student visa. For your first month in France, remember to bring enough money with you. You will have to pay your first month's rent, your deposit, and what you need to live. An amount of 1900 to 2100 € is recommended. For the rest of the stay, it is good to have at least 500€ in addition to your rent.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: Not guaranteed, but students can apply for housing. More information here.

法語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達2.75分以上。
TOEFL iBT 92 (接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5 或 全民英檢中高級 或 培力英檢B2(中高級)。
或
具法語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上。
不接受醫學院、法律學院法律學研究所、法律學院科際整合法律學研究所之學生申請。

(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Academic Calendar
Semester 1 or Fall Semester: it starts from end of August or early September and ends in December
Semester 2 or Spring Semester: it starts from early January and ends between April and end of May

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

Website for incoming exchange student information
List of courses taught in English offered in our faculties and schools on this link or through the English version of our website.
The following areas of study are NOT open to exchange students: Medicine – Midwifery – Nursing – Physiotherapy – Chiropody – Faculty of Law: 2nd year of Master (Master de Droit) – Digital animations and video games (open to exchange students on request).
Students can choose to study in two different faculties/schools during their exchange.
We recommend taking a minimum of 20 credits ECTS per semester
Université Catholique de Lille includes 5 Faculties and 18 schools and Colleges :
o Law, Economics, Business & Management
o Arts, Humanities, Theology, Ethics & Education
o Health and Social Care
o Science and Engineering
o Innovation and Design Thinking

name_zh: 巴黎中央理工學院-電力高等學院
name_zh_detail: 巴黎中央理工學院-電力高等學院

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
法語組
本校大三/大四/大五/碩一/碩二(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），須具備扎實工程或電機基礎。
TOEFL iBT 85 (接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 或 全民英檢中高級。
或
具法語檢定成績 B1(中級) 級以上。
只限理學院、工學院、電機資訊學院、生物資源暨農學院、重點科技研究學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期3名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 3 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Fall semester: end of August 2026 - end of January 2027
Spring semester: end of January 2027 - end of June 2027

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
A solid background in Mathematics and Physics is required
Engineering Program 1st year courses are NOT open for exchange.
We accommodate exchange students within the 2nd year of our Engineering Program, equivalent to the 1st year of Master's level (i.e. the 4th year of higher education studies). All applicants will be required to have completed at least 3 years at the home institution before coming to CentraleSupélec.
Please note that most Fall semester and 3rd-year courses are taught in French.
Study Programmes in English. For further details or questions, please contact: julie.castel@centralesupelec.fr

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Interested students can take intensive French classes at Cavilam - Alliance Française of Vichy prior to the start of the semester.
The estimated budget for a full-year mobility is at least €700/month, including accommodation, food, internet connection, etc. More information on the cost of living our Paris-Saclay campus. 
French Health Insurance
Health, Social Security and Insurance
Visa application information

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
On-campus housing guaranteed. Please visit this website.

Paris-Saclay Campus: Césal (€400 to €750 per month)  
Rennes Campus: Residence Belle Fontaine (€350 to €450 per month) 
Metz Campus: Residence Edouard Branly (€350 to €450 per month)

sections_ordered.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填
申請資格
sections_ordered.text:
法語組
本校大三/大四/大五/碩一/碩二(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），須具備扎實工程或電機基礎。
TOEFL iBT 85 (接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 或 全民英檢中高級。
或
具法語檢定成績 B1(中級) 級以上。
只限理學院、工學院、電機資訊學院、生物資源暨農學院、重點科技研究學院之學生申請。

sections_ordered.label: 名額
sections_ordered.text:
一學期3名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 3 人)

sections_ordered.label: 學校年曆
sections_ordered.text:
Fall semester: end of August 2026 - end of January 2027
Spring semester: end of January 2027 - end of June 2027

sections_ordered.label: 註冊繳費
sections_ordered.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

sections_ordered.label: 注意事項
sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
A solid background in Mathematics and Physics is required
Engineering Program 1st year courses are NOT open for exchange.
We accommodate exchange students within the 2nd year of our Engineering Program, equivalent to the 1st year of Master's level (i.e. the 4th year of higher education studies). All applicants will be required to have completed at least 3 years at the home institution before coming to CentraleSupélec.
Please note that most Fall semester and 3rd-year courses are taught in French.
Study Programmes in English. For further details or questions, please contact: julie.castel@centralesupelec.fr

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
法語組，該校並無性別限制
本校大三/大四/大五/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.30分以上。
TOEFL iBT 79 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 或 全民英檢中高級 或 培力英檢B2(中高級)，僅具備英語能力證明者，請詳閱注意事項說明。
或
具法語檢定成績 B1(中級) 級以上。
只限理學院、工學院、生物資源暨農學院、電機資訊學院、重點科技研究學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期4名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 4 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Fall semester: Early September to Late January
Spring semester: Late January to Late of June
All exchange students are required to attend the orientation days, organized a week prior to the beginning of each semester.

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
該校主要為法語授課，僅具備英語能力之同學，務必自行確認欲申請系所是否有足夠英語授課課程
Website of incoming exchange student program
Training offers
Videos of the major programs
We have 3 English-taught engineering master-level programs you can apply to: Supply Chain and Digital Transformation, Energy & Environnement, Data Engineering.
The MSc in Innovation, Creativity & Entrepreneurship (Master ICE), Aerospace Engineering, and Health & Engineering are NOT available to exchange students.
A minimum of 20 ECTS per semester is required from international exchange students.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
EPF English Brochure
Cost of Living
We recommend you to get at least a beginner's level of French language before you arrive in France. Intensive summer courses are available:
▪ 2 to 8 weeks in July & August
▪ Location: Paris-Cachan campus
▪ Workload: 25 hours/week (Monday to Friday)
For 1 year, exchange students can apply to the French social security system
For 1 semester, it is recommended to subscribe to a private insurance before living your home country

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
EPF has agreements with student residences and provides assistance with the accommodation search and booking, however accommodation is not guaranteed.

It is highly recommended to apply for an accommodation upon registration to EPF. Check-in in residences: from Monday to Friday

Estimated renting cost
Paris-Cachan campus: 400 to 800€
Montpellier campus: 350 to 600€
Troyes campus: 330 to 450€

校園導覽.text: Visite du campus de Paris-Cachan, Visite du campus de Montpellier, EPF | Découvrez le campus de Troyes

或

只限理學院、工學院、生物資源暨農學院、電機資訊學院、生命科學院、重點科技研究學院之學生申請。

Website of incoming exchange student information
Only Faculty of Lettres and Faculty of Science and Engineering are open for application
Faculty of Science and Engineering:
Study programs in French
Courses taught in English
L1 courses are not open to exchange students.
30 ECTS per semester. A duly filled-out-&-signed learning agreement is mandatory. Pedagogical Coordinators from both side can agree on a less-than-30-ECTS mobility. In that case, the student must provide a duly filled out-&-signed learning agreement stating the number of ECTS. Most courses hold 3 to 9 ECTS and at least 50% of the classes should be taken in the department choosen by the student

name_en: Institut d’Études Politiques de Paris (Sciences Po)

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
法語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
學士生 TOEFL iBT 100 (接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5；
研究生 TOEFL iBT 100 (接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5；。
或
學士生 具法語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上，TCF 400；
研究生 具法語檢定成績 C1(高級) 級以上，TCF 500。
只限文學院、社會科學院、生物資源暨農學院、管理學院、法律學院、國際政經學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
法語組
一學期4名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 4 人)

註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
強烈建議具備人文、社科領域背景之同學選填
Undergraduate courses are offered in six disciplines: Economics, History, Law, the Humanities, Sociology, and Political Science (including International Relations). All 7 campuses welcome exchange students
Website of incoming exchange student information
From September 2025: Applicants must select 2 choices in the application form:
2 campuses for undergraduate students（不保證分配到自己第一志願校區！）
2 Master's programmes for graduate students
Exchange students may register for between 5 ECTS credits (minimum) and 30 ECTS credits (maximum) per semester. Students can attempt up to 60 ECTS credits per academic year.
Exchange students in our graduate programmes must be attached to a specific Masters programme and are are restricted to classes in that programme only. Not all graduate courses are open to exchange students, and some may impose academic or linguistic prerequisites.

Health services

交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
強烈建議具備人文、社科領域背景之同學選填
Undergraduate courses are offered in six disciplines: Economics, History, Law, the Humanities, Sociology, and Political Science (including International Relations). All 7 campuses welcome exchange students
Website of incoming exchange student information
From September 2025: Applicants must select 2 choices in the application form:
2 campuses for undergraduate students（不保證分配到自己第一志願校區！）
2 Master's programmes for graduate students
Exchange students may register for between 5 ECTS credits (minimum) and 30 ECTS credits (maximum) per semester. Students can attempt up to 60 ECTS credits per academic year.
Exchange students in our graduate programmes must be attached to a specific Masters programme and are are restricted to classes in that programme only. Not all graduate courses are open to exchange students, and some may impose academic or linguistic prerequisites.
housing_text: Students must arrange for housing on their own. More information here.

法語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
TOEFL iBT 80 (讀 20 聽 20 說 20 寫 20 不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5 (聽 6.0 讀 6.0 寫 6.0 說 6.0)。
或
具法語檢定成績 B1(中級) 級以上，Law, Political science and Philosophy: B2
Communication sciences: C1。
不接受法律學院法律學研究所、法律學院科際整合法律學研究所、管理學院管理學院企業管理碩士專班之學生申請。

注意事項.text:

該校交換生計畫請參考此網頁， 該校以人文社會學科為主，同學需自行確認是否有課程可供選讀。

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
DEUF program 2 hours French language per week and SELF program 3 hours French language per week.
Preparing for your Arrival
Insurance Information
International Students Welcome Guide
Plan your budget:
Plan on a monthly budget of 600 to 900€ (rent, food, leisure activities...).
When you arrive, allow €1,500 for installation costs (deposit, electricity, water, rent, etc.).
Examples of expenses:
Rent: €300 to €550 / month (depending on accommodation)
Meals: 200 to 250€ / month
Electricity/gas/water: approx. 30€ / month
Telephone/internet: €20 to €30 / month
Transport: €32.50 (TCL pass 18-25 years / month)
As soon as you arrive in France. To apply for validation of your residence permit, you must apply online within 3 months of the day you enter France:
Step 1
Pay your 50-euro tax stamp online using the "buy an electronic tax stamp" tab.
Step 2
Click on the "Validate my VLS-TS" tab and complete the form online.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: Finding accommodation in Lyon can sometimes be difficult. Start your search before your arrival and plan for temporary accommodation.

TOEFL iBT 79 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 或 全民英檢中高級，僅具備英語能力者，務必自行確認是否有足夠英語授課課程可選讀。

不接受醫學院、公共衛生學院之學生申請。

Website of incoming exchange student information
Course catalogue
Fields of study
As part of the Global Exchange Programme, "Go explore - Study abroad in Göttingen" offers a course programme for non-German-speaking international exchange students. In addition to courses on key topics such as sustainability, data science and inequality/diversity, a compulsory course on "Ethnic and Cultural Diversity in Germany" and German courses, students can choose from a wide range of English-language courses. The programme is designed for one semester and requires English language skills at B2 level.

links.text: Go explore - Study abroad in Göttingen

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
The University of Göttingen does not charge tuition fees. However, all students are obliged to pay a semester fee. The semester fee comprises administration fees, student body fees, a Studentenwerk fe,e and a Germany-wide semester ticket for public transport. The current fees for exchange students can be found on the website.
Health Insurance Requirements
Guide for International Students

Private housing market € 350 – 700 (per month)

Website of incoming exchange student information
Course catalogue
Fields of study
As part of the Global Exchange Programme, "Go explore - Study abroad in Göttingen" offers a course programme for non-German-speaking international exchange students. In addition to courses on key topics such as sustainability, data science and inequality/diversity, a compulsory course on "Ethnic and Cultural Diversity in Germany" and German courses, students can choose from a wide range of English-language courses. The programme is designed for one semester and requires English language skills at B2 level.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
A to Z information (must read!)
Preparatory German course: Before the semester begins, you will have the opportunity to participate in an intensive German course. Language courses are conducted by the TUDIAS language school. You can find information about course offers, dates, times, and fees on the homepage of TUDIAS.
VISA application information (Question 8)
Cost of Living per Month (in EUR): Approx. 850 EUR
Additional fees: Semester fee, approx. 300 EUR per semester. All regularly enrolled students must pay a nominal "student payment" that covers the Studentenwerk, the Studentenschaft, and the so-called "Semester Ticket" (this semester ticket serves as transportation pass for busses, trains, trams, S-Bahn/Metro, and rental bike service in and around the greater Dresden area and as Deutschlandticket, i.e. for all basic public transport in Germany).

Cost of Accommodation per Month (in EUR): 230 – 500 EUR

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Practical  Information for Exchange Students
For general information about the available langauge courses see the website of the University Language Centre/Sprachenzentrum.
Accepted exchange students will receive a letter of admission for the German embassy. Students coming to Germany will have to apply for a student visa via the Germany embassy in their home countries.
Every student at the University of Muenster has to pay a social contribution fee for each semester, approximately 350 Euro. This fee contains the costs for the semester ticket that allows students to travel around Germany. The living expenses for students in Muenster run approximately 950 Euro per month, including accommodation, food and leisure activities.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: Students must arrange for housing on their own. More information here.

Discover Germany at the University of Mü.label: Discover Germany at the University of Münster!
Discover Germany at the University of Mü.text:
Are you ready for an unforgettable international experience?

The University of Münster invites you to discover one of Germany's top research universities, located in the heart of Europe. Study in a welcoming and forward-thinking environment,connect with students from around the world, and enjoy a lively and diverse student life.

With one-third of its population made up of students, Münster is truly a student city! You'll find endless opportunities to get involved — from sports and cultural events to a wide variety of bars, cafés, and social activities.

Each week, the Erasmus Association Münster offers exciting events especially for international students. Follow "erasmusmuenster" on Instagram to stay up to date! Their events include sports tournaments, cultural workshops, city trips, museum visits, parties, and much more.

Münster is a picturesque and historic city, famous for its bike-friendly streets, beautiful parks, and strong academic tradition. The University of Münster isn't limited to a single campus — its buildings are spread throughout the city, making the entire city feel like your classroom.

Whether you're studying natural sciences, humanities, or social sciences, you'll find high-quality courses taught in English and plenty of support to help you feel at home.

Start your global journey in Münster!

Website of incoming exchange student information.
Course Catalogue: published in September for winter and March for summer semester
Students have the option to study in German or English. The main language at TU Darmstadt is German. A growing number of courses is offered in English.
We recommend exchange students (graduate & undergraduate) to take between 18 ECTS and 30 ECTS per semester.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
The monthly budget required by the German government for the visa or residence permit application of Euro 992 per month. A breakdown of costs can be found on our website.
Exchange students studying at TU Darmstadt for one or two semesters and double degree students are required to purchase statutory German health insurance (Gesetzliche Krankenversicherung) in order to be able to register as a student at TU Darmstadt. Further information for Exchange students from Non-European Countries can be found on our website.
The orientation program "The Experience Weeks" or "X-weeks" for incoming exchange students start on the second or third working day in September (for the winter semester) and in March (for the summer semester). More information can be found on the website.
Simultaneously with the X-Weeks, we offer a 4-week Intensive German language course for all incoming students. The courses are free of charge. Additionally, continuing German language courses are offered throughout the semester (also free of charge).

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Accommodation is available, but cannot be guaranteed due to limited capacities. TU Darmstadt does not have its own dormitories but cooperates with other public providers in Darmstadt. Our colleagues from the Exchange Students Housing Assistance ESHA help incoming students find accommodation.

The typical accommodation we can offer is a single room (furnished with a bed, chair, table, and wardrobe) in a shared apartment in a student dorm. The rental period is six months (September to February, March to August) or five months (October to February, April to August). Monthly rent typically ranges between €400 and €600.

Academic offer for international students
The number of courses taught in English varies across the departments. Therefore, please check the available courses first.
Law is mainly taught in German; thus, very good German language knowledge is necessary
In the field of Sociology, History, it might be advantageous to have some German language knowledge or be flexible in the courses students need to take.

Language courses for exchange students
Students with non-EU/EEA nationality are required to enrol in German statutory health insurance before arrival. They should also take care of travel health insurance until the beginning of the semester.
Cost of Living
VISA application information

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Seezeit student services is the largest provider of student accommodation in Konstanz. The rooms are usually in single or double occupancy apartments as well as in shared flats (WGs = Wohngemeinschaft). Every student, however, receives their own personal room. The WGs are usually shared by male and female students. Due to the extremely high demand, the rooms are assigned by lottery. The application for the dormitory room is part of the application for an exchange place at the University of Konstanz and is completed together.

Remember to transfer the deposit of 800€ to Seezeit. Only then can your application for a dormitory be considered.

不接受醫學院、公共衛生學院、文學院歷史學研究所之學生申請。

(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人)

Examinations: last two weeks of February

Summer Term: April 1 – end of September
Examinations: last two weeks of July

註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

該校主要授課語言為德語，僅具備英語能力證明之同學需自行確認可供選讀之課程；僅選讀英語授課課程若未達標準，該校系所有權拒收。該校各系所領域之學術專業，請參考此網頁。
Website of incoming exchange student information
Course catalogue
Faculties NOT open to exchange students: Medicine, MA Global History, MA Global Studies
Further restrictions may apply to:
Law
B.A. History
B. Sc. Computer Science
B. Sc. Geography
M.A. Mind and Brain

Study Options.label: Study Options
Study Options.text:
Undergraduate students are free to take courses in a maximum of two departments.
Graduate students can choose courses from one department.
Additional options: language courses and the Berlin Perspectives programme.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Language courses for exchange students
Services and Information
Proof of health insurance is mandatory for enrollment. Students are eligible to obtain health insurance coverage from a German statutory health insurance provider at a special student rate (approx. 130 €/month). Students can also apply for exemption/recognition of their foreign health insurance, if it meets the minimum criteria of a German statutory health insurance plan. Our information page for health questions provides more detailed insight to the German health care system.
Payment of the semester fee is mandatory for enrollment. The semester fee consists of the public transportation ticket for the duration of the semester (6 months), as well as a contribution to the student welfare organization, the student union, and a solidarity contribution. The matriculation fee is waived for exchange students. The semester fee is NOT a tuition fee.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
On-campus accommodation is NOT available.
Accommodation in student housing: Student dormitories (Wohnheime) vary in standard and price, and are not located in the city center. Travel time to the main campus is about 50 minutes.

Available student dorms are limited and assigned by lottery principle. Please refer to our accommodation guide for more information on housing in Berlin.

Further restrictions may apply to:
Law
B.A. History
B. Sc. Computer Science
B. Sc. Geography
M.A. Mind and Brain
housing_text:
On-campus accommodation is NOT available.
Accommodation in student housing: Student dormitories (Wohnheime) vary in standard and price, and are not located in the city center. Travel time to the main campus is about 50 minutes.

Available student dorms are limited and assigned by lottery principle. Please refer to our accommodation guide for more information on housing in Berlin.

德語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
TOEFL iBT 79 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0，僅具備英語能力者，請詳閱注意事項。
或

註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student information
Course catalogs
List of all study programs
Faculties and institutes
Please note: English taught Bachelor courses are rare. Courses in international MSc programs (taught in English) can only be taken on request. Prerequisite: You are in your 3rd or 4th year of study.
English taught MSc programs: COMMAS, GEONENGINE, INFOTECH, ITECH, IUSD, MIP, PHYSICS, WASTE, WAREM, Chemical Engineering, Computational Linguistics, Computer Science, English and American Studies, Electrical Engineering and Material Science.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Intensive German Course (IGC) and Extensive Course / Language Center
Monthly costs approx. 990 €
Dormitory rent: between 350 and 450 €
Local student health insurance: approx. 140 €
Broadcasting contribution fee: 20 €
Food: 350 €
other incidental and personal expenses
(university sports, leisure time… )
In Germany by law, students under 30 are required to take out a state student health insurance. Without accepted health insurance, you will not receive your residence permit or be able to enroll as a student at the University of Stuttgart. The student health insurance in Germany covers medical fees for visiting a doctor/dentist, hospital expenses, and medicines. A student health insurance costs approximately 120 €.
In order to facilitate your first steps after your arrival in Stuttgart, we offer our buddy program ready.study.stuttgart. For further information please visit the following link

links.text: Intensive German Course (IGC) and Extensive Course

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
The International Office can arrange housing for exchange students from overseas in student dorms on request. Further information on how to apply online for student housing will be emailed to successful applicants. The Studierendenwerk Stuttgart is in charge of the allocation of the dormitory rooms. We do not have any influence concerning the location or the same price category of the allocated spaces.

You will have to transfer the deposit of EUR 700 in advance. Otherwise, your dorm room will be cancelled.

According to the regulations of the Studierendenwerk, students are required to book a minimum rental period: either from Sept. 1/March 1 (students who attend the intensive German course) or from Oct. 1/April 1 (students who do not attend the intensive German course) until Feb. 28/Aug. 31 (students who will stay for one semester). Students who will stay for two semesters will receive a rental contract for 11-12 months. Other periods of rental agreements are not possible!

Only in the case of examinations in March or September can your residence contract be extended by one month after the examination registration period.

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
德語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
TOEFL iBT 85 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 或 全民英檢中高級，僅具備英語能力者，請詳閱注意事項。
或
具德語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上。
不接受醫學院、公共衛生學院、理學院心理學系、理學院心理學研究所之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期1名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 1 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text: Academic Calendar

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Main language of instruction is German, with some courses taught in English. For detailed information please see current course catalogue and search for English-taught classes or consult study advisors at the faculties.
Freiburg Global Exchange students should have German language skills at least at level A1.
Website of incoming exchange student information
Course catalogue: Available from July onwards (for those coming in October, winter semester) and from January onwards (for those coming in April, summer semester). For courses, course descriptions, contacts etc. please refer to the website and/or contact study advisors at the faculties.
Areas of study NOT available to Global exchange students: Medicine, Dentistry, Psychology, University College Freiburg (UCF)
Recommendation for exchange students: 24 ECTS points with no up nor down limit.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Cost of living estimates per month: 1000 – 1400 EUR per month (reference only)
Accommodation: 270 – 500 EUR
Food: ~400 EUR
Clothes: 50 EUR
Study materials: 50 EUR
Public transportation: 100 EUR  (Semester ticket valid for 6 months)
Health insurance: 110 EUR
Telephone, TV, Internet: 50  EUR
Miscellaneous: 80-100 EUR
During the semester a variety of tuition-waived German language courses and seminars (language levels A2-B2, up to 8 ECTS) are offered for Freiburg Global Exchange students through the Language Teaching Center (SLI).
Health insurance: All students need proof of sufficient health insurance in order to be enrolled. A German public health insurance plan is mandatory for exchange students. These plans offer maximum coverage and cost approximately 108 EUR per month. The University of Freiburg will not cover any medical bills for students.
We strongly recommend purchasing a liability insurance plan ("Haftpflichtversicherung"). This insurance covers everyday life risks, e.g. unintentionally injuring a pedestrian with your bike or breaking someone else's property. Liability insurance in Germany costs roughly 50 EUR per year.
All University of Freiburg students must pay administrative fees (currently 161 EUR per semester) for student services offered by the Student Union, including the right to purchase the semester ticket (public transport). Freiburg Global Exchange students pay a reduced rate of currently 103 EUR.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Housing information
All students must pay a 400 - 500 EUR deposit for dormitory housing which will be refunded at the end of their stay unless additional costs (f.e. damages etc) have occurred.

Website of incoming exchange students / Course catalogue
Most of the courses at RUB are taught in German. There are courses in English that are published in our International Course Catalogue. Students should have a good knowledge of German, at least a B1/B2 level for courses taught in German.
Dates for exams are set by each faculty. However, exams usually take place in the last week of the lectures or the week afterwards. Please note, they may also take place later (e.g. in Engineering or Economics).

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Language course for exchange students
Cost of Living:
Accommodation Between €325 and € 420 in a university dormitory; Between € 350 and € 650 in a private apartment
Licence Fee (TV taxes) Approx. € 18
Food Approx. € 200
Academic Expenses Approx. € 40
Personal Expenses Approx. € 150 (depending on personal needs)
Health Insurance Approx. € 140
Social Contribution Fee Approx. €360 (per semester)
Students from non-European countries can register for a private or compulsory health insurance. 
VISA application information
At the beginning of each semester, International Welcome is held for international students. There they get a chance to meet other students and receive important information. Exchange students will be informed about this offer via email.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: The International Office offers a special service for exchange students. Students can apply for accommodation for the duration of their exchange (1-2 semesters). Since the International Office can only reserve a limited number of rooms for exchange students, early registration and flexibility is useful. Information on the accommodation application can be found here.

The City of Bochum and the Ruhr Area.label: The City of Bochum and the Ruhr Area
The City of Bochum and the Ruhr Area.text: Bochum is a student city and offers a wide range of cultural and leisure activities. For further information about student life in Bochum and the Ruhr region, please visit this link.

sections_ordered.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填
申請資格
sections_ordered.text:
德語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
TOEFL iBT 79 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 或 全民英檢中高級，僅具備英語能力者，請詳閱注意事項。
或
具德語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上。
不接受醫學院、公共衛生學院之學生申請。

(限定交換第二學期人數 4 人)

sections_ordered.label: 學校年曆
sections_ordered.text: Academic calendar

sections_ordered.label: 註冊繳費
sections_ordered.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

sections_ordered.label: 注意事項
sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange students / Course catalogue
Most of the courses at RUB are taught in German. There are courses in English that are published in our International Course Catalogue. Students should have a good knowledge of German, at least a B1/B2 level for courses taught in German.
Dates for exams are set by each faculty. However, exams usually take place in the last week of the lectures or the week afterwards. Please note, they may also take place later (e.g. in Engineering or Economics).

sections_ordered.label: 實用資訊
sections_ordered.text:
Language course for exchange students
Cost of Living:
Accommodation Between €325 and € 420 in a university dormitory; Between € 350 and € 650 in a private apartment
Licence Fee (TV taxes) Approx. € 18
Food Approx. € 200
Academic Expenses Approx. € 40
Personal Expenses Approx. € 150 (depending on personal needs)
Health Insurance Approx. € 140
Social Contribution Fee Approx. €360 (per semester)
Students from non-European countries can register for a private or compulsory health insurance. 
VISA application information
At the beginning of each semester, International Welcome is held for international students. There they get a chance to meet other students and receive important information. Exchange students will be informed about this offer via email.

sections_ordered.label: 住宿資訊
sections_ordered.text: The International Office offers a special service for exchange students. Students can apply for accommodation for the duration of their exchange (1-2 semesters). Since the International Office can only reserve a limited number of rooms for exchange students, early registration and flexibility is useful. Information on the accommodation application can be found here.

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
該校絕大多數課程為德語授課，僅具備英語能力證明之同學務必自行確認可供選讀之課程。
該校為理工專業，同學須自行評估是否有課程可供選讀，無相關領域背景之同學該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student information
It can't be guaranteed that students get a spot for certain courses, and for some courses, they might also need to have certain qualifications/background knowledge in order to be admitted. More info about courses.

不開放交換生選讀之領域.label: 不開放交換生選讀之領域
不開放交換生選讀之領域.text:
Architecture Typology, M.Sc.
Building Sustainability, M.BA.
Energy Management, M.BA.
European and International Energy Law, M.BL.
Global Production Engineering, M.Sc.
Urban Management, M.Sc.
Real Estate Management, M.Sc.
Science Management, M.Sc.
Space Engineering, M.Sc.
Stage Design and Scenography, M.A.
Sustainable Mobility Management, M.BA.
Urban Design, M.Sc.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Before the semester starts, a preparatory German Pre-Semester Intensive Course is being offered in September or March. It costs approximately. €295, and students will be awarded 6 ECTS. Most Erasmus students are only eligible to take part if they have proven German proficiency at the A2 level until the application deadline and after passing the evaluation test upon their arrival.
Students also have the chance to attend German courses during the semester. Information can be found on the "ZEMS" website.  
Insurance Information
VISA application information
FAQs & Timeline
Cost of Living Expenses: Housing €350-650 per month/food and drink €150 per month/books and supplies €40 per month/health insurance (if not waived) € 120-130 per month. Students applying for a residence permit have to prove sufficient financial resources of €934 per month – this will give you a rough estimate of what the average student needs. Depending on the individual lifestyle, this can be less or more.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Exchange students can apply for one of our dorm rooms provided by studierendenWERK Berlin.

Shortly after the application deadline, students will be automatically informed about the dorm application. Nevertheless, students do have to be aware that housing is not guaranteed.

More housing information here.

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
該校專業為人文社科、資訊管理領域，主要為德語授課。主修領域非完全符合該校系所，以及僅具備英語能力者，需自行確認是否有課程可供選讀。
本校管理學院和曼漢姆大學商學院另簽署院級合約，校級交換計畫不開放同學申請交換至該校商學院。
Website of incoming exchange student information
Course catalogue for exchange students
Courses on German language and culture

links.text: Courses on German language and culture

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Entry and Insurance
We strongly recommend that all our exchange students from non-EU and non-EFTA countries purchase a German statutory health insurance. Students can buy German health insurance prior to their arrival in Mannheim. It costs about €135* per month (standard price for students by all health insurance providers). *Subject to change
Cost of Living (please note that the cost for rent will be lower than suggested on this website because students usually live in the dorms or in a shared living arrangement)
In order to cover the costs of student services, students enrolled at a German university – including exchange students – have to pay a semester fee. The fee currently amounts to €100 per semester. Kindly note that all exchange students need to pay this fee in order to be enrolled.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Students can apply for student residences or look for a room on the private market.

For exchange students from overseas, we offer a very limited number of places in our off - campus student residences: single bedrooms in shared flats vary from €390* – €480*, single apartments from €420* – €480*. There are furnished rooms (shared kitchen and bathroom) in several residences in different areas of Mannheim. More information here.

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
德語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
TOEFL iBT 85 (不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 或 全民英檢中高級，僅具備英語能力者，請詳閱注意事項。
或
具德語檢定成績 B1(中級) 級以上，B2 recommended。
不接受醫學院牙醫學系、醫學院藥學系、醫學院臨床牙醫學研究所、醫學院藥學研究所之學生申請。

一學期4名。

該校絕大多數課程為德文授課，僅具備英語能力者請務必確認是否有足夠英語授課課程可供選讀。
Website of incoming exchange student information
Course catalogue
English taught courses are mostly offered at graduate level. If undergraduate students plan on taking courses in English, please ensure that you can easily find sufficient courses in the previous year's list corresponding to the semester you wish to attend (summer/winter) ➔ Useful links for planning your courses
Closed for exchange students: Dentistry, Pharmacy
The Faculties of Business Administration and Business, Economics and Social Sciences only accept students enrolled in degree programs corresponding to these faculties
The Faculty of Medicine will accept applications only once per year. Please make sure to nominate students interested in studying at the Faculty of Medicine in the following academic year before the nomination deadline of 10 April. Students need to have completed at least three years of studies prior to the exchange and provide proof of German language proficiency level B1 CEFR.

links.text: Useful links for planning your courses

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Living expenses (excluding rent) amount to approx. EUR 500-700/month.
Incoming exchange students without European Health Insurance Card (EHIC) are required to take out German statutory health insurance (approx. 110 EUR/month for students).
Incoming exchange students can take German language courses free of charge if space is available. Pre-semester intensive language courses (usually A1-B2) start approx. two weeks prior to the start of the semester.
Semester fees: All students of Universität Hamburg, including exchange students, pay a mandatory contribution fee per semester (reduced fee for exchange students in Summer Semester 2025: EUR 293), which includes a public transport pass for the Hamburg Public Transport Area

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Finding accommodation in Hamburg : Studies : University of Hamburg

A limited number of rooms in student residences are available for incoming exchange students; rents vary (EUR 370–510). The housing application form provided by the exchange coordinator must be submitted by 15 June for the winter semester, by 15 December for the summer semester.

We recommend to apply for a student residence hall, but incoming exchange students are free to search for accommodation on their own. Rents vary according to size and location, but are usually much higher than in residence halls.

links.text: Finding accommodation in Hamburg : Studies : University of Hamburg

Orientation Sessions.label: Orientation Sessions
Orientation Sessions.text: Most departments offer orientation sessions at the beginning of the winter semester, some at the beginning of the summer semester.

Living expenses: approx. € 1200 per month

The number of courses offered in English is constantly increasing. About half of TUM's Master's programs are entirely conducted in English and some more are taught bilingually in German and English. Students are advised to check the language of instruction for the desired courses in advance.
Website of incoming exchange student information
Course catalogue and course descriptions: If there are no courses listed for the semester they want to study in (which usually is the case as they are planning their studies in advance of faculty timetabling), they should just choose the same semester for which they are planning to come but for the previous year (the offered courses in each semester usually stay the same).
TUM departments & schools
60% of exchange students' TUM study load must be completed at their main host subject area / school.
