交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student information
School of Management
Schools T, I, ABLR
Architecture, Civil Engineering, Landscape Architecture, Spatial Planning only offered in German
Minimum academic workload per semester: Depending on home institution's requirements. A normal ECTS load is 30/semester.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
German beginner class offered every semester. Additonal courses can be organized according to demand. A 3-week intensive German refresher course (B2/C1) is offered, which takes place before the start of the fall semester. Cost: CHF 700.
Appropriate expenses per month in CHF: Accommodation: 550 – 700, food: 400, public transport: 70, books: 60, health insurance (can be waived): 80; entertainment: 150
Total per month: 1300 – 1500
Students must have health insurance which is valid in Switzerland.
Non-EU Students: Proof of health insurance valid in Switzerland. Health insurance provider in home country signs an exemption form together with a copy of the insurance policy in English, both documents will be evaluated by the local authorities in Switzerland. If the documents are not accepted by the local authorities, students are obliged to sign up for a Swiss health insurance (approx. CHF 90.00/month – e.g. Foreign student health insurance Switzerland | Swisscare).
Please note: The insurance policy has to explicitly and clearly state that the coverage is unlimited. Otherwise it won't be accepted in Switzerland.
A residence permit must be obtained after entering Switzerland. The costs for the visa and the residence permit are paid for by the student.

links.text: Foreign student health insurance Switzerland | Swisscare

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Campus Rapperswil: The student hall of residence is conveniently located, just a five-minute bus ride from campus. Shared apartment of 3 or 6 rooms with exchange students. Current cost is CHF 680 per month. Application is submitted together with the student exchange application.
Campus Buchs: No on-campus accommodation. Rooms in shared flats and private accommodation in or near Buchs, approx. CHF 400 - CHF 700 monthly.
Campus St.Gallen: No on-campus accommodation. Rooms in shared flats and studios with other exchange students, CHF 550 - CHF 700 monthly. Application deadlines: 15 May/15 October.

本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。

Website of incoming exchange student information
Website of course information
Bachelor/undergraduate students must have completed at least 2 semesters or equivalent before the exchange stay and are expected to attend the majority of their courses in the same or similar subject they study at their home university.
Exchange students are expected to choose courses amounting to around 20 ECTS in the same or a similar subject they study at their home university.
Restrictions:
Cross-faculty course booking is allowed, however, students should attend most courses in their major and minor(s).
Faculty of Arts and Social Sciences: no cross-level booking.
English Department (English Language and Literature): Students who are not enrolled in English Language and Literature at their home university can only take lectures offered by the English Department.
Department of Biology: Only students who study Biology, Biochemistry or Biomedicine at their home university are allowed to take courses in Biology, Biochemistry or Biomedicine. Also, Block Courses are closed to exchange students.
Department of Psychology: Only students who study Psychology as a major at their home university are allowed to take courses offered by the Department of Psychology.
Faculty of Law: Students taking courses at the Faculty of Law must have completed 4 semesters at their home university before the begin of their exchange stay at UZH.
Medicine NOT open to exchange students

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
The Language Center of the University of Zurich and ETH offers language courses for students from all fields of study for a fee between CHF 80- CHF 150-. There are also courses for international and exchange students like "German as a Foreign Language".
For anyone staying in Switzerland for longer than three months, it is compulsory to purchase Swiss health insurance. If a student's home-country insurance is deemed equivalent, they may apply for an exemption from this requirement. Students must wait for a letter from the Cantonal Department of Health, which they will receive after registering at the Personenmeldeamt (Zurich's residents' registration office). Liability insurance is recommended but not mandatory.
Upon Arrival information
Living Expenses
Nominated students from countries with visa obligation will receive a form for immigration and further information directly from Global Student Experience at UZH. The visa fee has to be paid also in the event of a cancellation.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: Housing: UZH does not own on-campus student dormitories. However, there is a limited number of rooms reserved for UZH students which are managed by the ETH/UZH Housing Office. Exchange students will receive more information and an application link from Global Student Experience after their acceptance. Please note that the Housing Office is in charge of allocating rooms.

sections_ordered.text:

sections_ordered.label: 學校年曆

sections_ordered.label: 註冊繳費
sections_ordered.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

sections_ordered.label: 注意事項
sections_ordered.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student information
Website of course information
Bachelor/undergraduate students must have completed at least 2 semesters or equivalent before the exchange stay and are expected to attend the majority of their courses in the same or similar subject they study at their home university.
Exchange students are expected to choose courses amounting to around 20 ECTS in the same or a similar subject they study at their home university.
Restrictions:
Cross-faculty course booking is allowed, however, students should attend most courses in their major and minor(s).
Faculty of Arts and Social Sciences: no cross-level booking.
English Department (English Language and Literature): Students who are not enrolled in English Language and Literature at their home university can only take lectures offered by the English Department.
Department of Biology: Only students who study Biology, Biochemistry or Biomedicine at their home university are allowed to take courses in Biology, Biochemistry or Biomedicine. Also, Block Courses are closed to exchange students.
Department of Psychology: Only students who study Psychology as a major at their home university are allowed to take courses offered by the Department of Psychology.
Faculty of Law: Students taking courses at the Faculty of Law must have completed 4 semesters at their home university before the begin of their exchange stay at UZH.
Medicine NOT open to exchange students

sections_ordered.label: 實用資訊
sections_ordered.text:
The Language Center of the University of Zurich and ETH offers language courses for students from all fields of study for a fee between CHF 80- CHF 150-. There are also courses for international and exchange students like "German as a Foreign Language".
For anyone staying in Switzerland for longer than three months, it is compulsory to purchase Swiss health insurance. If a student's home-country insurance is deemed equivalent, they may apply for an exemption from this requirement. Students must wait for a letter from the Cantonal Department of Health, which they will receive after registering at the Personenmeldeamt (Zurich's residents' registration office). Liability insurance is recommended but not mandatory.
Upon Arrival information
Living Expenses
Nominated students from countries with visa obligation will receive a form for immigration and further information directly from Global Student Experience at UZH. The visa fee has to be paid also in the event of a cancellation.

sections_ordered.label: 住宿資訊
sections_ordered.text: Housing: UZH does not own on-campus student dormitories. However, there is a limited number of rooms reserved for UZH students which are managed by the ETH/UZH Housing Office. Exchange students will receive more information and an application link from Global Student Experience after their acceptance. Please note that the Housing Office is in charge of allocating rooms.

或
具德語檢定成績 C1(高級) 級以上，German language certificate only if students want to attend courses taught in German.。

法語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
TOEFL iBT 80 (接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0。
或
具法語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上。
不接受管理學院會計學研究所、管理學院財務金融學研究所、管理學院管理學院企業管理碩士專班、醫學院、公共衛生學院之學生申請。

註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student program
Programs offered at the UNIL
Most courses are taught in French. Students' French language skills must be at least equivalent to level B2 of the CEFR. Students who do not meet this requirement shall enrol in the courses of French as a foreign language
At the Faculty of Social and Political Sciences (SPP) and the Faculty of Theology and Sciences of Religions (FTSR) all courses at Bachelor's and Master's level are taught in French.
Courses NOT open to exchange students: 
School of Medicine
Courses in the School of Criminal Justice
Master (MSc) in Medical Biology
Master (MSc) in Accounting, Control and Finance
Master (MSc) in Human Taphonomy
Continuing Education programmes (MBA, EMBA, Master of Advanced Studies, etc.)
At undergraduate level, courses taught in English are offered in:
Business and Economics
Biology
English Literature
At graduate level, English-taught courses are available in:
Business and Economics
Geosciences and Environment
Biology
English Literature
Law and Public Administration

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
The School of French as a Foreign Language offers courses in French language during the autumn and spring semesters for beginners to advanced students. Students can freely choose the number of courses they attend and study full-time or part-time, and take content courses.
The Cours de vacances intensive french course is a paid programme (short-term, 4 weeks)
Exchange students are required to purchase a compulsory insurance plan.
Cost of living: The cost of living in Lausanne for students all included is around CHF 2,100 per month (incl. accommodation: CHF 700 to 900).
VISA and residence permit

links.text: School of French as a Foreign Language

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: Accepted students will receive instructions to apply online for a room in one of the Students' Residences of UNILausanne. More infomation here.

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
德語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
TOEFL iBT 80 (寫 17 不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 (寫 6.0) 或 全民英檢中高級，僅具備英語能力者，請詳閱注意事項。
或
具德語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上。
不接受醫學院、公共衛生學院、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學系、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學研究所、生物資源暨農學院臨床動物醫學研究所之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期4名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 4 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text: Academic Calendar

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student information
List of Courses 
NOT open to exchange students: Faculty of Medicine, Veterinary Medicine
該校英語授課課程有限，僅具有英語能力之同學須自行評估是否有課程可供選讀。
Most courses for bachelor students are taught in German. 
Most classes in English are at Master level. Bachelor exchange students are welcome to also sign up for Master courses (there may be some exceptions regarding Master seminars).
The language of instruction is mentioned in the course catalogue.
Students should have sufficient proficiency of German and/or English to be able to follow lectures and written exams (CEFR level B2; CEFR level C1 for courses at the English Department).
For PhD students we have special requirements: PhD students are asked to find a professor at the University of Bern, who will act as their supervisor during the time of their stay in Bern. Only with this support, we can accept exchange students on PhD level.
For exchange students, a credit load of 20-25 ECTS/semester is recommended.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
VISA application information
Financial Matters: Students must allow for a minimum of CHF 1,500 per month to cover living expenses in Switzerland.
Health Insurance

語言課程.label: 語言課程
語言課程.text: Various free language workshops in German and Bernese German are offered during the introduction week. Further German courses are available during the semester on levels A1-C1. In addition, exchange students may also benefit from English courses (CEFR Level B1-C1). All German and English workshops as well as courses are free of charge. For more information, please see www.daf.unibe.ch (for German courses) and www.aes.unibe.ch (for English courses).

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: The dorm providers in Bern are not linked to the university, they are private providers. For this reason, we cannot guarantee housing, however, we send studentsan info sheet on all the available options in Bern (dorms, shared-flat platforms etc.). More information here.

Other Highlight.label: Other Highlight
Other Highlight.text: University of Bern - Knowledge creates Value!

交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student information
List of Courses 
NOT open to exchange students: Faculty of Medicine, Veterinary Medicine
該校英語授課課程有限，僅具有英語能力之同學須自行評估是否有課程可供選讀。
Most courses for bachelor students are taught in German. 
Most classes in English are at Master level. Bachelor exchange students are welcome to also sign up for Master courses (there may be some exceptions regarding Master seminars).
The language of instruction is mentioned in the course catalogue.
Students should have sufficient proficiency of German and/or English to be able to follow lectures and written exams (CEFR level B2; CEFR level C1 for courses at the English Department).
For PhD students we have special requirements: PhD students are asked to find a professor at the University of Bern, who will act as their supervisor during the time of their stay in Bern. Only with this support, we can accept exchange students on PhD level.
For exchange students, a credit load of 20-25 ECTS/semester is recommended.
housing_text: The dorm providers in Bern are not linked to the university, they are private providers. For this reason, we cannot guarantee housing, however, we send studentsan info sheet on all the available options in Bern (dorms, shared-flat platforms etc.). More information here.

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
德語組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
TOEFL iBT 94 (接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5 或 全民英檢中高級 或 培力英檢B2(中高級)。
或
具德語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上。
只限社會科學院、管理學院、生物資源暨農學院、法律學院之學生申請。
法律學院，需符合下列成績標準：
具德語檢定成績 B2(中高級) 級以上。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期4名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 4 人)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text: Academic Calendar

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 免繳該校學雜費，但仍須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，生活費、住宿費、保險費及往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student program
Course information
CEMS MiM courses, Business Journalism and Business teacher education courses are NOT open to exchange students
Guest students are required to take at least 16 ECTS credits and may not exceed 40 ECTS credits per semester.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Monthly living expenses:
Accommodation (rent plus utilities) CHF700 to 1050
Food CHF 600
Communication (telephone, internet, TV) 70
Transport (public and private) CHF 180
Insurances (liability, health) CHF 100 to 280
Leisure activities CHF 150
Other CHF 100 to 150
Incoming exchange students are invited to enrol in a cost-free, seven-day intensive German language course before the semester starts and may continue with the course during the semester. Other language courses offered during the semester may include: Chinese, English, French, Italian, Japanese, Portuguese, Spanish, Russian.
Information regarding Insurance, VISA, language courses and other useful links can be found on this webpage.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text: The Housing Office provides off-campus housing. Housing is assigned on a first come, first served basis. More information here.

Other Highlight.text: Campus tour at the University of St.Gallen

Website of incoming exchange student program
Available module options
NOT open to exchange students: Faculty of Medicine and Health Sciences & School of Social Work
Students need to select appropriate options for full-time academic enrolment: 120 UCU (60 ECTS) per academic year or 60 UCU (30 ECTS) per single semester. This is both an academic and visa requirement.
Students are expected to study the majority of their modules from one academic area.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Cost of Living
Travel and Health Insurance: Full year students with a Student visa will pay an Immigration Health Surcharge as part of their visa application which provides access to some of the National Health Service (NHS). Students studying at UEA for less than 6 months will need to purchase adequate health cover.
Study Abroad Sustainably

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
UEA has a wide range of on-campus accommodation available. UEA guarantees accommodation for students who apply before the accommodation deadline in most circumstances. Information about accommodation can be found here, including links to the prices.

Students also have the option to stay in UEA accommodation or can live off-campus in private accommodation if they prefer. Some homestay options are available. Information and resources about this are on the webpage above.

交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student program
Available module options
NOT open to exchange students: Faculty of Medicine and Health Sciences & School of Social Work
Students need to select appropriate options for full-time academic enrolment: 120 UCU (60 ECTS) per academic year or 60 UCU (30 ECTS) per single semester. This is both an academic and visa requirement.
Students are expected to study the majority of their modules from one academic area.

sections_ordered.label: 實用資訊
sections_ordered.text:
Cost of Living
Travel and Health Insurance: Full year students with a Student visa will pay an Immigration Health Surcharge as part of their visa application which provides access to some of the National Health Service (NHS). Students studying at UEA for less than 6 months will need to purchase adequate health cover.
Study Abroad Sustainably

sections_ordered.label: 住宿資訊
sections_ordered.text:
UEA has a wide range of on-campus accommodation available. UEA guarantees accommodation for students who apply before the accommodation deadline in most circumstances. Information about accommodation can be found here, including links to the prices.

Students also have the option to stay in UEA accommodation or can live off-campus in private accommodation if they prefer. Some homestay options are available. Information and resources about this are on the webpage above.

sections_ordered.label: Electronic Travel Authorisations (ETAs) Information
sections_ordered.text:
自2025年1月8日起，未持有效英國簽證或電子簽證（eVisa）的本國籍人士，須憑電子旅行憑證（ETA）入境英國。詳情請參閱下方資訊或駐英國臺北代表處網站。

What is an Electronic Travel Authorisation?
Getting started: applying for an ETA
Electronic Travel Authorisation (ETA): Stakeholder factsheet

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一以上(僅限大學部)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
TOEFL iBT 80 (讀 18 聽 17 說 20 寫 19 不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 (聽 5.5 讀 5.5 寫 5.5 說 5.5)，部份系所有更高的語檢要求，詳見下方注意事項。
不接受醫學院、公共衛生學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
一學期2名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人)

線上說明會.label: 線上說明會
線上說明會.text:
Information Sessions 
Come along to find out more about living and studying in Leeds.  
Wednesday 18 February, 1-2pm (GMT) 
Wednesday 18 March, 1-2pm (GMT) 
Application support sessions 
Come along to find out more about our eligibility requirements and how to apply to study at Leeds.  
Wednesday 25 February, 1-2pm (GMT) 
Wednesday 25 March, 1-2pm (GMT) 
Further information about each event, including links to join, can be found on our website: Information sessions | University of Leeds

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text: Academic Calendar

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

特殊語檢規定.label: 特殊語檢規定
特殊語檢規定.text:
Higher language requirement for the following Schools and subject areas (Fine Art, Media and Communication, English, Law, Linguistics and Phonetics, Business, Philosophy, Religion and History of Science, Politics and International relations):
TOEFL (iBT)
Overall: 88
Listening: 19
Reading: 20
Writing: 21
Speaking: 22
IELTS
Overall: 6.5
6.0 minimum in listening, reading, speaking and writing

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student information
Module catalogue
NOT open to exchange students: Medicine, Dentistry, Nursing and Architecture are NOT open to study for incoming study abroad students.
Students must come to Leeds for the full year (Semester 1 & 2) to study these subjects: Chemical and Process Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
Studio Fine Art modules are taught in Semester 1 and the full year (Semester 1 & 2). There are no Semester 2 studio Fine Art modules. Portfolio submissions are required to study studio Fine Art modules.
To study School of Design modules, students must major in Design in their degree with their home university and submit aportfolio for review. The School of Design teach the majority of their modules across the full academic year (semester 1 and 2).
To study Media and Communications/Psychology modules, priority will be given to students who major in Media and Communications/Psychology in their home degree.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Cost of living (e.g. cost of food etc)
The University of Leeds does not have an insurance policy for students to buy. Students should make their own insurance arrangements prior to travelling to the UK. Information regarding healthcare entitlement in the UK can be found here
Visa and immigration
If students do not meet our direct entry language requirements, they can take a pre-sessional Academic English course directly before the start of semester 1 and semester 2 with our Language Centre. These courses are not usually included in exchange programme tuition fee waiver arrangements.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Housing is guaranteed if students apply for it before the deadlines (1 July for S1, 1 December for S2). Housing can be on or off campus.
Students can compare the costs of different residences on the accommodation website

一般組
本校大一/大二/大三學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.50分以上。
TOEFL iBT 92 (讀 23 聽 23 說 23 寫 23 不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5 (聽 6.0 讀 6.0 寫 6.0 說 6.0)。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text: 一學期0名。（本校僅開放於第一學期出發，交換一學年，故本學期甄選不開放申請）

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Academic Calendar
Induction Week: 28 September – 4 October 2026
Term 1 Michaelmas: 5 October – 11 December 2026
Christmas Vacation: 12 December 2025 – 10 January 2027

Term 2 Epiphany: 11 January – 19 March 2027
Easter Vacation: 20 March – 25 April 2027

Term 3 Easter: 26 April – 25 June 2027

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student information
Programme information: Including Module Handbooks, Language Requirements, Visa informatio, Living costs and health care.
The academic year at Durham University follows a term system with 3 terms per year. Examinations are mostly held at the end of each academic year only.
Students should be aware that classes within the English department are very limited. We cannot guarantee acceptance into the English department.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Service available to exchange students
Check if you need a UK visa
The Orientation Session is held on the Friday morning before Induction Week. Students will join their College's Freshers' activities together with the degree students during induction week.
The normal workload for a full-time student is 120 Durham credits per academic year. This normally equates to 6 modules per academic year at 20 credits each.

links.text: Check if you need a UK visa

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
All full year non-European exchange students from non-European partners are guaranteed a place in one of the residential colleges of the University if they apply for the programme by the deadline. Students opt for college accommodation on the application form. Students will be notified of their college via e-mail. The college will then contact the student with further details prior to arrival.

For a full list of prices and the different options please refer to Undergraduate Residence Charges. College prices include food (fully catered / part catered options only) and utility costs.

GPA 達3.50分以上。
TOEFL iBT 92 (讀 23 聽 23 說 23 寫 23 不接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.5 (聽 6.0 讀 6.0 寫 6.0 說 6.0)。
quota_text: 一學期0名。（本校僅開放於第一學期出發，交換一學年，故本學期甄選不開放申請）
calendar_text:
Academic Calendar
Induction Week: 28 September – 4 October 2026
Term 1 Michaelmas: 5 October – 11 December 2026
Christmas Vacation: 12 December 2025 – 10 January 2027

Term 2 Epiphany: 11 January – 19 March 2027
Easter Vacation: 20 March – 25 April 2027

Term 3 Easter: 26 April – 25 June 2027
notes_text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Website of incoming exchange student information
Programme information: Including Module Handbooks, Language Requirements, Visa informatio, Living costs and health care.
The academic year at Durham University follows a term system with 3 terms per year. Examinations are mostly held at the end of each academic year only.
Students should be aware that classes within the English department are very limited. We cannot guarantee acceptance into the English department.
housing_text:
All full year non-European exchange students from non-European partners are guaranteed a place in one of the residential colleges of the University if they apply for the programme by the deadline. Students opt for college accommodation on the application form. Students will be notified of their college via e-mail. The college will then contact the student with further details prior to arrival.

For a full list of prices and the different options please refer to Undergraduate Residence Charges. College prices include food (fully catered / part catered options only) and utility costs.

Students are responsible for organising their own travel insurance.

Website of incoming exchange student information
請注意：本校交換生僅得至該校Department of European & International Social and Political Studies 及 Department of Arts and Sciences (BASc)兩個學系就讀。
Study Options
Subjects
You normally apply to one subject area, which is typically linked to the subject area at your home institution. Once you arrive at UCL you will be expected to take the majority of your modules within this area. You can also choose modules from other subject areas, although be aware that this cannot be guaranteed – prerequisites may apply and spaces on certain modules may be limited.­­­­
Students must take courses that total 60 UCL credits per semester (30 ECTS/16 US Credits) which is typically 4 courses per semester and 120 credits/60 ECTS/32 US credits for the full year.

sections_ordered.label: 注意事項

交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Unfortunately, we do not open our halls of residence to European Exchange or SEMP students, but we can provide guidance to these students on how to secure suitable housing off-campus.

Campus housing is not guaranteed, though students who apply earlier in the cycle have a higher chance of securing a room in Queen Mary housing. Students need to have accepted an offer to study with us in order to apply.

Information on our residences can be found here.

links.text: Information on our residences can be found here

註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。

Students are expected to obtain suitable travel/health insurance before coming to the UK. Health care is accessible through the NHS.
Students who live on campus have room insurance for personal possessions included in the contract.

一般組
本校大一/大二學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
TOEFL iBT 80 (讀 18 聽 17 說 20 寫 17 接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 (聽 5.5 讀 5.5 寫 5.5 說 5.5)。

一學期2名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人)

學校年曆.text: Academic Calendar

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Study Abroad at Sussex
How to choose your modules
Standard credit load: 60 Sussex credits per semester (3 or 4 classes).
MODULES: Many students seem confused with our terminology and select modules for incorrect terms. They should also check the modules listed in the Study Abroad Guide, at times students seem to be using a list of modules approved by the home university and some of these lists contain modules that are no longer taught.
Students coming for autumn term only can only select modules listed as 'autumn teaching', they cannot take part of a full year module so any modules listed as 'autumn & spring teaching' should not be selected. Some students believe that these modules are taught in the autumn and then repeated in the spring but this is not correct, they run over two terms.
Students coming for spring/summer should only select modules listed as 'spring teaching'.
Students coming for the full year are free to select modules taught in any term
All module choices are of course subject to any prerequisites that may apply.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
English language courses
Visas and immigration
The Student Hub offers advice and assistance both when you apply and while you are studying at Sussex. They can help set up support for students with disabilities, mental health difficulties and additional learning needs.

生活費與保險資訊.label: 生活費與保險資訊
生活費與保險資訊.text:
Cost of Living
Students coming to Sussex for one semester must take out private medical insurance before travelling. The insurance must cover their time in the UK and provide cover if they intend to travel outside of the UK. This applies to EU/EEA nationals as EHIC cards are no longer valid in the UK.
Students coming to Sussex for the full academic year will pay the healthcare surcharge as part of the visa application. This permits students to access the National Health Service (NHS). However, students will need to pay for some services such as dental treatment, eye tests, and prescriptions. It is recommended that students take out adequate insurance to cover other health-related costs.

links.text: healthcare surcharge as part of the visa application

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Full Year applicants are guaranteed university accommodation if they apply by the 30 June deadline.

Autumn/Spring students are required to check our Accommodation pages for updates whilst we are confirming the arrangements.

Students will receive housing application instructions with their offer letters (or shortly after). Our Housing Office processes all applications and they will inform the students directly about their allocations. In order to confirm their room offer, students will be required to formally accept.

Allocations are subject to availability.

TOEFL iBT 80 (讀 18 聽 17 說 20 寫 17 接受 Home Edition) 或 IELTS 6.0 (聽 5.5 讀 5.5 寫 5.5 說 5.5)。

一學期2名。
(限定交換第二學期人數 2 人)
calendar_text: Academic Calendar
notes_text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所及足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
Study Abroad at Sussex
How to choose your modules
Standard credit load: 60 Sussex credits per semester (3 or 4 classes).
MODULES: Many students seem confused with our terminology and select modules for incorrect terms. They should also check the modules listed in the Study Abroad Guide, at times students seem to be using a list of modules approved by the home university and some of these lists contain modules that are no longer taught.
Students coming for autumn term only can only select modules listed as 'autumn teaching', they cannot take part of a full year module so any modules listed as 'autumn & spring teaching' should not be selected. Some students believe that these modules are taught in the autumn and then repeated in the spring but this is not correct, they run over two terms.
Students coming for spring/summer should only select modules listed as 'spring teaching'.
Students coming for the full year are free to select modules taught in any term
All module choices are of course subject to any prerequisites that may apply.
housing_text:
Full Year applicants are guaranteed university accommodation if they apply by the 30 June deadline.

Autumn/Spring students are required to check our Accommodation pages for updates whilst we are confirming the arrangements.

Students will receive housing application instructions with their offer letters (or shortly after). Our Housing Office processes all applications and they will inform the students directly about their allocations. In order to confirm their room offer, students will be required to formally accept.

Allocations are subject to availability.

線上說明會.label: 線上說明會
線上說明會.text:
These sessions will give an overview of the inbound Exchange Programme, as well as related matters such as living in the UK, housing, etc, and will hopefully enable any of your students who are interested in applying to spend a semester/year with us in 2026/27 to find out more about our programme.

The 40-minute sessions will be held as follows:
 
Monday 24 November 2025 – 4:00 pm UK time
Tuesday 25 November 2025 – 9:00 am UK time

The link to book onto either session is here: https://forms.office.com/e/LNK7zeWqZZ.

links.text: English for visiting and exchange students

生活費與保險資訊.label: 生活費與保險資訊
生活費與保險資訊.text:
All students MUST ensure they have adequate personal insurance cover prior to traveling to the UK. The University of Manchester does not require that incoming exchange students purchase a specific insurance policy, nor do we have an institutional policy available for purchase. Students should source their own insurance according to their needs/personal circumstances.
Cost of Living

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Not guaranteed, but students can apply for housing. Application for housing is a separate, additional online process, which students must complete AFTER receiving their offer letter from us. Students should NOT reject any room offer they are made – they will not receive another offer.

Information on the type and costs of accommodation can be found via this link.

Electronic Travel Authorisations (ETAs).text:

生活費與保險資訊.text:
UK Student Healthcare
Cost of Living

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
A range of accommodation options is available at a variety of price points and locations close to each of our campuses. Our rooms are all single-occupancy and can be private en-suite rooms or shared bathroom rooms. Students can submit special requests, such as accessibility features, a quieter room, a single-gender or alcohol-free flat, and more.

An offer of accommodation is guaranteed for students coming to Southampton for a single semester only, provided they apply by the deadline. For students coming to Southampton for the full academic year, we cannot guarantee accommodation, but we try to prioritise your application where possible. Please see our accommodation website for details on how to apply: Student accommodation | University of Southampton

Students who do not want to apply for university accommodation or are unsuccessful in their application will need to find private rented accommodation. The Students' Union provides guidance here.

交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所或足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考此連結及Fact Sheet
課程資訊請參考此連結
Course levels: 1000 to 3999 – Undergraduate courses (e.g the second year course International Business II has a code of INTBUS 2500)
Course levels: 4000 – Honours courses. Honours courses are NOT currently offered to Study Abroad or Exchange students.
Course levels: 5000 to 7999 – Postgraduate courses.
Graduate students can only undertake coursework, not research, during their exchange program at the University of Adelaide.
It is not possible to choose a combination of undergraduate and postgraduate courses.
If a student wishes to take undergraduate courses as a master's student, we can accommodate this. In general, there are more undergraduate course options compared to postgraduate.Students should review choosing a course website to determine if their required study area is available.
Study areas not open to Exchange students include but not limited to: Biomedical Studies, Dentistry, Indonesian, Italian, Medical Studies, Modern Greek, Museum and Curatorial Studies, Music Theatre, Nursing, Occupational Therapy, Oral Health, Physiotherapy, Speech Pathology, and etc. (Unavailable Courses = courses not offered to Exchange students.)
Courses with (but not limited to) a course code ending in RG, NA, UAC are NOT available to exchange students.
To check if a course you have selected is available to Study Abroad or Exchange students, visit the Course Outline list. Navigate to study area that you are interested in, then navigate to the course that you are interested in and click on the 'General Course Information' accordion.
Some courses may have pre-requisites, limited availability or may require pre-approval by the School/Faculty. It's students' responsibility to ensure that they have appropriate academic background.
(Restricted Courses = courses may be available but have prerequisites and/or limited availability.)
The faculties will look at the student's transcript and course descriptions from the home university to determine the students' suitability for enrolment into the desired courses.
Courses from the following areas require additional approval prior to enrolment: Criminology, Education, Health Sciences, Languages, Law, MBA, Media, Music, Sciences.
There are two categories of English requirements for entry, dependent on the courses chosen:
General Academic Level: Most undergraduate and postgraduate courses.
Higher English Language Level (including but not limited to): Education, Medicine, Animal & Veterinary Science, Law and MBA.
Minimum / Maximum academic workload per semester: At least 9 units (usually 3 courses). This is considered a 75% workload, but meets full time enrolment requirements for visa purposes. Max 12 units = 100% workload.
Living costs
Overseas-student-health-cover
Students can order OSHC via the University of Adelaide and receive a quote on their Offer of Admission. Our current provideris Medibank.
Why Study in Adelaide

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Not guaranteed, but students may apply for housing. Read more about Accommodation Service 

The University of Adelaide Village is the University's managed accommodation available to Exchange students. Exchange students may also wish to stay with private student accommodation provider, Scape. Other accommodation options are available and details can be found on the Accommodation Service website.

sections_ordered.label: 申請資格
sections_ordered.text:
一般組
本校大一/大二/大三/碩一/碩二(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達2.80分以上。
IELTS 6.5 (聽 6.0 讀 6.0 寫 6.0 說 6.0)，該校部分系所可能有更高語檢要求，選填志願前請務必主動確認。
不接受管理學院國際企業學研究所、管理學院商學研究所、管理學院管理學院企業管理碩士專班、醫學院、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學系、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學研究所之學生申請。

sections_ordered.label: 名額
sections_ordered.text: 一學期0名。（阿德雷德大學因學校合併，暫停交換學生計畫申請）

sections_ordered.label: 學校年曆
sections_ordered.text:
Semester 1: February - July
Semester 2: July - December

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。
GPA 達3.20分以上。
IELTS 6.5 (聽 6.0 讀 6.0 寫 6.0 說 6.0)，該校部分系所可能有更高語檢要求，選填志願前請務必主動確認。
不接受醫學院、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學系、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學研究所、理學院心理學系、理學院心理學研究所、公共衛生學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
兩學期2名。 
※114-2出國交換可選擇雪梨大學的 Semester 1 或 Semester 1 + Semester 2

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Semester 1: February - June
Semester 2: July - November

✔ 該校年曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

Course restrictions.label: Course restrictions
Course restrictions.text:
Not open to medicine, dentistry, pharmacy, nursing, and psychology students.
No Veterinary Science, and clinical placements available in any discipline at any level.

Admission requirement.label: Admission requirement
Admission requirement.text:
Undergraduate
Students must submit a list of initial unit of study requests at the time of application.
USYD reserves the right to require additional documents or information based on the student's unique situation, such as a portfolio for architecture or art studio units or an audition video for performance-based music units, and etc.
Postgraduate
The application process is the same for postgraduate coursework students, but evidence of their undergraduate completion (English undergrad transcript and bachelor's degree certificate) is needed.

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所或足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換學生網頁：Study abroad at Sydney
課程資訊：Find a course
Academic workload: 24 USYD credit points (approx. 4 units of study) is the standard academic workload.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
Overseas Student Health Cover (OSHC)
Exchange students are required to purchase a compulsory OSHC plan. 
Health insurance is compulsory for most international students who are studying in  Australia. It is a condition of your student visa that you maintain Overseas Student Health Cover (OSHC) for the duration of your studies in Australia. This cover needs to be arranged before you can apply for your student visa.
Living costs
Testimonial：Study Abroad at the University of Sydney

links.text: Study Abroad at the University of Sydney

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Guaranteed accommodation if apply before deadline, read more about accommodation
*Accommodation deadlines will be specified once application cycles begin

There are a number of accommodation options as part of our guaranteed offer to study abroad and exchange students, including:

University residences
Residential colleges
Independently-run student housing
Housing application details are shared directly with applicants who have received their unconditional offer.

Minimum academic workload per semester: 18 credit points (3 units/modules)
Some courses have higher English language requirements than those listed here. Check the course requirements in Find a course
Academic Restrictions (by faculty)
Please review Academic Considerations before applying for exchange.
Capstone and MBA units are not available to exchange and study abroad students.
Law Quota units are not available for incoming exchange and study abroad students.
Postgraduate and Bachelor of Medicine and Surgery units are not available to exchange and study abroad students.
Monash Abroad hosts a compulsory orientation for all Exchange and Study Abroad students each semester in the week prior to the University-wide orientation (two weeks prior to the start of the semester). Late arrival will be strictly subject to Faculty approval.
生活相關 Costs of living、Cost of Living Calculator
保險資訊 Overseas Student Health Cover (OSHC)

Campuses in Australia.label: Campuses in Australia
Campuses in Australia.text:
You can study your units across the Clayton and the Caulfield campuses. If you want, however, to study units taught at the Peninsula or Parkville campuses, you must take all of your units at that campus.
Clayton: Yhis is the main campus, where most disciplines are offered and only where Engineering, Science, and undergraduate Law are offered.
Caulfield: The only campus where Art, Design, and Architecture are offered but within easy commuting distance to Clayton, and students studying Arts, Business or IT can study between the two campuses, timetable permitting. They must still be nominated to a primary campus.
Melbourne Law Chambers: Postgraduate law students only. (Not for exchange students)
Parkville: Pharmacy students only. (Not for exchange students)
Peninsula: Not available in the application portal but a student with a particular reason to study there can be allocated there Monash University manually.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，更多資訊請見此連結

On-campus accommodation
Information about on-campus options can be viewed here. Students do not require an offer for Exchange or Study Abroad to apply for on-campus accommodation; there is no fee to apply. Once applications open, students can go to the website to register, and complete an application. During the application process students must ensure they answer that they are a Monash Abroad applicant. As rooms are limited and offered on a first-come, first-served basis, we recommend students apply as soon as possible.
Questions not answered on the website can be directed to Monash Residential Services.

Off-campus accommodation
If students choose to live off-campus, they can receive assistance/advice on searching for rental properties, setting up a share house, things to look out for before you sign a contract, an idea of comparable rental costs, how to budget, and how to get the essentials like internet, gas and electricity connected.

本交換計畫開放申請該校多個校區，校內甄選無須選擇校區
Most undergraduate and postgraduate courses offered at Griffith University are available to inbound students, with some restrictions. Please refer to the Study Options page ‘Restricted Courses’ for more information.
Courses NOT available:
Dental Technology*
Dentistry
Master of Business Administration courses
Medicine
Music (Queensland Conservatorium)*
Occupational Therapy
Psychology (postgraduate)
All practicums, clinical placements and internships
Community Internship (3002LFC)*
Only available to students who major in the same area
Architecture
Aviation
Criminology
Education
Law (postgraduate)
In addition, students who choose to study fine art, photography, or music courses at the South Bank campus will be required to submit a portfolio or audition files.
You will need to meet any prerequisite requirements to be eligible to enrol in courses. Search the course finder to view the specific entry requirements of your courses. You can enrol in courses once the following has occurred:
You have been matriculated into your Study Abroad or Exchange program.
Enrolment has opened and you have received your Welcome to Griffith email. Please note we do not enrol you, it is your responsibility.
Enrolment for Trimester 1 starts from mid-November of the year prior.
You have received your Course Approval Report (CAR). Please refer to the 'Conditions' outlined in your CAR.
Exchange students are required to purchase a compulsory insurance plan. All students are required to have OSHC as a condition of their Australian student visa.
Cost of studying in Australia: It is recommended for students to have access to at least AUD$10,000 per trimester to cover living expenses. This estimate varies significantly depending on lifestyle choices, for example accommodation, utilities, mode of transport, eating out.

Education

In addition, students who choose to study fine art, photography, or music courses at the South Bank campus will be required to submit a portfolio or audition files.

交換學生計畫：
須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。
 
訪問學生計畫：
錄取一般組訪問學生計畫者，需自行負擔該校規定之訪問學生相關費用及住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票等費用。
錄取一般組訪問學生計畫者，須在本校註冊並錄取報到時繳交計畫費2,500元，及本校學雜費1/4。

Maximum academic workload is 3 credit points per trimester.   
訪問學生計畫：
提醒申請人，請隨時關注該校網頁更新資訊
訪問學生與交換學生權益大致相同，請先參考上述交換學生注意事項 
訪問學生資訊請參考此連結

Course restrictions.label: Course restrictions
Course restrictions.text:
★ Courses not open for exchange:
　　● MBA Coursework
　　● Courses that are part of the Honours degree (4xxx)
　　● UNSW Canberra at the Australian Defence Force Academy (all courses starting with ‘z’)
　　● Doctor of Medicine program
　　● Postgraduate students are NOT eligible to take undergraduate courses

While most courses are open to exchange students with the required academic background, some courses are restricted or not available to exchange students.
● Exchange students are limited to taking one online course only
● Courses in the Winter Term are limited and are generally electives, we recommend you are flexible
● Postgraduate students who are in their first semester and who do not have a transcript with results for their postgraduate studies at time of application should select first year postgraduate courses. Upper-level postgraduate courses will not be approved without a transcript demonstrating you meet any prerequisite courses, and you need to provide your transcript at least 6 weeks before term start date to be able to request enrolment in these courses at UNSW.

Faculty of Law & Justice
● Enrolment is restricted to Law Majors. Coursework is available at undergraduate and postgraduate level
● Juris Doctor courses are open to students enrolled in a Juris Doctor Program at their home institution
● Students are not able to take both LAWS and JURD courses simultaneously
● LLM elective courses are open to Law Exchange students
● Undergraduate and JD law enrolment for Exchange students is capped, and students are encouraged to also look at LLM elective courses
● Core courses are not available to Exchange students

The Arts & Media, Education, Humanities & Languages, Social Sciences
● Students wishing to take stage 3 ARTS courses must be majoring in the desired field
● Undergraduate students can only enrol in undergraduate courses
● Postgraduate students are not eligible to take undergraduate courses
● INST, GLST, DANC, EDST, MDIA and Music courses are restricted to declared majors

Art & Design
● Courses are held at the Paddington campus, approximately 20 minutes away – a free shuttle bus service is available
● Priority will be given to students majoring in Art/Design
● Students can take a mix of courses from Paddington and Kensington (main) campus, as long as they are aware of the travel involved

Built Environment
● Students are limited to one studio-based course due to space limitations and should be flexible with subject choices

UNSW Business School (The following courses are not available to exchange students)
● Industrial Training courses including MARK2999, MARK3999, MARK4999, FINS3100, FINS3200
● MARK6xxx courses
● GBAT course

Faculty of Medicine & Health
● Exchange students can enrol in courses from the School of Medical Science however courses in the Doctor of Medicine program are not open to exchange students.

Faculty of Engineering
● Enrolment in Biomedical Engineering and Computer Science courses is extremely limited; students need to be prepared to select courses from another major.

Faculty of Science
● Postgraduate psychology courses are not available to exchange students.
● Undergraduate psychology courses are very limited.

Course selection.label: Course selection
Course selection.text:
You can search for courses on the UNSW Handbook and you can view instructions on how to identify and search for these courses. When choosing your courses, it is important to be flexible.

You must meet any prerequisites for courses. This is assessed at the time of application, and new courses can be submitted for approval on an ongoing basis.
You should check your proposed courses are offered in the term you will be on exchange.
All students are required to enrol in a full-time load each term.
Generally undergraduate students are not able to enrol in graduate courses, but there may be some limited options for Law and some Science and Engineering subjects
It is generally not possible for graduate students to enrol in undergraduate courses.

※You can study across multiple faculties/schools and should choose the level appropriate to you. We recommend you also check the Timetable to ensure that your chosen courses are available.

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所或足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收。
該校交換學生資訊請參考此網頁；課程資訊請參考此網頁
Language courses for incoming exchange students are optional.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
生活開銷：Cost of living.
*Note that this is for the basics and does not include holiday travel and entertainment costs. 
保險資訊：An Australian student visa requires you to have Overseas Student Health Cover (OSHC) for its full duration (most students from Belgium, Norway and Sweden are exempt).
OSHC is a government requirement and cannot be waived with off-shore health insurance and/or comprehensive travel insurance. The UNSW's preferred provider is Medibank. Further instructions are provided upon acceptance. 
該校提供校內醫療服務，請參考Health Service。

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Not guaranteed, but students may apply for housing. Read more about accommodation.

Students must arrange their housing.
On campus accommodation is extremely limited and is not guaranteed even if you apply by the deadline.
Most exchange students choose to live off campus and enjoy the beautiful suburbs that surround UNSW.
Resources and advice. We recommend students arrive 1-2 weeks early to find off campus accommodation. You may wish to book temporary accommodation to allow time to find more permanent housing

sections_ordered.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

Built Environment

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一/大二/大三/碩一(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
IELTS 6.5 (聽 6.0 讀 6.0 寫 6.0 說 6.0)，該校部分系所可能有更高語檢要求，選填志願前請務必主動確認。
不接受法律學院法律學研究所、法律學院科際整合法律學研究所、醫學院、理學院心理學系、理學院心理學研究所、管理學院商學研究所、管理學院管理學院企業管理碩士專班、公共衛生學院、國際學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
兩學期3名。
※114-2出國交換可選擇馬奎里大學的 Semester 1 或 Semester 1 + Semester 2

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Session 1: February - June
Session 2: July - November

✔ 該校年曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所或足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換學生資訊請見此連結、課程資訊請見此連結及此連結、語言課程資訊請見此連結
When students are looking into taking units that are not related to their field of study, they should look into selecting foundational units or units without prerequisites. In the case of undergraduate students, they should look into 1000-level units. In the case of postgraduate students, they should look into 6000-level units.
As a student visa holder, students are required to enrol in a full-time study load of 3-4 units (30-40 credit points), with 75% of the credit points completed in the internal (face-to-face) delivery mode.
English language requirements
If students are enrolled as postgraduate students, they won't be allowed to take any undergraduate units.
Check the list of restricted units(TBA) to see which units are not available to Exchange students.
Cost of Living、Budgeting
Information about OSHC (only for students who purchased the policy via Macquarie University) and other OSHC Providers.
The University will schedule your OSHC 3 weeks prior to class commencement date. Please visit this website to activate your policy and read terms and conditions of the policy 3 weeks prior to class commencement date. You may make adjustments on the dates and duration of your policy upon your arrival to Australia.

Housing on-campus is commonly full but there are a lot of other options run by the university or partner-companies.

When students are looking into taking units that are not related to their field of study, they should look into selecting foundational units or units without prerequisites. In the case of undergraduate students, they should look into 1000-level units. In the case of postgraduate students, they should look into 6000-level units.
As a student visa holder, students are required to enrol in a full-time study load of 3-4 units (30-40 credit points), with 75% of the credit points completed in the internal (face-to-face) delivery mode.
English language requirements
If students are enrolled as postgraduate students, they won't be allowed to take any undergraduate units.
Check the list of restricted units(TBA) to see which units are not available to Exchange students.
Cost of Living、Budgeting
Information about OSHC (only for students who purchased the policy via Macquarie University) and other OSHC Providers.
The University will schedule your OSHC 3 weeks prior to class commencement date. Please visit this website to activate your policy and read terms and conditions of the policy 3 weeks prior to class commencement date. You may make adjustments on the dates and duration of your policy upon your arrival to Australia. 
Accessibility Support
Airport Pick Up Service
Commencing International Students Information
Working in Australia
eStudent
Campus Tour (video), Virtual Tours (virtual), Powered by Experience (video)
housing_text:
不保證住宿，更多資訊請見此連結

There are university-operated accommodation and off-campus accommodation options available. Please visit our Accommodation page to learn more about these options.
Housing on-campus is commonly full but there are a lot of other options run by the university or partner-companies.

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一以上(僅限大學部)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。
歷年不得有不及格／不通過科目。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
IELTS 6.5 (聽 6.0 讀 6.0 寫 6.0 說 6.0)，該校部分系所可能有更高語檢要求，選填志願前請務必主動確認。
不接受醫學院、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學系、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學研究所、理學院心理學系、理學院心理學研究所、公共衛生學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
兩學期1名。
※114-2出國交換可選擇澳洲國立大學的 Semester 1 或 Semester 1 + Semester 2

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Semester 1: February to June
Semester 2: July to November

✔ 該校年曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所或足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換學生資訊請參考此連結及Fact Sheet、課程資訊請參考 Course catalogue
Restricted courses:
Courses offered by the ANU Medical School are not available.
Art studio, music, and design courses are limited.
Law courses are only available to students who are enrolled in a law degree at their home institution.
All students must meet the pre-requisite requirements for the courses they wish to take.
Full-time course load: 24 ANU units per semester (typically 4 courses at 6 units each).
Minimum course load: 18 ANU units per semester (with approval from home institution and ANU)

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
生活開銷：Cost of Living in Canberra.
保險資訊：Overseas Student Health Cover - Duration & Costs
Overseas Student Health Cover (OSHC) is a compulsory requirement for obtaining an Australian student visa.
ANIP：Incoming Exchange Students are able to also partake in our Australian National Internships Program (ANIP) -https://anip.anu.edu.au/ - There is a concurrent application process for being enrolled in the ANIP program that overlaps withgeneral admission to ANU. ANIP is able to provide conditional offers for exchange students awaiting admission.
SIP：The ANU College of Business and Economics (CBE) runs a Special Industry Project (SIP) Course which is available to incoming exchange students - https://cbe.anu.edu.au/current-students/opportunities-and-careers/special-industry-project-course

links.text: Overseas Student Health Cover - Duration & Costs

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組，交換學生計畫
本校大一以上/碩一以上/博一以上學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。

不接受醫學院牙醫學系、醫學院臨床牙醫學研究所、法律學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
兩學期1名。
※114-2出國交換可選擇墨爾本大學的 Semester 1 或 Semester 1 + Semester 2

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Semester 1: February - June
Semester 2: July - November

Welcome Day is typically scheduled a week prior to the commencement of the semester and attendance is compulsory for all incoming exchange students.
Students are required to remain in Melbourne until all assessment items are completed. Return airfares should be booked for dates after the end of the exam period.
✔ 該校年曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費（交換學生計畫）.label: 註冊繳費（交換學生計畫）
註冊繳費（交換學生計畫）.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

註冊繳費（訪問學生計畫）.label: 註冊繳費（訪問學生計畫）
註冊繳費（訪問學生計畫）.text:
錄取一般組訪問學生計畫者，需自行負擔該校規定之訪問學生相關費用及住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票等費用。
錄取一般組訪問學生計畫者，須在本校註冊並於錄取報到時繳交計畫費2,500元，及本校學雜費1/4。
墨爾本大學訪問學生計畫學費請參照此連結

注意事項（交換學生計畫）.label: 注意事項（交換學生計畫）
注意事項（交換學生計畫）.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所或足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收

You may need to meet prerequisites for the subjects you've selected.
Online instructional video for selecting subjects and completing the proposed study plan.
Terminology:
Course: The overall degree or program studied. (Exchange Undergraduate or Exchange-Postgraduate)
Subject: A single unit within a course.
系所限制請參考 Requirements & Restrictions 
每學期最低選修37.5 points學分；至多50 points學分 (3 to 4 subjects)

注意事項（訪問學生計畫）.label: 注意事項（訪問學生計畫）
注意事項（訪問學生計畫）.text:
提醒申請人，請隨時關注該校網頁更新資訊。
訪問學生與交換學生權益大致相同，請先參考上述交換學生注意事項。
該校訪問學生計畫(Study Abroad program)請參考此網站
研究生身分可以參與postgraduate或research program
申請各院系所資格限制請參考此連結 
申請流程請參考此連結 
課程資訊請參考此連結
Students should take a full subject load of 50 points (usually 12.5 points x 4 subjects) for one semester. The minimum enrolment for student visa purposes is 37.5 points for one semester.

實用資訊.label: 實用資訊
實用資訊.text:
生活開銷請參考 Cost of Living 
保險相關資訊請參考 Overseas Student Health Cover (OSHC)
It is an Australian Government requirement that all international students studying on a student visa have Overseas Student Health Cover (OSHC), from an approved Australian provider.
Confirmation of Enrolment (CoE) will not be issued until proof of an OSHC policy purchased through the University of Melbourne or independently is provided.

Housing should be applied for as early as possible. Once the online application has been submitted, students can begin applying for housing using their UniMelb Student Number.

name_zh_detail: 雪梨科技大學（尚未開放申請）

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一以上(僅限大學部)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。
GPA 達3.20分以上。
TOEFL iBT 80 (寫 20 不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.0 (聽 5.5 讀 5.5 寫 5.5 說 5.5)，該校部分系所可能有更高語檢要求，選填志願前請務必主動確認。
不接受醫學院、公共衛生學院、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學系、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學研究所、理學院心理學系、理學院心理學研究所之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
兩學期1名。 
※114-2出國交換可選擇奧塔哥大學的 Semester 1 或 Semester 1 + Semester 2

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Semester 1: February to June
Semester 2: July to November
Key dates: otago.ac.nz/news/events/keydates

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

Campus.label: Campus
Campus.text:
Exchange students attend courses offered at the Dunedin campus only.
360° Campus Video (youtube)
Study Abroad at the University of Otago (youtube)
UniFlats Student Accommodation at Otago (youtube)

links.text: Study Abroad at the University of Otago (youtube)

Restricted programmes.label: Restricted programmes
Restricted programmes.text:
No exchange students are able to take clinical courses (Medicine, Dentistry, Pharmacology, etc)
部分領域不開放交換學生申請。
The following programs are not available for exchange students:
Medicine / Dentistry / Psychiatry / Physiotherapy / Pharmacology / Pharmacy or any other clinical course / MBA / Wildlife Management / Master of Science Communication

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所或足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換資訊請參考：
Otago Global Student Exchange
Information for exchange students coming to Otago
Fact Sheet
Study Abroad and Exchange Guide
Contact the International Office
學業課程等相關資訊請參考：
Academic information for exchange students coming to Otago

links.text: Information for exchange students coming to Otago
Academic information for exchange students coming to Otago

Course load.label: Course load
Course load.text:
Exchange students are required to maintain a full-time student status while at Otago.
Minimum course load: 54 points per semester (three papers).
Maximum course load: 72 points per semester (four papers).
Entry to any course (except 100-level) is based on relevant academic background.
Students may take cross-faculty courses.
Postgraduate students may take undergraduates courses/subjects/units.

Examination.label: Examination
Examination.text: Students must sit their final exams while still on the Otago campus. Further information: otago.ac.nz/exams

Explore courses.label: Explore courses
Explore courses.text:
Otago offers flexible study options with over 140 subjects to choose from! There is no limit on the number of students accepted to a particular course, entry to any course is based on relevant academic background.
Full list of courses offered at Otago

links.text: Full list of courses offered at Otago

English proficiency.label: English proficiency
English proficiency.text:
部分領域的語檢條件較為嚴苛。
Students are required to meet the English language requirements to study at the University of Otago. Please be aware that some programmes requires a higher English requirements. (i.e. Teaching, Social Work, Clinical, Dentistry, and etc.)
Programmes with higher English requirements

Insurance (mandatory).label: Insurance (mandatory)
Insurance (mandatory).text:
Studentsafe-University is Otago's recommended insurance policy.
This is a comprehensive travel and health insurance.
Registration is automatic.
Alternative insurance policies must be assessed up to six weeks before you start at Otago.

Living Cost.label: Living Cost
Living Cost.text: Please see Otago Living Costs for detailed information.

Accommodation Information.label: Accommodation Information
Accommodation Information.text:
Guaranteed on-campus housing if apply before deadline. Read more about accommodation below:
University Flats
The University of Otago is renowned for its residential campus environment and you are encouraged to apply for accommodation in one of our University Flats (Uni Flats).
All Uni Flats are located within an easy walk of the University campus and main shopping centre. Students share the cleaning and cooking duties and usually shop together for food.
The residential fee includes the cost of your room, electricity, internet, bed linen, community events and the services of the Uni Flats team.
All Uni Flats are fully furnished, including a basic kitchen setup.
Apply for University Flats accommodation
In order to be considered for accommodation with Uni Flats you must first register and then apply online through the Student Accommodation Centre.

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一/大二/大三學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準）。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
TOEFL iBT 80 (讀 19 聽 19 寫 19 不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.0 (聽 5.5 讀 5.5 寫 5.5 說 5.5)，該校部分系所可能有更高語檢要求，選填志願前請務必主動確認。
不接受社會科學院新聞研究所、管理學院會計學研究所、管理學院財務金融學研究所、管理學院國際企業學研究所、管理學院資訊管理學研究所、管理學院商學研究所、管理學院管理學院企業管理碩士專班、生物資源暨農學院森林環境暨資源學系、生物資源暨農學院森林環境暨資源學研究所之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text: 一學期0名。(因交換學生名額不平衡，本次甄選不開放申請)

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Semester 1: February - June
Semester 2: July - November

✔  該校年曆請參考此連結
✔  Note that summer (Dec - Jan) is not included in the exchange period.

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔。

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
The language requirements listed are the minimum standards. Applicants are advised to look into specific departments and courses to ensure they meet all prerequisites and additional language criteria. The host institution reserves the right to deny admission if no suitable departments or courses are available
Please refer to this link for exchange program information and this link for course details.
For fields of study restricted to exchange students, please see this link.
Level of courses: In Arts, Science and Commerce, the undergraduate (Bachelor) degree is a 3 year degree at Canterbury. This means that 300 level courses are the most advanced undergraduate courses in these areas. 400 level courses in these disciplines are graduate courses and undergraduate exchange students are not eligible.
Course load: A normal workload for one semester is 60 points (or 120 points for one year). Minimum course load is 45 points per semester (90 points per year).
Exchange students must have appropriate and current medical and travel insurance while studying in New Zealand. See detailed information about insurance.
生活開銷：Cost of living 
學生簽證：Visa requirements

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，更多資訊請見此連結
 
Usual application deadlines:
1 December for a Semester 1 (February) start, or
1 May for a Semester 2 (July) start.
The usual accommodation for Exchange students is at UC Accommodation Student Village.
There is a separate online application process for housing, and the online housing application can be found at the above link. When making travel plans, please also refer to the above accommodation website for the earliest move-in dates and latest move out dates for on campus accommodation.
The arrival dates may be subject to change. An earlier arrival date is subject to availability.

兩學期1名。
※114-2交換甄選開放威靈頓維多利亞大學 Semester 1 或 Semester 1+2

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Trimester 1: February - June
Trimester 2: July - November
Trimester 3: November - February (NOT open for admission)

Students starting in Trimester 2 and staying for two trimesters will take a break over the summer period (November - February) and resume study at the start of Trimester 1.
Students should not confirm return ticket dates until the exam timetable is released. Exams dates cannot be changed.
✔ 該校行事曆請見此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但該校雜費、住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所或足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
VUW cannot accept graduate thesis students; master students are eligible for coursework only.
Most courses are available to Study Abroad and Exchange students, but some are restricted, have limited entry, or have earlier application deadlines.
Students must be enrolled in a minimum of 45 points in order to be considered a full-time student. 60 points (3-4 courses) per trimester is the maximum and recommended course load for exchange students.
1 point at Victoria University of Wellington is equivalent to 0.5 ECTS/0.25 US Credits. 1 point typically requires 10 hours of student work (lectures, labs, study time etc).
Information about courses offered each year can be found on our Course finder and Study Abroad and Exchange pages.
Not every course is offered every year/trimester, so students may need to search a little to find where their course is.
簽證資訊請見此連結
Apply online for an Exchange Student visa through Immigration NZ.
Students studying for two trimesters are eligible to work part time, and up to full time during holidays. Students studying for one trimester are not able to work.
Insurance Fees and Additional Costs: All international students are automatically signed up to the Studentsafe Inbound University insurance and pay for this upon enrolment at Victoria University of Wellington. This policy provides comprehensive cover throughout the course of study, and also covers the insured student's travel to New Zealand and time spent in New Zealand up to 31 days before the start of their courses.
Fees for 2026
Insurance: Per Trimester (up to 6 months): NZD$450
Accommodation: Accommodation Fees for each individual hall of residence is available in the hall comparison profiles
For additional fees and cost of living, see information on Fees & Costs. For budgeting advice, please refer to the Students’ Financial Survival Guide.

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
不保證住宿，更多資訊請見此連結及此連結

Student Accommodation at Victoria University of Wellington is very competitive. This means that students may not be placed in one of their initial choices for accommodation. Accommodation applications open on 1 August each year, and we strongly recommend applying as soon as they open. Students can apply for accommodation before they have been nominated or accepted into the exchange programme.
It is particularly competitive for students coming for a single exchange term during Trimester 1 (February start) at Victoria University of Wellington.
Mature students or students who have experience living away from home are advised to consider the self-catered halls of residence. All students over the age of 20 will be offered a self-catered hall only.
All questions regarding accommodation applications should be directed to the Accommodation Service. We do not process accommodation applications and therefore have no impact on processing times.

此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填.label: 此校開放予第二次出國交換之同學選填

申請資格.label: 申請資格
申請資格.text:
一般組
本校大一以上/碩一以上(不含博士生)學生。（以報名交換學生甄選時，本校教務處學籍系統上之年級為準），前述「以上」包含該年級。
GPA 達3.00分以上。
TOEFL iBT 80 (寫 21 不接受 Home Edition)，新制 TOEFL iBT 成績待交換學校確認中 或 IELTS 6.0 (聽 5.5 讀 5.5 寫 5.5 說 5.5)，該校部分系所可能有更高語檢要求，選填志願前請務必主動確認。
不接受醫學院、理學院心理學系、理學院心理學研究所、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學系、生物資源暨農學院獸醫學研究所、公共衛生學院、管理學院會計學研究所、管理學院財務金融學研究所、管理學院國際企業學研究所、管理學院資訊管理學研究所、管理學院商學研究所、管理學院管理學院企業管理碩士專班、國際學院之學生申請。

名額.label: 名額
名額.text:
兩學期1名。 
※114-2出國交換可選擇奧克蘭大學的 Semester 1 或 Semester 1 + Semester 2

學校年曆.label: 學校年曆
學校年曆.text:
Semester One: February - June
Semester Two: July - November

✔  該校年曆請參考此連結

註冊繳費.label: 註冊繳費
註冊繳費.text: 須在本校註冊並繳交全額學雜費，免繳該校學費，但住宿費、生活費、保險費、往返機票費等均須自行負擔

注意事項.label: 注意事項
注意事項.text:
交換學校一覽表所列之語言能力為該校之最低門檻要求，同學需自行確認語言能力是否符合該校修課要求、查詢是否有相對應的系所或足夠的課程可供選讀、能否達到該校之每學期修課學分數要求、以及是否具備相關領域之背景知識，若未達標準，該校有權拒收
交換學生計畫資訊請見此連結及Fact Sheet、課程資訊請見此連結及此連結
學士生及研究生有不同的申請資格，欲選填該校交換的同學，請先確認自己是否符合該校規定，以及不開放選修科目：
Undergraduate students: Entry Requirements
Postgraduate students: Entry Requirements
NTU students may be able to take postgraduate courses only if course prerequisites are met and accepted by the faculty.
The Exchange programme is restricted to course work only and does not include thesis writing and supervision.
Students who wish to take a full-year course load at postgraduate level are advised to apply as an international student to the University of Auckland for a one-year postgraduate programme.
Not available to exchange students (including but not limited to): School of Nursing, Medicine, Surgery, Pharmacy, Optometry, MBA, and Courses ending with the letters F, H.
Many courses in Fine Arts, Architecture, Design and Music require the submission of supplementary information.
Stage I Engineering courses (ENGGEN 115, ENGGEN 121, ENGGEN 131, ENGGEN 140, ENGGEN 150, ENGSCI 111, ELECTENG 101, CHEMMAT 121) are not open to exchange students.
Exchange students are considered “non-degree” students at the University of Auckland and are enrolled in the COPEX (Certificate of Proficiency for Exchange) programme.
Students should apply for “concession” to enrol in courses that require Auckland faculty approval. In this process, faculties assess whether their prior study meets relevant course prerequisites and notify them accordingly. In some occasions, they may be asked to provide course outlines/syllabi in English for courses equivalent to Auckland prerequisite requirements. ...read more
The standard course load for full-time study is 50-60 points per semester or 100-120 points per year. Most courses are weighted 15 points and students generally take four courses per semester.
Course schedules are published and enrolments are open on 1 November for the subsequent year (both Semester 1 and 2).
Exchange students may select courses across different disciplines provided if they meet course prerequisites and the courses are not restricted (see “course restrictions”).
Visa requirements: Exchange students must apply for “Exchange Student Visa” to Immigration New Zealand and obtain their student visa prior to entering New Zealand. They should not enter New Zealand on a visitor visa.
Mandatory health and travel insurance: All enrolled international students are required to have approved health and travel insurance (regardless of the visa type) for the duration of their visa or until they depart New Zealand, whichever comes first. The University of Auckland's preferred insurance policy for international students is Studentsafe-University. The Studentsafe insurance fee will be charged to a student's account 48-72 hours after enrolment.
Cost of living in Auckland

住宿資訊.label: 住宿資訊
住宿資訊.text:
Guarantee campus housing to all Exchange students as long as they put an application in by the priority deadline. Read more about accommodation.
Students are suggested to apply even before they are admitted to the exchange programme.

At the time you accept your residential agreement, you are required to pay accommodation deposit & administration fee.
Students are mostly placed in a single room at self-catering and mix-gender accommodation unless they request special arrangement to the office.
